Leviticus13:12 Kuenda nda ilundu viaco via lisanduila kekova, ilundu viaco yu vi kasi vekova liosi liukuovei tunde kutue toke kolomãi, ndeci ci mõlẽhela kocitunda,"
Leviticus13:13 Oco ocitunda ci vanja kuenje nda ilundu via sĩkĩlila etimba liaye liosi, ci tukuila ukuovei waco hati, Wa yela, viosi via pongoloka vi yela; wa yela muẽle."
Leviticus13:14 Puãi nda epute li mõlẽha ketimba liaye, wa vĩhĩsua."
Leviticus13:15 Kuenje ocitunda ci vanja kepute kuenje cu tukuila okuti wa vĩhĩsua; epute liaco lia vĩha; uvei waco ilundu.
Leviticus13:16 Pamue nda epute li pongoloka vali okuti ositu yaco yi yela, oco iya kocitunda,"
Leviticus13:17 kuenje ocitunda cu vanja. Nda uvei waco u yela oco ocitunda ci tukula ukuovei hati, Wa yela, wa yela muẽle."
Leviticus13:18 Oco ositu eci yi kasi locipumbu kekova liaco yu ca kaya,"
Leviticus13:19 kuenje komangu yaco ku piñala oku lenda ku yela, pamue papa pa ñañala haipo pa kusuluka, oco ku lekisiwa kocitunda."
Leviticus13:20 Ocitunda ci vanja kuenje nda okumõleha kua longela kosi yekova, kuenda oluveyi luaco lua pongoloka lu yela, oco ocitunda cu tukula okuti wa vĩhĩsua. Uvei waco ovilundu, via tuika vocipumbu."
Leviticus13:21 Puãi nda ocitunda ci ci vanja kuenje ka kuli oluveyi lu yela, ka ca longelele kosi yekova puãi ci wumbula, ocitunda cu yika oloneke epanduvali."
Leviticus13:22 Nda ci sambukila vekova, oco ocitunda cu tukula hati, Wa vĩhĩsua, oco uvei."
Leviticus13:23 Puãi nda papa pa ñañala pa tãi vomangu yaco, ka pa sambuka, oco emome liocipumbu, kuenje ocitunda cu tukula hati, O yela."
Leviticus13:24 Pamue ositu nda ya pia londalu kekova liaco, kuenje epute liaco li ñañala paco pa pia, lositu yi kusuluka pamue yi yela,"
Leviticus13:25 oco ocitunda ci ci vanja kuenje nda oluveyi lu kasi apa pa ñañala lua pongoloka lu yela, kuenda okumõlẽha kuaco kua longela kosi yekova, uvei waco ilundu, via tuikila apa pa pia. Kuenje ocitunda cu tukula okuti wa vĩhĩsua, uvei waco ilundu."
Leviticus13:26 Puãi nda ocitunda ci ci vanja kuenje ka kuli oluveyi lu yela apa pa ñañala, ka pa longelele kosi yekova, puãi pa wumbula, nda oco ocitunda cu yika oloneke epanduvali."
Leviticus13:27 Kuenje keteke liepanduvali ocitunda cu vanja, nda pa sambukila kekova ocitunda cu tukula okuti wa vĩhĩsua, uvei waco ovilundu."
Leviticus13:28 Kuenje nda papa pa ñañala pa tãi vomangu yaco, ka pa sambukilile vekova, puãi pa wumbula, oco okulenda kuoku pia. Ocitunda cu tukula hati, O yela, olio emome lioku pia."
Leviticus13:29 Nda ulume pamue ukãi o kasi luvei kutue pamue kolonjele,"
Leviticus13:30 oco ocitunda ci vanja uvei kuenje nda okumõlẽha kuaco kua longela kosi yekova, kuenda ku kasi ocifuko ca pelevala, ci yeluluka, ocitunda cu tukula hati, Wa vĩhĩsua, oco utumbutumbu, ovio ilundu viutue pamue violonjele."
Leviticus13:31 Kuenje nda ocitunda ca vanja kuvei wutumbutumbu kuenje okumõleha kuaco ka kua longele kosi yekova, kuenda ka mu kasi esinga li tekãva vokati kaco, oco ocitunda ci yika ukuovei waco wutumbutumbu oloneke epanduvali."
Leviticus13:32 Eteke liepanduvali ocitunda ci vanja uvei kuenje nda utumbutumbu ka wa sambukile, kuenda ka muli esinga li yeluluka, loku mõleha kuaco kutumbutumbu ka kua longele kosi yekova,"
Leviticus13:33 oco eye a pemuiwe, puãi utumbutumbu waco ko ka pemũlue. Ocitunda ci yika vali ukuotumbutumbu waco oloneke epanduvali."
Leviticus13:34 Keteke liepanduvali ocitunda ci vanja utumbutumbu kuenje nda utumbutumbu waco ka wa sambukilile vekova, lokumõleha kuaco ka kua longele kosi yehova, oco ocitunda cu tukula hati, Wa yela. O sukula uwalo waye kuenje o yela."
Leviticus13:35 Puãi nda utumbutumbu u sambukila vali kekova eci a yelisua,"
Leviticus13:36 ocitunda cu vanja kuenje, nda utumbutumbu wa sambukila kekova, ocitunda ka ci vanjiliya esinga li yeluluka; eye wa vĩhĩsua."
Leviticus13:37 Puãi nda vovaso aye utumbutumbu wa tepuluka, lesinga li tekava lia kulilamo, oco utumbutumbu waco wa kaya, eye wa yela. Kuenje ocitunda cu tukula hati, Wa yela."
Leviticus13:38 Nda ulume pamue ukãi o kuete kekova lietimba liaye amañana a ñañala, a yela loku ñañala,"
Leviticus13:39 ocitunda ci vanja kuenje nda amañana a ñañala kekova lietimba liaye a yeluluka ño, o olombulu viaño via tuikila kekova, eye o yela."
Leviticus13:40 Nda ocifuko comunu ca puako kutue waye eye ukuetoto, puãi o yela."
Leviticus13:41 Kuenje nda ocifuko caye ca puako konele yimue yutue yokovaso, eye ukuepela liokocipala, puãi o yela."
Leviticus13:42 Puãi nda ketoto liutue waye pamue kepela liokocipala ku kasi uvei u kusuluka, uvei waco ilundu vi li loku tuikila vetoto pamue kepela liokocipala."
Leviticus13:43 Oco ocitunda cu vanja kuenje nda oku lenda kuvei ku kusulukila ketoto liutue waye, pamue kepela likocipala, ndokumõlẽha kuilundu kekova lietimba,"
Leviticus13:44 eye omunu ukuailundu, wa vĩhĩsua. Ocitunda cu tukula hati, Wa vĩhĩsua muẽle, uvei waye u li kutue."
Leviticus13:45 Ukuailundu o kasi luvei waco o wala olonanga via totoloka, ocifuko caye ci kala onuma, eye o sitika onjembu yokilu, kuenje o vilikiya hati, Nda vĩhĩsua, nda vĩhĩsua."
Leviticus13:46 Oloneke viosi a kasi luvei wa vĩhĩsua. Wa vĩhĩsua, o kala kala ulika; osinge yaye ka yi kala vocilombo, yi kala vofeka."
Leviticus13:47 Eci uvei wovilundu u kasi vuwalo umue, ci kale uwalo wovonya omeme, ci kale uwalo wovalatanya,"
Leviticus13:48 ci kale kalinya usõvi pamue kalinya upati, a kala ovalatanya, ndaño ovonya omeme, ci kale kocipa pamue kueci ca tungiwa locipa,"
Leviticus13:49 nda uvei waco u talala pamue u kusuluka vuwalo pamue vocipa, pamue valinya usõvi pamue upati, pamue vocina cimue cocipa, oco uvei waco ovilundu, kuenje ci lekisiwa kocitunda."
Leviticus13:50 Oco ocitunda ci vanja kuvei waco, kuenje ci yika eci ci kasi luvei waco oloneke epanduvali."
Leviticus13:51 Keteke liepanduvali ci vanja kuvei waco; nda uvei waco wa sambukila kuwalo waco, ci kale kalinya usõvi, ci kale kalinya upati, ci kale kocipa nda nye nda nye upange waco va linga locipa, uvei waco ilundu viukuakutoñola, ca vĩhĩsua."
Leviticus13:52 Oco o yoka uwalo waco, ndaño uvei u kasi kalinya usovi pamue kalinya upati, ndaño kovonya omeme ndaño kovalatanya, ndaño kovonya omeme ndaño kovalatanya, ndaño kocina cimue cocipa; momo uvei waco ilundu viukuakutoñola; ci yokiwa londalu."
Leviticus13:53 Oco nda ocitunda ci vanja kuenje uvei waco ka wa sambukilile vuwalo, ndaño kalinya usõvi pamue kalinya upati ndaño kumue kocipa,"
Leviticus13:54 oco ocitunda ci va tuma oku sukula eci ci kasi luvei, kuenje ci ci yika vali oloneke epanduvali."
Leviticus13:55 Kuenda ocitunda ci vanja eci va sukula ale uvei waco kuenje nda uvei ka wa pongolokele ocivalo, ndaño uvei waco ka wa sambukile, wa vĩhĩsua; o u yoka londalu. Uvei waco ovilundu viukuakutoñola, ndaño u kasi vokati, ndaño kilu."
Leviticus13:56 Kuenje nda ocitunda ci vanja kuenje uvei waco wu wumbula kovaso yokusukula kuaco, ci u tola kuwalo, pamue kocipa, pamue kalinya usõvi, pamue kalinya upati."
Leviticus13:57 Oco nda a mõlẽhẽla ño vuwalo waco, ndaño kalinya usõvi, ndaño kalinya upati, pamue kumue kocipa, u kasi loku sambuka, ove o yoka londalu eci ci kasi luvei waco."
Leviticus13:58 Luwalo waco, ndaño alinya usõvi, ndaño alinya upati, ndaño cimue cocipa, ove o ci sukula, nda uvei wa tundamo, u sukuiwa luvali kuenje u yela."
Leviticus13:59 Evi ovio ovihandeleko viuvei wilundu vi kasi kuwalo wovonya omeme pamue wovalatanya, ndaño kalinya usõvi, ndaño kalinya upati, pamue kocimue cocipa, oku tukula hati, Ca yela pamue oku tukula hati, Ca vĩhĩsua."
Leviticus14:1 Yehova wa popia la Mose hati,"
Leviticus14:2 Ocihandeleko cukuavilundu veteke liokuyelisua kuaye ceci: Vo nena kocitunda.
Leviticus14:3 Kuenje ocitunda ci tunda kocilombo, oco ocitunda ci vanja kuenje nda uvei wovilundu wa kaya kukuavilundu,"
Leviticus14:4 oco ocitunda ci handeleka okuti wa nyañuile u o yelisua olonjila vivali vi li lomuenyo viombuto yi yela, luti wo-cedro, kuenda eci cohula lisapa viahisope."
Leviticus14:5 Kuenda ocitunda ci tuma oku ipa onjila yimuamue vocikuata cotuma kilu liovava a enda.
Leviticus14:6 Onjila ya sialapo lomuenyo ci yi nyañula luti wo-cedro kuenda eci cohula lovisapa viahisope, kuenje ci vi yava kumuamue lonjila yaco yomuenyo vosonde yonjila ya ipaiwaila kilu liovava a enda."
Leviticus14:7 Kuenje ci nyĩla olonjanja epanduvali kuaco ku o yelisua kovilundu, cu tukula hati, Wa yela, kuenje cecela kusenge waco onjila yomuenyo."
Leviticus14:8 Oco u o yelisua o sukula uwalo waye, kuenda o lipemũla ocifuko cosi, o yua kuenje o yela. Oco iñila vocilombo, puãi o kala oloneke epanduvali kosamua yombalaka yaye."
Leviticus14:9 Keteke liepanduvali o lipemũla ocifuko cosi kuenda olonjele viaye lisokopia, ocifuko caye cosi o ci lipemũla. O sukula uwalo waye, o sukulavo etimba liaye oco wa yela."
Leviticus14:10 Keteke liecelãla o nyañula otumeme tuvali tualume ka tu kuete etondelo, lomeme yomange yulima umosi ka yi kuete etondelo, kuenda olonepa vitatu viekui viefa liosema ya fina ndocilumba cosema ya tengiwa lulela, kuenda omeyu yo-litro yulela."
Leviticus14:11 Kuenje ocitunda caco cu yelisa ci tumbika omunu waco o yelisua kuenda ovina evi kovaso a Yehova, kuvelo wombalaka yoku ñualehela la Yehova."
Leviticus14:12 Kuenje ocitunda ci nyañula kamue kotumeme tualume, ci ka lumbila ndocilumba ceko, kuenda omeyu yo-litro yulela, ci vi yangelisa ndocilumba coku yangelisila kovaso a Yehova."
Leviticus14:13 Kuenda cipaila okameme kaco oku ku kola kuna va ipailela ocilumba cekandu locilumba coku pia elisi, momo ndeci ocilumba cekandu ci tiamela kocitunda haimo muocilumba ceko, ci kola cimue."
Leviticus14:14 Ocitunda ci nyañula kosonde yocilumba ceko, kuenje ocitunda ci yi kapa kosungu yetui liondio liu o yelisua, lokomumba yeka liaye liondio, lokomumba yomãi yaye yondio."
Leviticus14:15 Ocitunda ci nyañula kamue komeyu yo-litro yulela, citila peka liaye liokepĩli;"
Leviticus14:16 noke ci yava omuine waye wondio vulela u kasi peka liaye liokepĩli kuenje ulela waco cu nyila lomuine waye kovaso a Yehova olonjanja epanduvali.
Leviticus14:17 Oco ulela waco wa siala peka liaye ocitunda ci waveka kosunga yetui liondio liu o yelisua, lokomumba yeka liaye liondio, lokomumba yomãi yaye yondio, kilu liosonde yocilumba ceko."
Leviticus14:18 Oco ulela wa siala peka liocitunda ocitunda ci u waveka kutue wu o yelisua, kuenje ocitunda cu likutilila kovaso a Yehova oku tuvika."
Leviticus14:19 Kuenje ocitunda ci lumbila ocilumba cekandu ha tuvika ekandu liu o yelisua kokuvĩhĩsua kuaye. Noke ipaya ocilumba coku pia elisi.
Leviticus14:20 Oco ocitunda ci lumba ocilumba coku pia elisi locilumba cosema kilu liutala kuenje ocitunda cu likutilila oku tuvika, kuenje wa yela."
Leviticus14:21 Kuenje nda osuke yu ka mõli cosi eci, oco o nyañula okameme kamosi kulume ndocilumba ceko hã ha va ci yangelisa oco va tuvika eviho liaye, kuenda onepa yekui yimosi yefa liosema ya fina ya tengiwa lulela ndocilumba cosema, lomeyu yo-litro yulela,"
Leviticus14:22 kuenda olopomba vivali pamue ovivu vivali violonende, nda ovio a tẽla oku mõla; yikuavo yi linga ocilumba cekandu, yikuavo ocilumba coku pia elisi."
Leviticus14:23 Oco keteke liecelãla o vi nenẽla kocitunda okuliyelisa kuaye kuvelo wombalaka yoku ñualehela la Yehova kovaso a Yehova.
Leviticus14:24 Kuenje ocitunda ci nyañula okameme kocilumba ceko lomeyu yo-litro yulela, kuenda ocitunda ci vi yangelisa ndocilumba coku yangelisila kovaso a Yehova."
Leviticus14:25 Oco eye ipa okameme kocilumba ceko kuenje ocitunda ci nyañula kosonde yocilumba ceko, ci yi kapa kosungu yetui liondio liu o yelisua, kuenda komumba yeka liaye liondio, lokomumba yomãi yaye yondio."
Leviticus14:26 Kuenda citila kamue kulela waco peka liaye liokepili,"
Leviticus14:27 kuenje ocitunda ci nyĩla lomuine waye wondio kamue kulela u kasi peka liaye liepili olonjanja epanduvali kovaso a Yehova.
Leviticus14:28 Ocitunda ci waveka ulela u kasi peka liaye kosungu yeka liaye liondio, lokomumba yomãi yaye yondio, oko kua kapiwa osonde yocilumba ceko."
Leviticus14:29 Kuenje ocisupe culela waco u kasi peka liocitunda ci wavekiwa kutue wu o yelisua, noke ocitunda cu likutilila kovaso a Yehova oku tuvika."
Leviticus14:30 Kuenje osuke yi lumba olopomba pamue ivuvu violonende ndevi a mõla.
Leviticus14:31 Ndevi muẽle a mõla, yikuavo ocilumba cekandu, yikuavo ocilumba coku pia elisi, kumue locilumba cosema, kuenje ocitunda ci likutilila u o yelisua kovaso a Yehova oku tuvika."
Leviticus14:32 Eci oco ocihandeleko cu o kasi luvei wovilundu, u ka tẽla oku mõla evi viokuliyelisa kuaye."
Leviticus14:33 Oco Yehova wa popia la Mose la Arone hati,"
Leviticus14:34 Eci wiñili vofeka ya Kanana ndu yihi ha yi lingi ofeka yene, kuenje ñapa uvei wilundu vonjo yimue yofeka wu kasi layo,"
Leviticus14:35 u o fuka onjo iya, o sapuila ocitunda hati, Nda soka siti, huti ño vonjo yaco mu kasi uvei."
Leviticus14:36 Kuenje ocitunda ci tuma oku tundisa vonjo yaco ovikuata viosi osimbu ocitunda ka ca iñilile handi oku vanja uvei, sanga viosi vi kasi vonjo vi vĩhĩsua; kuenje noke yaco ocitunda ciñila oku tala onjo."
Leviticus14:37 Oco ci vanja kuvei waco kuenje nda uvei u kasi vovimano vionjo, laniõlõlo a talala pamue a kusũka a mõleha hutiño vokati kocimano,"
Leviticus14:38 ocitunda ci tunda vonjo puvelo wonjo ha yiki onjo oloneke epanduvali.
Leviticus14:39 Oco ocitunda ciya vali keteke liaco liepanduvali ha vanjimo, kuenje nda uvei wa sambukila kovimano vionjo,"
Leviticus14:40 ocitunda ci tuma oku upamo ovawe a kasi luvei ha va va imbi kumue kua vĩha kofeka.
Leviticus14:41 Kuenje ci kuanguisa vokati konjo yaco yosi, kuenda va pesila eve liaco va kuangula kumue kua vĩha kofeka."
Leviticus14:42 Oco va nyañula ovawe amue aiñi oku a piñainyapo, kuenje o nyañula onata yimue yiñi ha kolongisa onjo."
Leviticus14:43 Nda uvei wiya vali, okuti u tiuka vali vonjo kovaso yoku tundisa ovawe aco, kuenda oku kuangula onjo loku yi kolonga,"
Leviticus14:44 noke ocitunda ciya, ci kulihisa kuenje nda uvei wa tiuka ocili vonjo, uvei waco ilundu viukuaku toñola, onjo yaco ya vĩhĩsua."
Leviticus14:45 Kuenje o teyisapo onjo yaco, ovawe aco lolohangalo lovimu viosi vionjo o vi tualisa kofeka kumue kua vĩha."
Leviticus14:46 Lu le iñila vonjo yaco osimbu yaco yosi yoku yika, o vĩhĩsua toke koñolosi."
Leviticus14:47 Oco u o pekela vonjo yaco o sukula uwalo waye; kuendavo u o lila vonjo yaco o sukula uwalo waye.
Leviticus14:48 Puãi nda ocitunda ciya, ci kũlihisa kuenje nda uvei ka wa tiukile ocili vonjo eci ya kolongiwa, oco ocitunda ci sapula hati, Onjo ya yela, momo uvei wa tundamo."
Leviticus14:49 Kuenje poku yelisa onjo ocitunda ci nyañula olonjila vivali luti wo-cedro leci cohula lovisapa viahisope.
Leviticus14:50 Cipalela onjila yimue vocikuata cotuma kilu liovava a enda.
Leviticus14:51 Ci yelula uti wo-cedro leci cohula kuenda ohisope lonjila yi kasi lomuenyo ha ci vi yavi vosonde yonjila yaco ya ipaiwa lovovava aco a enda ha ci nyĩla onjo olonjanja epanduvali.
Leviticus14:52 Kuenje ci yelisa onjo losonde yonjila, lovava a enda, lonjila yi kasi lomuenyo, kuenda luti wo-cedro, la hisope leci cohula,"
Leviticus14:53 puãi cecela kusenge waco onjila yaco yi kasi lomuenyo, oco yi tunde vimbo; kuenje ci likutilila onjo oku tuvika, kuenje onjo yi yela."
Leviticus14:54 Evi ovio ovihandeleko viuvei wosi wilundu lutumbutumbu,"
Leviticus14:55 lovilundu viuwalo levi vionjo,"
Leviticus14:56 haivio ovihandeleko viuvei wocilenda, pamue apute, pamue uvei wamañana."
Leviticus14:57 Vi longisa oku tepisa pokati keci ca vĩha leci ca yela. Evi ovio ovihandeleko vilundu.
Leviticus15:1 Oco Yehova wa popia la Mose la Arone hati,"
Leviticus15:2 Sapuili va Isareli hoti, Eci ulume a kasi loku pita cimue ketimba liaye ndokatutuila, okupita kuaco kua vĩha."
Leviticus15:3 Okuvĩhĩsua kuaye kuokatutuila kaco kuoku: nda okupita kuaco kua enda ño, ndaño oku pita kuaco kua kotoka ketimba liaye, haimo wa vĩhĩsua."
Leviticus15:4 Ula wosi okuti kua pekela u o kasi lokatutuila kaco wa vĩhĩsua, lovina viosi eye a tumãla via vĩhĩsua."
Leviticus15:5 Kuenda u o lamba kula waye o sukula uwalo waye, o yua, kuenje o vĩhĩsua toke koñolosi."
Leviticus15:6 Kuenda u wa tumãla kocina cimue oku kua tumãlẽle ukuakatutuila kaco o sukula uwalo waye, o yua, kuenje o vĩhĩsua toke koñolosi."
Leviticus15:7 Kuenda u o lamba etimba liu o kasi lokatutuila o sukula uwalo waye, o yua, kuenje o vĩhĩsua toke koñolosi."
Leviticus15:8 Kuenda nda u o kasi lokatutuila kaco o siyila umue o yela, oco u o yela o sukula uwalo waye, o yua, kuenje o vĩhĩsua toke koñolosi."
Leviticus15:9 Kuenda oselei yosi ukuakatutuila a tumalako ya vĩhĩsua.
Leviticus15:10 Kuenda wosi o lamba cimue ca kala vemẽhi liaye o vĩhĩsua toke koñolosi. Lu ambata ovina viaco o sukula uwalo waye, o yua, kuenje o vĩhĩsua toke koñolosi."
Leviticus15:11 Lu wosi ukuakatutuila kaco wo lamba osimbu ka pitisile ovaka aye vovava, omunu waco o sukula uwalo waye, o yua, kuenje o vĩhĩsua toke koñolosi."
Leviticus15:12 Kuenda ocikuata cotuma nda ca lambiwa lu o kasi lokatutuila kaco va cipa; nda ocikuata cuti ci sukuiwa lovava.
Leviticus15:13 Oco eci u o kasi lokatutuila kaco a yelisua kokatutuila o litendela oloneke epanduvali vioku yelisua ha sukula uwalo waye; kuenda o yua vovava a enda oco kuenje o yela.
Leviticus15:14 Keteke liecelãla o nyañula olopomba vivali pamue ivuvu vivali violonende, kuenje iya ku Yehova kuvelo wombalaka yoku ñualehela la Yehova ha vi eci kocitunda."
Leviticus15:15 Kuenje ocitunda ci vi lumba, yikuavo ocilumba cekandu, yikuavo ocilumba coku pia elisi. Kuenje ocitunda cu likutilila kovaso a Yehova ha tuvika okatutuila kaye."
Leviticus15:16 Oco nda olucito lulume lu tunda, o yuisa etimba liaye liosi kuenje o vĩhĩsua toke koñolosi."
Leviticus15:17 Kuenda uwalo wosi lovina viosi vi kasi lolucito luaco vi sukuiwa lovava, vi vĩhĩsua toke koñolosi."
Leviticus15:18 Ukãivo, nda ulume o pekela laye lolucito, kavali kavo va yua kuenje va vĩhĩsua toke koñolosi."
Leviticus15:19 Nda ukãi o kasi lokupita kumue, kuenje okupita kuaco ketimba liaye osonde, o vĩhĩsua lofuko yaye oloneke epanduvali; wosi u lamba o vĩhĩsua toke koñolosi."
Leviticus15:20 Oco ovina viosi okuti o pekailamo osimbu a kasi lofuko yaye vi vĩhĩsua, kuenda evi viosi a tumãlãila vi vĩhĩsuavo."
Leviticus15:21 Oco wosi o lamba kula waye o sukula uwalo waye, o yua, kuenje o vĩhĩsua toke koñolosi."
Leviticus15:22 Kuenda u o lamba cimue caco eye a tumãlela o sukula uwalo waye, o yua kuenje o vĩhĩsua toke koñolosi."
Leviticus15:23 Kuenje ci kale kula, ci kale kocina cimue ukãi a tumãlẽle eci okuti a ci lamba, o vĩhĩsua toke koñolosi."
Leviticus15:24 Kuenje nda ulume o pekela laye leci cofuko ci kuata ulume waco, ulume o vĩhĩsua oloneke epanduvali, kuenda ovola osi ulume a pekailako a vĩhĩsua."
Leviticus15:25 Nda ukãi o kasi loku pita osonde oloneke via lua havotembo yofuko yayeko, pamue nda o kasi lokupita kumue kua piãla osimbu yofuko yaye, oloneke viosi ku pita eci cu vĩhĩsa o kala ndeci coloneke viofuko yaye; eye wa vĩhĩsua."
Leviticus15:26 Ovola osi a pekailako oloneke viosi viokupita kuaco o lingila ndula wofuko; kuenda evi viosi a tumayãla vi vĩhĩsua ndokuvĩhĩsua kuofuko yaye.
Leviticus15:27 Kuenje wosi o lamba kovina viaco o vĩhĩsa, oco o sukula uwalo waye, o yua, kuenje o vĩhĩsua toke koñolosi."
Leviticus15:28 Puãi nda ukãi o yelisua kokupita kuaco, oco o litendela oloneke epanduvali noke o yela."
Leviticus15:29 Oco keteke liecelãla o linyañuila olopomba vivali pamue ivuvu vivali violonende, kuenje o vi nena kocitunda kuvelo wombalaka yoku ñualehela la Yehova."
Leviticus15:30 Kuenje ocitunda ci lumba, yikuavo ndocilumba cekandu, yikuavo ndocilumba coku pia elisi; kuenje ocitunda cu likutilila kovaso a Yehova ha tuvika okupita kuaco kuo vĩhĩsa."
Leviticus15:31 Oco wu tepaisaila va Isareli kokuvĩhĩsua kuavo okuti ka va fi loku vĩhĩsua kuavo eci va vĩhĩsa otavernakulu yange yi kasi pokati kavo.
Leviticus15:32 Eci oco ocihandeleko cu o kasi lokupita kumue, lu olucito luaye lu tunda oco wa vĩhĩsua laco,"
Leviticus15:33 kuenda ukãi o kasi loku vela ofuko yaye, lomunu o kasi lokupita kumue, ci kale kulume, ci kale kukãi, kuenda u o pekela lu wa vĩhĩsa."
Leviticus16:1 Oco Yehova wa popia la Mose kovaso yokufa kuomãla vavali va Arone, eci vamẽla ku Yehova kuenje va fa."
Leviticus16:2 Yehova yu wa popia la Mose hati, Popia la huvove Arone huti, Oloneke viosi ka ci tava oku iñila vohondo yi kola vokati kongumbo, kovaso yomangu yohenda yi kasi kilu liocikasia, sanga o fa. Momo ame mõlẽhela velende kilu liomangu yohenda."
Leviticus16:3 Puãi Arone iyaiya mulo mu kola lovina evi: onale ndocilumba cekandu, lomanga ndocilumba coku pia elisi."
Leviticus16:4 O wala ocikutu ci kola covalatanya, lovikasãu viovalatanya vi waliwa ketimba, o litika luvia wovalatanya, o kapa ekofue liovalatanya; ovio vi linga uwalo waco u kola. O yua hã ha vi wala."
Leviticus16:5 Kuenje o tambula ku va Isareli ovitupi vivali violohombo vocilumba cekandu, kuenda omange yimue yi linga ocilumba coku pia elisi."
Leviticus16:6 Kuenje Arone o nena onale yaco yocilumba cekandu, oco caye, hã ha likutilila eye muẽle kuenda onjo yaye oku tuvika akandu avo."
Leviticus16:7 Oco o nyañula itupi vivali ha vi tumbika kovaso a Yehova kuvelo wombalaka yoku ñualehela la Yehova.
Leviticus16:8 Kuenda Arone imbilila olohombo viaco vivali ocela, ocela eci ca Yehova, ocela eci coku inasi."
Leviticus16:9 Oco Arone o nena ohombo eyi ocela ca wilila Yehova, o yi lumbila ndocilumba cekandu."
Leviticus16:10 Puãi ohombo ocela coku inasi ca kuatela, yi tumbikiwa lomuenyo kovaso a Yehova ha va likutililako, loku yi tuma kekalasoko oku yinasi."
Leviticus16:11 Kuenje Arone o nena onale yocilumba cekandu, oco caye muẽle, ha likutilila eye muẽle lonjo yaye oku tuvika akandu, kuenje ipaya onale yocilumba cekandu ca linga caye."
Leviticus16:12 Oco noke o nyañula ociyukilo ceyuka akãla ondalu a tunda kutala u kasi kovaso a Yehova. O nyañulavo apupu avali insensu vi kuete elemba liwa haivio via suliwa, ha vi tuala vokati kongumbo."
Leviticus16:13 O kapa insensu vondalu kovaso a Yehova, okuti evonge linsensu li sitika omangu yohenda yi kasi kilu liocikasia covisila, sanga o fa."
Leviticus16:14 O nyañula kamue kosonde yonale ha yi nyila lomuine waye komangu yohenda konẽle yokutundilo, kuenda kovaso yomangu yohenda o nyĩla osonde olonjanja epanduvali lomuine waye."
Leviticus16:15 Oco ipa ohombo yocilumba cekandu, oco comanu, ha nena osonde yaco vokati kongumbo oco o linga losonde yaco ndeci a lingile losonde yonale, hã ha yi nyila komangu yohenda kuenda kovaso yomangu yohenda."
Leviticus16:16 O likutilila ohombo yi kola oku tuvika evi vi vĩhĩsa va Isareli kuenda okulueya kuavo, okuti akandu avo osi. Haicovo a lingila ombalaka yoku ñualehela Yehova yina yi kasi pokati kavo, ndaño avĩho avo alua."
Leviticus16:17 Ka mu kala omunu vombalaka yoku ñualehela la Yehova eci Arone a iñilamo oku likutilila vohondo yi kola toke eci a tundamo, okuti wa likutilila eye muẽle lonjo yaye kuenda va Isareli vosi ha tuvika akandu avo."
Leviticus16:18 Noke o tundamo ha endi kutala u kasi kovaso a Yehova ho likutilila, kuenje o nyañula kamue kosonde yonale losonde yohombo ha yi kapi kolombinga viutala kolonẽle viosi."
Leviticus16:19 O nyilako osonde lomuine waye olonjanja epanduvali oku u yelisa loku u kolisa kokuvĩhĩsua kua va Isareli.
Leviticus16:20 Noke, eci a mãla oku likutilila ohombo yi kola kuenda ombalaka yoku ñualehela la Yehova, lutala, oco o nena ohombo yi kasi lomuenyo."
Leviticus16:21 Kuenje Arone imba ovaka aye, kavali kao, kutue wohombo yi kasi lomuenyo lia litavelelako olohole viosi via va Isareli, lokulueya kuavo kuosi, okuti akandu avo osi. Akandu avo osi o a kapa kutue wohombo yaco. Ohombo yaco yeciwa komunu wa tukuiwa ha ka yi tuala kekalasoko."
Leviticus16:22 Ohombo yi ambata kilu liayo olohole viavo viosi, yenda vekalasoko. Noke omunu waco o sia ohombo yaco vekalasoko."
Leviticus16:23 Kovaso yaco Arone iñila vombalaka yoku ñualehela la Yehova, o lula uwalo wovalatanya una a walele eci a iñilile vohondo yi kola, u solekamo."
Leviticus16:24 Noke o yuila vohondo yimue yi kola, o wala uwalo waye, o tunda ha lumbi ocilumba caye coku pia elisi kuenda ocilumba comanu coku pia elisi, ha likutilila eye muẽle kuenda omanu."
Leviticus16:25 Ulela wocilumba cekandu u yokela kutala.
Leviticus16:26 U wa ka tuale ohombo yambata akandu, eci a tiuka o sukula uwalo waye, o yua, kuenje oco ci tava noke oku iñila vocilombo."
Leviticus16:27 Onale yocilumba cekandu kuenda ohombo yocilumba cekandu, osonde yavio ya neniwa vohondo yi kola oku tuvika, vi upiwa kocilombo via tualiwa kofeka. Ovipa viavio, lositu yavio kuenda aniña avio vi yokiwa londalu."
Leviticus16:28 U o vi yoka o sukula uwalo waye, noke o yua, oco a iñila noke vocilombo."
Leviticus16:29 Oco ci linga ocisila cene cenda hũ cokuti vosãi yepanduvali, keteke liekui kosãi, wu likandangiya okulia kuenje ka vu lingi upange umue, ci kale olonyitiwe, ci kale ovingendeleyi via tunga pokati kene."
Leviticus16:30 Momo keteke liaco vo likutilila oku tuvika, ho yelisiwi. Vu yelisiwa kakandu ene osi kovaso a Yehova."
Leviticus16:31 Eteke liaco li linga esambata liowusa u kola pokati kene, kuenje vu likandangiya okulia. Ci linga ocisila cenda hũ."
Leviticus16:32 Ocitunda ci wavekiwa ha cihĩwa ocikundi oku linga ocitunda komangu ya isiaye, eye o likutilila oku tuvika, o wala uwalo wovalatanya haiwo uwalo u kola."
Leviticus16:33 Ci likutilila ohondo yi kola, ci likutilila ombalaka yoku ñualẽhẽla la Yehova kuenda utala; ci likutilila ovitunda kuenda omanu vosi, oku tuvika akandu."
Leviticus16:34 Ci linga ocisila cene ci kala ño hũ coku likutilila va Isareli oku tuvika akandu avo osi onjanja yimosi vunyamo. Kuenje Mose wa linga ndeci Yehova a sapuila.
Leviticus17:1 Oco Yehova wa popia la Mose hati,"
Leviticus17:2 Popia la Arone kuenda omãla vaye la va Isareli vosi huti, Ca tuma Yehova okuti ci lingiwa ceci:"
Leviticus17:3 Nda umue ukuepata lia Isareli ipalela ongombe pamue okameme pamue ohombo vocilombo, pamue o yipalela kofeka,"
Leviticus17:4 puãi ka yi nena kuvelo wombalaka yoku ñualẽhẽla la Yehova oku yi lumbila ku Yehova ndocilumba kovaso yotavernakulu ya Yehova, omunu waco o pia eko liosonde momo wa pesela osonde. Omunu waco o tepiwa ku vakuavo."
Leviticus17:5 Ci lingiwa okuti va Isareli va nena nena ku Yehova ovilumba viavo vina va vipãlela vusenge waño. Va vi nene kocitunda kuvelo wombalaka yoku ñualehela la Yehova. Va vi lumba ku Yehova ndocitundasonde combembua.
Leviticus17:6 Kuenje ocitunda ci nyila osonde yaco kutala wa Yehova kuvelo wombalaka yoku ñualẽhẽla la Yehova. Ulela waco cu yoka ha ci lingi elemba li pepa ku Yehova.
Leviticus17:7 Oco ka va lumbila vali ovilumba viavo kolondele, oku linga lavio ukahonga. Cilo ci linga ocisila cavo cenda hũ kovitumbulukila viavo viosi."
Leviticus17:8 Va sapuila huti, Omunu wosi ukuepata lia Isareli pamue kovingendeleyi via tunga pokati kavo, o lumba ocilumba coku pia elisi pamue ocitundasonde,"
Leviticus17:9 puãi ka ci nena kuvelo wombalaka yoku ñualehela la Yehova ha ci lumbi ku Yehova, omunu waco o tepiwa ku vakuavo."
Leviticus17:10 Omunu wosi ukuepata lia Isareli pamue kovingendeleyi via tunga pokati kavo, o lia osonde, nda ye nda ye, nyumalĩsila ocipala cange komunu waco o lia osonde kuenje ndu tepisa ku vakuavo."
Leviticus17:11 Momo omuenyo wetimba u kasi vosonde kuenje nda yecela kokuene kutala oku likutilila layo ovimuenyo viene, omo osonde oyo yi tuvaika momo oyo yi kuete omuenyo."
Leviticus17:12 Oco nda popia la va Isareli siti, lomue pokati kene ka ka lie osonde, ndaño ocingendeleyi ca tunga pokati kene ka ci ka lie osonde."
Leviticus17:13 Kuenje omunu wosi u Isareli pamue kocingendeleyi cosi ca tunga pokati ka va Isareli, nda poku yeva o kuata ocinyama vonjevo pamue onjila, evi vi tava oku liwa, osonde yaco o yi pesela kuenje o yi lembika leve."
Leviticus17:14 Momo omuenyo watimba osi osonde yao. Oco nda popela la va Isareli siti, Ko ka li osonde yetimba, nda lie nda lie, momo omuenyo watimba osi osonde yao, wosi o yi lia o tepiwa ku vakuavo."
Leviticus17:15 Omunu wosi o lia eci ca lifila pamue ceci ca kuatiwa locinyama, ci kale onyitiwe yofeka, ci kale ocingendeleyi, o sukula uwalo waye, o yua kuenje o vĩhĩsua toke koñolosi; oco a yela noke."
Leviticus17:16 Puãi nda ka sukula uwalo pamue ka yui, o kala ño longole yaye."
Leviticus18:1 Yehova wa popia la Mose hati,"
Leviticus18:2 Popia la va Isareli huti, ame ndi Yehova Suku yene."
Leviticus18:3 Oco ka ci tava ene oku linga ndeci va Egito, oko wa tungili, va lingainga; ka ci tavavo ene ku linga ndeci va Kanana omu ñasi oku u tuali, va lingainga. Ka ci tava oku lingainga ovisila viavo."
Leviticus18:4 Ovihõlo viange lovisila viange ovio vu lingainga loku tẽlisa loku endaenda lavio. Ame ndi Yehova Suku yene.
Leviticus18:5 Oco vu tẽlisa ovisila viange lovihõlo viange, ame ndi Yehova. Omunu wosi o vi lingainga o kuata lavio omuenyo."
Leviticus18:6 Lomue kokuene ka ka kokele ocipepi lu ositue laye ho sikũlũla ha kala epõlõla; ame ndi Yehova.
Leviticus18:7 So ku ko sikũlũle ndaño nyõho, ha kala epõlõla, momo nda ca lomboloka okuti wa sikũlũla nyõho; ku ka sikũlũle nyõho ha kala epõlõla."
Leviticus18:8 Ukãi waso ku ko sikũlũle ha kala epõlõla; epõlõla liaye epõlõla liaso.
Leviticus18:9 Mukãi wove, omõla aso pamue omõla a nyõho, nda wa citiwa vimbo liaye, nda wa citiwa kumue kuiñi, ku ka va sikũlũle ha va kala epõlõla."
Leviticus18:10 Onekulu yove yukãi, omõla omõlove ulume pamue omõla omõlove ukãi, ku ka va sikũlũle ha va kala epõlõla. Epõlõla liavo hailio epõlõla liove muẽle."
Leviticus18:11 Omõla a nyõha yokatumba, wa citiwa laso haeye mukãi wove, ku ko sikũlũle ha kala epõlõla."
Leviticus18:12 Sohãyi yove mukãi waso ku ko sikũlũle ha kala epõlõla, momo eye ngandi aso."
Leviticus18:13 Nyõho yumalẽhe ku ko sikũlũle ha kala epõlõla, momo eye ngandi a nyõho."
Leviticus18:14 So yumalẽhe ku ko sikũlũle ha kala epõlõla, ku ka kokele kukãi waye momo nyõho muẽle."
Leviticus18:15 Ndatembo yove ku ko sikũlũle ha kala epõlõla; eye ukãi womõlove; ku ko sikũlũle ha kala epõlõla.
Leviticus18:16 Ukãi wa manjove ku ko sikũlũle ha kala epõlõla momo epõlõla liaye epõlõla liamanjove.
Leviticus18:17 Ukãi kuenda omõlaye ukãi ku ka va sikũlũle ha va kala epõlõla; ku ka tambule onekulu yaye yukãi, okuti omõla omõlaye ulume pamue omõla omõlaye ukãi oku u sikũlũla ha kala epõlõla; momo ovo vangandiaye, ci kola calua."
Leviticus18:18 Ku ka kuele oluvale ukãi la manjaye, ha va lingi olosepakãi, okuti ove o sikũlũla umue ha kala epõlõla osimbu ukuavo a kasi lomuenyo."
Leviticus18:19 Ku ka kokele kukãi hu sikũlũla ha kala epõlõla, osimbu a kasi lofuko yaye yu wa vĩhĩsua."
Leviticus18:20 Ku ka pekele kukãi wokuene hu livĩhĩsa laye.
Leviticus18:21 Ku ka ece omãla vove oku va imba vondalu ya Moleke, ku ka same onduko ya Suku yove; ame ndi Yehova."
Leviticus18:22 Ku ka pekele lulume ndeci va pekela lukãi, oco umbondo."
Leviticus18:23 Ku ka pekele locinyama oku livĩhĩsa laco. Ukãi ka ka talame kovaso ocinyama ha pekelisua laco, oco oku sama."
Leviticus18:24 Ko ka livĩhĩsi lovina evi viosi, momo olofeka evi ñasi loku tundisa kovaso ene ovio ovina va livĩhĩsa lavio."
Leviticus18:25 Oco ofeka ya vĩhĩsa okuti nda yi yambuila ongole yayo kuenda ofeka yi sanja olonungi viayo.
Leviticus18:26 Ene puãi vu lingainga ovisila viange lovihõlo viange, kuenje ko lingainga ovina evi viumbondo, ci kale onyitiwe yofeka, ci kale ocingendeleyi ca tunga pokati kene."
Leviticus18:27 Momo omanu va livanga oku tunga vofeka va linga umbondo waco wosi kuenje ofeka ya vĩhĩsua.
Leviticus18:28 Ene puãi ko ka lingaingi ovina viumbondo sanga, eci vu yi vĩhĩsa, ofeka yi vu sanja ndeci ya sanja omanu vaco va kalale osimbu ene ka weyili."
Leviticus18:29 Momo vosi va linga cimue covina evi viumbondo, ava muẽle va vi linga, va tepiwa ku vakuavo."
Leviticus18:30 Oco patekeli ocikundi cange kuenda ko ka lingi cimue colombilo evi viumbondo va vi lingaila konyima yene, ko ka livĩhĩsi lavio. Ame ndi Yehova Suku yene."
Leviticus19:1 Oco Yehova wa popia la Mose hati,"
Leviticus19:2 Popia la va Isareli vosi, huti, Ene u koli momo ame ndi Yehova Suku yene ñola."
Leviticus19:3 Vosi omunu omunu a sumbile inaye la isiaye, kuenda vu kolisa asambata ange. Ame ndi Yehova Suku yene."
Leviticus19:4 Ko ka sokolokeli kovina viaño pamue oku lilulikila olosuku viutale wa itilua. Ame ndi Yehova Suku yene.
Leviticus19:5 Nda wu lumba ocitundasonde combembua ku Yehova ci lumbi ndomo cu taviwila.
Leviticus19:6 Ci liwe eteke wu ci lumba kuenda vali ko hẽla yaco. Nda cimue ci sialapo toke keteke liatatu, ci yokiwa londalu."
Leviticus19:7 Nda kamue ka liwa keteke liatatu, ndaño katito, ci lingisa onyanya, ka ci taviwa."
Leviticus19:8 Kuenje wosi o liako enda longole yaye momo wa sama kueci ci kola ca Yehova. Lomunu waco o tepiwa ku vakuavo.
Leviticus19:9 Kuenje eci wunguli olomema viofeka yene, ku kongule pe kavindi epia liove, kuenda vali ku ka nolũle olomupuluila violomema viove."
Leviticus19:10 Ku ka pupulule vocumbo cove cayuva; ku kongolole epako liocumbo cove cayuva lia lokila posi, o vi silapo osuke ocingendeleyi. Ame ndi Yehova Suku yene."
Leviticus19:11 Ko ka ivi; ko ka liañi; ko ka likembi pokati kene.
Leviticus19:12 Ko ka lisingi londuko yange loku kemba, loku sama onduko ya Suku yove. Ame ndi Yehova."
Leviticus19:13 Ku ka talise ohali u o lisingue love, pamue oku u punda. Ofeto yukuopange ka yi ka kale love uteke wosi toke komẽle."
Leviticus19:14 Ku ka siñale ocisitatuĩ; ku ka imbile ocilondokua kovaso omeke; puãi sumbila Suku yove. Ame ndi Yehova.
Leviticus19:15 Ko ka tetuluili oku pengisa; ko ka sumbili ocipala cosuke, ku ka kemainye ocipala cekope; puãi tetuluila ukuẽle lesunga."
Leviticus19:16 Ku ka endaende pokati ka vakuẽle loku endisa olombonde. Ku ka lundile ukuẽle huti, Wa pia osonde. Ame ndi Yehova."
Leviticus19:17 Ku ka suvukile ukuẽle vutima wove; ocili o lemẽla u o lisungue love, puãi ku ka lituike ekandu liaye."
Leviticus19:18 Ku ka fetuluinye, ku ka kale locikumbiti cokomãla vofeka yove; sola puãi u o lisungue love ndeci o lisola ove muẽle. Ame ndi Yehova."
Leviticus19:19 Patekela ovisila viange. Ku ka tave okuti ovinyama viove vi cita lombuto yiñi. Ku ka kũle pamuamue vepia liove olombuto vivali viocitengasova. Ku ka wale onanga ya tutiwa lovina vivali via tengiwa apumumu.
Leviticus19:20 Kuenje nda umue o pekelisa ukãi upika wa lombiwa lulume, ka yowiwile, ka vo panduluile, ondaka yavo yi sokiyiwe, ka va ka ipaiwe omo ukãi ka kaile omamãle."
Leviticus19:21 Ulume a nene ku Yehova ocilumba caye ceko kuvelo wombalaka yoku ñualehela la Yehova, oco omanga ndocilumba ceko."
Leviticus19:22 Oco ocitunda cu likutilila kovaso a Yehova lomanga yocilumba ceko ha tuvika ekandu liaye a linga, kuenje ekandu a linga liu wecelua."
Leviticus19:23 Eci wiñili vofeka kuenda wu kũla oviti violombuto viosi viokulia, apako ofeka yaco a lemeliwa kokuene, a lemeliwa muẽle anyamo atatu. Ka ci tava oku a lia."
Leviticus19:24 Puãi kunyamo wakuãla apako osi ofeka yaco a kola, a linge ocilumba cesivayo ku Yehova."
Leviticus19:25 Puãi kunyamo watãlo ci tava ño oku lia apako aco oco oviti viu wimili ca velapo. Ame ndi Yehova Suku yene.
Leviticus19:26 Ko ka li cimue losonde yaco. Ko ka lingi vakuombanda, ndaño oku sumbila owima."
Leviticus19:27 Ko ka pemũli avindi ovitue viene; ko ka salũli avindi olonjele viove.
Leviticus19:28 Ko ka litandi katimba ene nda umue wene wa fa. Ko ka litisi olombumba katimba ene. Ame ndi Yehova.
Leviticus19:29 Ku ka samise omõlove ukãi hu lingisa ocipuepue, sanga ofeka yi tiama kukahonga, ha yi yuka evĩho."
Leviticus19:30 Wu lava asambata ange kuenda oku sumbila ocitumãlo cange ci kola. Ame ndi Yehova.
Leviticus19:31 Ko ka tiami ku vakuakusingila pamue ku vakuakutãha; ko ka va sandi okuti we livihisa lavo. Ame ndi Yehova Suku yene.
Leviticus19:32 Votokela kovaso u o kuete owele, sumbila ocipala cekongo; sumbila Suku yove. Ame ndi Yehova."
Leviticus19:33 Nda ocingendeleyi ci tunga love vofeka yove, ku ka ci linge lãvi."
Leviticus19:34 Ocingendeleyi ca tunga lene ci kale lene ndonyitiwe pokati kene, kuenda vu u sola ndeci vu lisola ene muẽle, momo lenevo wa kaili ovingendeleyi vofeka ye Egito. Ame ndi Yehova Suku yene."
Leviticus19:35 Ko ka pengisi esunga poku seteka usõvi lo poku pesalisa, ndaño poku yonga."
Leviticus19:36 Olombalãsa viocili, olonjongo viocili, efa liocili, kuenda ohine yocili, ovio vu kala lavio. Ame ndi Yehova Suku yene ndo wupi vofeka ye Egito."
Leviticus19:37 Oco wu limbuka ovisila viange viosi kuenda ovihõlo viange viosi ho vi lingaingi. Ame ndi Yehova.
Leviticus20:1 Yehova wa popia la Mose hati,"
Leviticus20:2 Sapuila va Isareli huti, Nda ci kala elie nda elie pokati ka va Isareli, pamue pokati kovingendeleyi via tunga vo Isareli, okuti eca omãla vaye ku Moleke, omunu waco ipaiwa muẽle; omanu vakuafeka vo sosola lovawe."
Leviticus20:3 Lamevo nyumãlĩsila ocipala cange komunu waco, ndu tepa ku vakuavo, momo wa eca omãla vaye ku Moleke, wa vĩhĩsa ocitumãlo cange ci kola kuenje wa sama onduko yange yi kola."
Leviticus20:4 Kuenje nda omanu vakuafeka vo patela ovaso avo omunu waco, eci a eca omãla vaye ku Moleke kuenje ka vo wipaila,"
Leviticus20:5 oco ame muẽle nyumãlĩsila ocipala cange omunu waco kuenda epata liavo, ndu tepa ku vakuavo eye muẽle kuenda ava vosi vo kuama ha va lingi vakuokahonga, oku linga la Moleke ukahonga."
Leviticus20:6 Nda omunu waco o tiamẽla ku vakuakusingila, kuenda ku vakuakutãha, ha lingi lavo ukahonga, nyumãlĩsila omunu waco ocipala cange, ndu tepa ku vakuavo."
Leviticus20:7 Oco liyelisi ho koli, omo ame ndi Yehova Suku yene."
Leviticus20:8 Patekeli ovisila viange loku vi lingainga. Ame ndi Yehova ndukuaku u kolisi.
Leviticus20:9 Omo wosi o siñala isiaye pamue inaye eye ipaiwa muẽle; u wa siñala isiaye pamue inaye oco osonde yaye yu vata.
Leviticus20:10 Nda ulume o pekela lukãi wokuavo, lulume kuenda ukãi kavali kavo vakuovaisi, va ipaiwa muẽle."
Leviticus20:11 Ulume o pekela lukãi wa isiaye ca lomboloka okuti wa sikũlũla isiaye ha kala epõlõla, kavali kavo va ipaiwa muẽle; osonde yavo yi va wila."
Leviticus20:12 Nda ulume o pekela lukãi womolaye kavali kavo va ipaiwa muẽle; va linga akutisasõi; osonde yavo yi va wila.
Leviticus20:13 Nda ulume o pekelisa ulume ndeci ukãi, kavali kavo va linga umbondo; va ipaiwa muẽle; osonde yavo yi va wila."
Leviticus20:14 Nda ulume o nyañula ukãi la inaco, oco evĩho li kola; va yokiwe londalu, eye lovo, oco ka pa ka kale pokati kene evĩho li kola."
Leviticus20:15 Nda ulume o pekela locinyama ipaiwa muẽle; wipayivo ocinyama caco.
Leviticus20:16 Nda ukãi amẽla kocinyama hã ha pekela laco, wipayi ukãi kuenda ocinyama caco, va ipaiwa muẽle; osonde yavo yi va wila."
Leviticus20:17 Nda ulume o nyañula mukãi waye, omõla a isiaye pamue omõla a inaye, hã ho tali eci a kasi epõlõla, leye ukãi ho talivo eci a kasi epõlõla, oco ci linga osõi; kuenje va tepiwa kovaso omãla vakuavo; wa sikũlũla mukãi waye ha kala epõlõla; o kala ño longole yaye."
Leviticus20:18 Nda ulume o pekela lukãi o kasi lofuko, ho sikũlũla ha kala epõlõla eye wa sikũlũla ono yaye, kuenda ukãi wa sikũlũla ono yosonde yaye: kavali kavo va tepiwa ku vakuavo."
Leviticus20:19 Ku ka sikũlũle manja nyoho ha kala epõlõla, ndaño sohayi yove manja so; momo wa sikũlũla ngandiaye; va kala ño longole yavo."
Leviticus20:20 Nda ulume o pekela lukãi waisiaye yumãlẽhe wa sikũlũla isiaye ha kala epõlõla; va ambata ekandu liavo; va fa, lomõla mbu."
Leviticus20:21 Nda ulume o nyañula ukãi wamanjaye, oco ca vĩha; wa sikũlũla manjaye ha kala epõlõla; ka va mõli omõla."
Leviticus20:22 Oco patekeli ovisila viange viosi lovihõlo viange viosi ho vi lingaingi, sanga ofeka oko ndu tuali oku tungamo yu sanji."
Leviticus20:23 Ko ka endaendi lolombilo viavakuafeka ndi va tundisila kovaso ene, momo va lingaile ovina evi viosi, oco va ndingisa onyanya."
Leviticus20:24 Puãi nda popia lene siti, Wu piñala ofeka yavo, kuenda ndi yeca kokuene ho yi fuki, ofeka yi tumõha lasenjele lowiki. Ame ndi Yehova Suku yene ndo punguli kolofeka."
Leviticus20:25 Oco, tepisi pokati kocinyama ci yela leci ca liña, pokati kolonjila via liña levi vi yela, kuenje ko ka vĩhĩsi ovimuenyo viene lumbondo wocinyama, pamue onjila pamue levi viñi vi likoka posi, nda vi tepisa kokuene siti via liña."
Leviticus20:26 Oco ene wu linga vange, wu kola, momo ame ndi Yehova ñola, ndo tepisi kolofeka ho lingi vange."
Leviticus20:27 Kuenda vali ulume pamue ukãi ukuakusingila, pamue ukuakutãha, ipaiwa muẽle; va va sosole lovawe; osonde yavo yi va wila."
Leviticus21:1 Oco Yehova wa popia la Mose hati, Popia lovitunda omãla va Arone. Popia lavo huti, Lumue a limbe koku livĩhĩsa omo pokati kepata liaye pa fa umue,"
Leviticus21:2 te nda ngandiaye muẽle yo ndõ, pamue inaye, pamue isiaye, pamue omõlaye ulume, pamue omõlaye, ukãi, pamue manjaye ulume."
Leviticus21:3 Kuenda mukãi waye ufeko o kasi ocipepi laye omo ka kasi lulume, nda eye o fa ci tava oku livihisa."
Leviticus21:4 Eye ka ka livihise ha lisepuisa, omo haeye ukulu pokati kavakuavo."
Leviticus21:5 Ka va ka lipemũle asenya kovitue viavo, ka va ka pemũle avindi olonjele viavo, pamue oku litanda katimba avo."
Leviticus21:6 Va kola ku Suku yavo, ka va ka same onduko ya Suku yavo; momo ovo vakuakulumbila ovilumba via Yehova viovondalu, haivio okulia kua Suku yavo; oco va kola."
Leviticus21:7 Ka va ka kuele ukai okahonga, pamue yu wa sepula; ndaño ukãi wa nyaliwa la veyaye ka va ko kuele; omo eye ocitunda o kola ku Suku yaye."
Leviticus21:8 Ove u kolisa momo o lumba lumba okulia kua Suku yove; kokuove eye o kola, momo ame ndi Yehova ndukuaku u kolisa, haime ñola."
Leviticus21:9 Kuenda omõla ocitunda ukãi nda o lisepuisa loku linga ukahonga, ca lomboloka okuti wa sepuisa isiaye; a yokiwe londalu."
Leviticus21:10 Ocitunda ci kasi ndukulu pokati kavamanjaye, okuti kutue waye kua itilua ulela woku waveka, haeye ihiwa ocikundi okuti o tẽla oku wala uwalo waco, ka ka salũlũle ocifuko cokutue waye, ka ka kesule uwalo waye;"
Leviticus21:11 ka ka ende kocivimbi, ka ka livĩhĩsile ndaño isiaye pamue inaye;"
Leviticus21:12 ka ka tunde vocitumãlo ci kola oku sama ocitumãlo ci kola ca Suku yaye; momo ocifuto culela wokuwaveka kua Suku yaye ci kasi kokuaye. Ame ndi Yehova.
Leviticus21:13 A kuele ufeko wosombo.
Leviticus21:14 Ukãi ocimbumba, ndaño u wa nyaliwa, pamue ukãi wa sepuka haeye okahonga ka ka va kuele; puãi a kuele ufeko wosombo ukuepata liavo."
Leviticus21:15 Ka ka sepuise ombuto yaye pokati kavakuavo. Momo ame ndi Yehova ndu kolisa.
Leviticus21:16 Oco Yehova wa popia la Mose hati,"
Leviticus21:17 Popia la Arone huti, Wosi omunu ukuambuto yove kovitumbulukila viavo viosi, nda elie nda elie, o kasi letondelo, ka ka ame ocipepi oku lumba okulia kua Suku yaye."
Leviticus21:18 Momo omunu wosi, nda elie nda elie, o kasi letondelo ka ka ame; ndeci omeke, pamue ocilema, pamue u o kasi lenyũlu lia tuwa ondimba, pamue o kasi leci ca vandekako,"
Leviticus21:19 pamue waco wa kumbuka omãi, pamue wa kumbuka eka,"
Leviticus21:20 pamue ukuañoño, pamue okaholototo, pamue u o kasi lonende viso, pamue u o kuete ocimumusu, pamue ovingupi, pamue o kasi lapuãla a tuika."
Leviticus21:21 Lomue ukuambuto ya Arone ocitunda o kuete etondelo ka ka ame oku lumba ovilumba via Yehova viovondalu. Omo o kuete etondelo oco ka ka amẽle oku lumba okulia kua Suku yaye.
Leviticus21:22 O lia ño okulia kua Suku yaye, nda eci ci kola enene nda eci ci sule."
Leviticus21:23 Cinene lika, ka ka iñile kongumbo, ka ka amẽle kutala omo o kasi letondelo, sanga o sama ovitumãlo viange vi kola. Momo ame ndi Yehova ndi va kolisa."
Leviticus21:24 Haico Mose a popia la Arone kuenda omãla vaye la va Isareli vosi.
Leviticus22:1 Yehova yu wa popia la Mose hati,"
Leviticus22:2 Sapuila Arone lomãla vaye okuti va litepa lovina vi kola via va Isareli, vina va tumbika kokuange okuti ka va sami onduko yange yi kola. Ame ndi Yehova."
Leviticus22:3 Popia lavo huti, Wosi omunu ukuambuto yene yosi kovitumbulukila viene viosi, nda elie nda elie, amẽla kovina vi kola, evi va Isareli va tumbika ku Yehova, osimbu a vĩhĩsua, omunu waco o tepiwa kovaso ange. Ame ndi Yehova."
Leviticus22:4 Omunu wosi ukuambuto ya Arone, nda elie nda elie, ukuavilundu pamue yu o pita cimue ketimba, ka ka lie kovina vi kola toke o yelisua. Ndaño u o lamba cimue ca vĩhĩsua locivimbi, pamue ulume olucito luaye luo tunda;"
Leviticus22:5 pamue wosi o lamba cimue ci likoka posi ci tẽla oku u vĩhĩsa, pamue omunu o tela oku u vĩhĩsa, okuvĩhĩsua kuaye nda kue nda kue;"
Leviticus22:6 u o lamba cimue ca soka ndeci o vĩhĩsua toke koñolosi, oco ka ka lie kovina vi kola te nda wa yua vovava."
Leviticus22:7 Kuenje eci ekumbi liñila oco a yela; noke oco a lia kovina vi kola, momo ovio okulia kuaye."
Leviticus22:8 Eci ca lifila oco muẽle pamue ceci ca kuatiwa locinyama ka ka ci lie ha lĩvĩhisa laco. Ame ndi Yehova.
Leviticus22:9 Oco va patekele ocikundi cange, sanga va kala longole yovina viaco kuenje va fa laco nda va ci sama. Ame ndi Yehova ndukuaku va kolisa."
Leviticus22:10 Lomue ocingendeleyi ka ka lie eci ci kola; ukombe wocitunda, pamue ukuopange waye, ka ka lie kueci ci kola."
Leviticus22:11 Puãi nda ocitunda ci landa omunu loseo yolombongo viaye, omunu waco o lialiako; kuenda ava va citiwila konjo yaye va lialia kokulia kuaye."
Leviticus22:12 Nda omõla ocitunda ukãi o likuela locingendeleyi, ka ka lie kovilumba viovina vi kola."
Leviticus22:13 Puãi nda omõla ocitunda ukãi o kasi ocimbumba, pamue wa nyaliwa kuenda ka kuete omõla yu wa tiukila kepata lie isiaye ndeci vufeko, eye o tẽla oku lialia okulia kua isiaye. Puãi ocingendeleyi ka ci ka lieko."
Leviticus22:14 Kuenje nda omunu o lia lonumbi kueci ci kola, o vandekako onepa yatãlo loku eca kocitunda eci ci kola."
Leviticus22:15 Ovitunda ka vi ka samise ovina vi kola via va Isareli vina vi va lumbaila ku Yehova,"
Leviticus22:16 sanga vi va vetisa ekandu leko eci va lia ovina viavo vi kola. Momo ame ndi Yehova ndukuaku va kolisa.
Leviticus22:17 Oco Yehova wa popia la Mose hati,"
Leviticus22:18 Popia la Arone lomãla vaye kuenda va Isareli vosi huti, Eci umue ukuepata lia Isareli, pamue ocingendeleyi vi Isareli, a nena ocilumba caye, ci kale colohuminyo, ci kale cocipango, vina va lumbila ku Yehova ndocilumba coku pia elisi,"
Leviticus22:19 a nene eci culume ka ci kuete etondelo, pamue colongombe pamue colomeme pamue colohombo, oco ci taviwa."
Leviticus22:20 Ka ci tava oku lumba eci ci kuete etondelo, omo ka cu taviwila."
Leviticus22:21 Eci umue a lumba ku Yehova ocitundasonde combembua ha tẽlisa ohuminyo yaye, pamue o lumba ocilumba cocipango, ci kale ongombe, ci kale omeme pamue ohombo, ocinyama caco ci ñuaime oco ci taviwa; ka ci ka kale letondelo."
Leviticus22:22 Ovinyama viupeke pamue vievi via teka pamue viovinimbaile, pamue vievi vi kasi lovipumbu, pamue vievi vi kuete olohala, pamue vievi vi kuete ovingupi, ko ka vi lumbi ku Yehova, pamue oku vi nena ku Yehova ndocilumba covondalu kilu liutala."
Leviticus22:23 Onale pamue omeme yi kasi locimatamata cimue ca vandekako pamue ca kambapo, oku yi lumba ocilumba cocipango, ci tava, puãi oku yi lumba ocilumba cohuminyo ka ci tava."
Leviticus22:24 Ocinyama ci kasi lapuãla a punyulũha pamue a sasõha pamue a tuika pamue a tetiwa, ka ci tava oku ci lumba ku Yehova vofeka yene."
Leviticus22:25 Ovinyama via lemãla ndomo, haivio via landiwa kukualofeka, laviovo ka ci tava oku vi lumba ndokulia kua Suku yene. Omo uvi wavio haimo u kasi omo vi kuete etondelo, oco ka viu taviwi."
Leviticus22:26 Yehova yu wa popia la Mose hati,"
Leviticus22:27 Eci onale pamue omeme pamue ohombo yi citiwa, yi kala la inaco oloneke epanduvali. Oco tunde keteke liecelãla kuenje kovaso yaco yi taviwa oku lumba ndocilumba covondalu ku Yehova."
Leviticus22:28 Kuenje ndaño onjindi yongombe pamue omange yomeme ka yipaiwaila kumuamue lomõlaco okuti kavali kavio keteke liongongo.
Leviticus22:29 Eci wu lumbila Yehova ocilumba colopandu, wu lumba ndeci ci taviwa."
Leviticus22:30 Keteke liaco hailio ci liwa. Ko ka yumbuli cimue toke komẽle. Ame ndi Yehova.
Leviticus22:31 Oco wu patekela ovihandeleko viange ho vi lingaingi. Ame ndi Yehova.
Leviticus22:32 Ko ka sami onduko yange yi kola, ame puãi ñolisua pokati ka va Isareli. Ame ndi Yehova ndu kolisi,"
Leviticus22:33 ndo wupi kofeka ye Egito si lingi Suku yene. Ame ndi Yehova.
Leviticus23:1 Oco Yehova wa popia la Mose hati,"
Leviticus23:2 Sapuila va Isareli huti, Olofesta via Yehova vina via tukuiwa haivio vi lingaiwa lefendelo li kola, okuti ovio olofesta viange via tukuiwa, vievi:"
Leviticus23:3 Oloneke epandu wu linga upange. Puãi eteke liepanduvali olio esambata liowusa u kola, eteke liaco ku kala efendelo li kola. Ka ci tava oku lingamo upange omo olio esambata lia Yehova volonjo viene viosi."
Leviticus23:4 Olofesta via Yehova vina via tukuiwa vi lingiwa lefendelo li kola koloneke via vi tukuiwila. Olofesta viaco vievi:
Leviticus23:5 Kosãi yatete, keteke liekui lakuãla kosãi koñolosi ku kala o Pascoa ya Yehova."
Leviticus23:6 Keteke liekui latãlo kõsai yaco haiyo ku kala ofesta ya Yehova yombolo ka yi kuete etumbisa. Oloneke epanduvali wu lia ombolo ka yi kuete etumbisa.
Leviticus23:7 Keteke liatete ku kala efendelo li kola. Veteke liaco ka ci tava oku lingamo upange wovaka.
Leviticus23:8 Oloneke epanduvali wu lumba lumba ku Yehova ocilumba covondalu. Keteke liepanduvali ku kala efendelo li kola. Veteke liaco ka ci tava oku lingamo upange wovaka.
Leviticus23:9 Yehova yu wa popia la Mose hati,"
Leviticus23:10 Sapuila va Isareli huti, Eci wiyi vofeka ndu wihi ho unguli olomema viaco, wu nena kocitunda ocitungu covaima atete koku ungula kuene."
Leviticus23:11 Ocitunda ci yangelisa ocitungu kovaso a Yehova okuti vu taviwa. Keteke lia kuama esambata ocitunda ci ci yangelisa.
Leviticus23:12 Oco veteke wu yangelisa ocitungu wu lumba okameme kulume kunyamo umosi, aka ka ka kuete etondelo, ka linga ocilumba coku pia elisi coku Yehova."
Leviticus23:13 Oco ocilumba caco colomema ci kale olonepa vivali viekui viefa liosema ya fina ya tengiwa lulela, ci linga ocilumba covondalu coku Yehova, ndelemba li pepa; ocilumba caco coku nyua ci kale covinyu, onepa yakuãla yohine."
Leviticus23:14 Ko ka li ombolo pamue olukango pamue olomema vi talala toke keteke liaco, te wa neni ocilumba ku Suku yene; oco ocisila cenda hũ kovitumbulukila viene lovolonjo viene viosi."
Leviticus23:15 Oco wu tenda asambata epanduvali oku awisa tunde keteke liaco lia kuama esambata, tunde keteke wa neni ocitungu cocilumba coku yangelisa,"
Leviticus23:16 toke keteke lia kuama esambata liepanduvali, oco wu tenda akuĩ atãlo koloneke, kuenje wu lumbila ku Yehova ocilumba colomema viokaliye."
Leviticus23:17 Wu tundi volonjo viene loku nena olombolo vivali vioku yangelisa, haivio vi tungiwa lolonepa vivali viekui viefa; vi kale viosema ya fina, vi yokiwe letumbisa ndovaima atete a lumbiwa ku Yehova."
Leviticus23:18 Kumue lolombolo viaco weci otumeme epanduvali tunyamo umosi ka tu kuete etondelo, lonale yimosi kuenda ovitupi vivali violomeme, vi linga ocilumba coku pia elisi coku Yehova, kumue locilumba cavio colomema kuenda ovilumba viavio vioku nyua, ocilumba covondalu celemba li pepa ku Yehova."
Leviticus23:19 Kuenje wu lumba ocitupi cimuamue cohombo ocilumba cekandu, lotumeme tuvali tualume tunyamo umosi, ocitundasonde combembua."
Leviticus23:20 Kuenje ocitunda ci vi yangelisila kumuamue lolombolo viovaima atete ndocilumba coku yangelisa kovaso a Yehova, kumue lotumeme tuaco tuvali: vi kola ku Yehova, vi tiamẽla kocitunda."
Leviticus23:21 Oco keteke liaco hailio wu imbi oluiya. Ku kala efendelo liomanu vosi. Veteke liaco ka ci tava oku lingamo upange wovaka. Oco ocisila cenda ño volonjo viene viosi kovitumbulukila viene viosi.
Leviticus23:22 Eci wu ungula olomema viofeka yene ku ka pupulule pe pavindi epia liove, ku ka nolũle olomupuluila violomema viove; o vi silapo osuke kuenda ocingendeleyi. Ame ndi Yehova Suku yene."
Leviticus23:23 Yehova yu wa popia la Mose hati,"
Leviticus23:24 Sapuila va Isareli, huti, Kosãi yepanduvali keteke liatete liosãi yaco ku kala owusa u kola. Eteke liaco li linga lionjivaluko. Onjivaluko yaco yi lalekiwa lolombela. Ku kala efendelo li kola liomanu vosi."
Leviticus23:25 Veteke liaco ka ci tava oku lingamo upange wovaka. Va lumba ocilumba covondalu ku Yehova.
Leviticus23:26 Oco Yehova wa popia la Mose hati,"
Leviticus23:27 Haimo keteke liekui vosãi yaco yepanduvali ku kala eteke lioku tuvika akandu. Ku kala efendelo li kola liomanu vosi loku likandangiya okulia; kuenje wu lumba ocilumba covondalu ku Yehova.
Leviticus23:28 Veteke liaco ka ci tava oku lingamo upange wovaka momo eteke liaco lioku tuvika akandu, oku u likutilila kovaso a Yehova Suku yene akandu ene ha a tuvikiwa."
Leviticus23:29 Omunu nda elie nda elie ka likandangiya okulia eteke liaco o tepiwa ku vakuavo.
Leviticus23:30 Omunu waco, nda elie nda elie, o lingilamo upange veteke liaco, nda we nda we, omunu waco ndu nyõla pokati kavakuavo."
Leviticus23:31 Ko ka lingi upange lakamue; oco ocisila cenda hũ kovitumbulukila viene kuenda volonjo viene viosi.
Leviticus23:32 Li linga kokuene esambata liowusa u kola kuenje wu likandangiya okulia. Keteke liecea liosãi yaco koñolosi, tunde koñolosi toke koñolosi, wu kolisi esambata liene."
Leviticus23:33 Oco Yehova wa popia la Mose hati,"
Leviticus23:34 Sapuila va Isareli huti, Keteke liekui latãlo kosãi yilo yepanduvali ku kala ofesta yolosinge yoku Yehova oloneke epanduvali."
Leviticus23:35 Keteke liatete ku kala efendelo li kola liomanu vosi. Veteke liaco ka ci tava oku lingamo upange.
Leviticus23:36 Oloneke epanduvali wu lumba lumba ocilumba covondalu ku Yehova. Keteke liecelãla ku kala efendelo li kola liomanu vosi. Vu lumbila Yehova ocilumba covondalu. Olio liu lingila eteke lioku liuvika. Veteke liaco ka ci tava oku lingamo upange wovaka.
Leviticus23:37 Evi ovio olofesta via Yehova via tukuiwa. Wu vi imbila oluiya luefendelo li kola liomanu vosi. Kolofesta viaco oko vu lumbila Yehova ocilumba covondalu locilumba coku pia elisi, ocilumba colomema, ocitundasonde, lovilumba viokunyua, ocilumba leteke liaco, ocilumba leteke liaco."
Leviticus23:38 Olofesta viaco vi vandekiwa kawusa asambata a Yehova. Lovilumba viaco vi vandekiwa kolombanjaile viene lokovilumba violohuminyo viene viosi, kuenda kovilumba viene viosi viocipango vina wecaeci ale ku Yehova."
Leviticus23:39 Keteke liekui latãlo kosãi yepanduvali, eci wonguli ale ovaima ofeka, wu kala lofesta ya Yehova oloneke epanduvali. Keteke liatete ku kala owusa u kola loketeke liecelãla ku kala owusa u kola."
Leviticus23:40 Oco keteke liatete wu nyañula apako oviti via posoka, ovianja vieva kuenda ovianja vioviti via pulika, lavunje olondui, oco wu yolele oloneke epanduvali kovaso a Yehova Suku yene."
Leviticus23:41 Kuenje wu kala lofesta yaco ya Yehova oloneke epanduvali vunyamo; oco ocisila cenda hũ kovitumbulukila viene, wu kala kala lavo kosãi yepanduvali."
Leviticus23:42 Wu tumãla volosinge oloneke epanduvali; olonyitiwe viosi via Isareli vi tumãla volosinge;
Leviticus23:43 oco ovitumbulukila viene vi kulĩhe ndeci nda tumãlisile va Isareli volosinge eci nda vopa vofeka ye Egito. Ame ndi Yehova Suku yene.
Leviticus23:44 Oco Mose wa sapuila va Isareli olofesta via Yehova via tukuiwa.
Leviticus24:1 Oco Yehova wa popia la Mose hati,"
Leviticus24:2 Pañinya va Isareli okuti va ku nenela ulela wa fina wa tunda kasetona a sopuiwa. Ulela waco u kapiwe vondiyelo, ondiyelo yaco yi taime ño otembo yosi."
Leviticus24:3 Yi kala vombalaka yoku ñualehela la yehova, posamua yongumbo yuvangi. Arone o yi tata tunde koñolosi toke komẽle kovaso a Yehova ha yi taima ño hũ; ci kale ocisila cenda hũ kovitumbulukila viene."
Leviticus24:4 Arone haeye o sokaiya olovela viondiyelo yulu yi kasi kovaso a Yehova.
Leviticus24:5 Ovo o nyañula osema ya fina hu yoki layo ekui liakende kakende avali: olonepa vivali viekui viefa vi linga ekende limosi.
Leviticus24:6 O a tumbika ovilala vivali, kulala epandu, kulala epandu, komesa yulu wa fina kovaso a Yehova."
Leviticus24:7 O kapa insensu via fina kulala ulala okuti vi kala pamosi lombolo, vi linga onjivaluko kuenje vi lumbiwa ocilumba covondalu ku Yehova."
Leviticus24:8 Asambata osi o vi tumbaika kovaso a Yehova; ci kala ocisila ka ci pui ca va Isareli.
Leviticus24:9 Vi tiamẽla ku Arone lomãla vaye valume. Va vi lile kumue ku kola momo viu lingila cimue ci kola enene, ca tunda kovilumba viovondalu via lumbiwa ku Yehova. Vi linga onepa yaye otembo ka yi pui."
Leviticus24:10 Ulume umue, nyõho yaye u Isareli, isiaye u Egito, wa ñuala ñuala pokati ka va Isareli, kuenje ulume waco, nyoho yaye u Isareli, lulume umue u Isareli va liyakela pokati kocilombo."
Leviticus24:11 Oco ulume waco, nyõho yaye u Isareli, wa imbula onduko ya yehova, wa siñala muẽle, oco vo nena ku Mose. Inaye onduko yaye Selomiti, haeye omõla a Daviri, ukuepata lia Dani."
Leviticus24:12 Vo kapa vokayike toke va yeva eci ci va sapuila Yehova.
Leviticus24:13 Yehova yu wa popia la Mose hati,"
Leviticus24:14 Upa u wa siñala kocilombo, u tuala kofeka, kuenda ava vosi vo yeva va kape ovaka avo kutue waye kuenje owiñi wosi u sosole lovawe."
Leviticus24:15 Sapuilavo va Isareli huti, Wosi o siñala Suku yaye ambata ekandu liaye."
Leviticus24:16 U imbula onduko ya Yehova ipaiwa muẽle. Omanu vosi vo sosola lovawe. Ci kale ocingendeleyi, ci kale onyitiwe, eci a imbula onduko yaco, ipaiwa."
Leviticus24:17 Kuenda u o ponda omunu o favo.
Leviticus24:18 U ipãla ocinyama o piñainyapo, omuenyo lomuenyo."
Leviticus24:19 Nda omunu o lemẽha ukuavo oco ndeci a linga haico ci lingiwavo laye;
Leviticus24:20 oku teka loku teka, iso liso, eyo leyo; ndeci a lemẽha ukuavo haico ci lingiwa laye."
Leviticus24:21 U wa ipa ocinyama o ci piñainyapo, kuenda u wa ipa omunu ipaiwa."
Leviticus24:22 Wu kala locihandeleko cimuamue cocingendeleyi haico conyitiwe, omo ame ndi Yehova Suku yene."
Leviticus24:23 Oco Mose wa ci sapuila va Isareli. Vopa kocilombo u wa siñalẽle vo tuala kofeka kuenje vo sosola lovawe, okuti va Isareli va linga ndeci Yehova a sapuila Mose."
Leviticus25:1 Oco Yehova wa popia la Mose komunda Sinai hati,"
Leviticus25:2 Sapuila va Isareli, huti, Eci wiñili vofeka ndu yiha, oco ofeka yi kolisile Yehova esambata."
Leviticus25:3 Anyamo epandu o lima epia liove, kuenda o sonjuila ocumbo cove cayuva anyamo epandu loku ungula ovaima aco."
Leviticus25:4 Puãi vunyamo wepanduvali ku kala esambata liowusa u kola wofeka, esambata lioku Yehova; ku ka lime epia liove, pamue oku sonjuila ocumbo cove cayuva."
Leviticus25:5 Eci ca litundila kolomema viove ku ka cungule; ayuva oviti viove kua sonjuilile ku ka ungule, u kala unyamo wowusa u kola wofeka."
Leviticus25:6 Kuenje esambata liofeka liu lingili okulia, ove lupika wove ulume lupika wove ukãi lukuopange wove kuenda ocingendeleyi cove ca tunga love."
Leviticus25:7 Kuenje cosi ca litundila ci linga okulia kuolongombe viove kuenda ovinyama vi kasi vofeka yove.
Leviticus25:8 Oco o tenda olosimanu epanduvali vianyamo. Okuti anyamo epanduvali oku a tenda olonjanja epanduvali, okuti kokuove olosimanu epanduvali vianyamo vi linga akui akuãla kanyamo kanyamo ecea."
Leviticus25:9 Oco o yevalisa kofeka ondaka yinene yenguẽna keteke liekui kosãi yepanduvali. Keteke lioku tuvika akandu vu yevalisa enguẽna vofeka yene yosi.
Leviticus25:10 Wu kolisa unyamo wakui atãlo kuenda vu imbila komanu vaco vosi vofeka oluiya luoku panduluka. Oco vu lingila unyamo wonjolela kuenje vu tiukila omunu omunu kusenge waye kuenda kepata liaye.
Leviticus25:11 Unyamo waco wakui atãlo kokuene vosi u kaila unyamo wonjolela. Unyamo waco lomue o lina, lomue ungula eci ca litundila pamue ayuva oviti evi ka via sonjuiwile."
Leviticus25:12 Omo unyamo waco unyamo wonjolela oco kokuene u linga u kola. Vu li ño olomema viaco oku vi upopa kovapia.
Leviticus25:13 Vunyamo u wonjolela vu tiukila omunu omunu kusenge waye.
Leviticus25:14 Oco nda o landisa cimue kukuẽle pamue oku ci landa peka liukuẽle, ko ka lilingi cĩvi omunu lukuavo."
Leviticus25:15 O landa kukuẽle ndanyamo aco tunde kunyamo wonjolela; ukuẽle layevo o ku landisa ndanyamo oku ungula.
Leviticus25:16 Nda anyamo a linga alua ove o vokiyako kondando yaco, oco nda anyamo a tepuluka o tepulula kondando yaco; omo o kasi oku landisa kokuove ndanyamo oku ungula kuaco."
Leviticus25:17 Oco ko ka lilingi cĩvi omunu lokuavo puãi sumbili Suku yene. Momo ame ndi Yehova Suku yene.
Leviticus25:18 Oco lingi ovisila viange kuenda oku patekela ovihõlo viange ho vi lingaingi, oco wu tunga vofeka loku handa."
Leviticus25:19 Ovisenge vima epako liavio kuenje vu lialia ho kuti, wu tungamo loku handa."
Leviticus25:20 Nda vu pula hoti, Tu lia nye kunyamo wepanduvali, omo ka tu limi, ka tu ungula olomema vietu?"
Leviticus25:21 Ame muẽle numa esumũlũho liange ha liu wili kunyamo wepandu, hã ha liu wimisili olomema via soka lanyamo atatu."
Leviticus25:22 Kunyamo wecelãla oco wu lima puãi wu lialia kosila yale, toke kunyamo wecea eci olomema viawo via yela oco wu lialia kosila yale."
Leviticus25:23 Usenge ka u ka landisiwe olumue, omo ovisenge viaco viange; momo wu kasi lame ndakombe, ndovingendeleyi."
Leviticus25:24 Vofeka yosi yi linga yene ci tava oku yovola ovisenge.
Leviticus25:25 Nda ukuẽle o sangiwa lusuke hã ha landisa caye, ngandiaye muẽle eye iya, o yovola eci manjaye a landisile."
Leviticus25:26 Oco nda omunu ka kuete u o ci yovola, leye muẽle wa linga ohuasi yu wa sanga eci ca soka loku ci yovola,"
Leviticus25:27 oco o tenda ondando yanyamo aco, kuenje o tiula ku a ci landele eci ca sialapo, kuenje o tiukila kusenge waye."
Leviticus25:28 Puãi nda ka tẽla oku ci yovola, eci ca landiwile ci siale lu wa ci landele toke kunyamo wonjolela; kunyamo wonjolela ci tunda kokuaye kuenje muẽle o tiukila kusenge waye."
Leviticus25:29 Oco nda omunu o landisa onjo yi kasi vimbo liovimbaka, ci tava oku yi yovola vokati kunyamo umosi ombulu tunde keteke ya landiwile; unyamo umosi ombulu ci tava oku yi yovola."
Leviticus25:30 Nda puãi ka ya yowiwile pokati kunyamo ombulu, onjo yi kasi vimbo liovimbaka yi tiamẽla hũ ku wa yi landa kuenda kovitumbulukila viaye, onjo yaco eyi ka yi tundi kokuaye kunyamo wonjolela."
Leviticus25:31 Puãi olonjo vi kasi vovaimbo ka a ñualiwile lovimbaka, va vi sokisa lovapia ovusenge, ci tava oku vi yovola kuenje vi eciwa kunyamo wonjolela."
Leviticus25:32 Haimo lumue olonjo viovaimbo a tiamẽla ku va Lewi, ci tava okuti va Lewi va vi yovola ño olotembo viosi."
Leviticus25:33 Nda u Lewi ka yovola onjo yaye oco onjo ya landiwa vimbo liaye yi tiukila kokuaye kunyamo wonjolela, omo olonjo viovaimbo a va Lewi vi linga viavo muẽle pokati ka va Isareli."
Leviticus25:34 Puãi usenge u wa tiamẽla kovaimbo avo ka u landisiwa; owo wavo wenda ño hũ.
Leviticus25:35 Nda ukuẽle wa sangiwa lusuke kuenda o fukĩla, ove u kuatisa; o kala love ndukombe pamue ndocingendeleyi."
Leviticus25:36 Ku ka tambule kokuaye osindike pamue ombandeke, puãi sumbila Suku yove oco ukuẽle a tumãle love."
Leviticus25:37 Ku ko wĩhe olombongo viove loku lavoka osindike, ndaño oku wĩha okulia kuove ka ka lavoke coku vandeka."
Leviticus25:38 Ame ndi Yehova Suku yene ndo wupi vofeka ye Egito okuti ndu wĩhi ofeka ya Kanana hã si lingi Suku yene.
Leviticus25:39 Nda ukuẽle wa sangiwa lusuke ha lilandisa kokuove, ku ko lingise ndupika."
Leviticus25:40 A kale love ndukuopange, ndukombe; a ku vumbile toke kunyamo wonjolela,"
Leviticus25:41 oco a ku tunde, leye lomãla vaye, ha tiukila kepata liavo, a tiukila koluse."
Leviticus25:42 Momo akuenje vange, nda vopa vofeka ye Egito, ka va ka landiwe ndapika."
Leviticus25:43 Ku ko viale lukãlu, o sumbila puãi Suku yove."
Leviticus25:44 Oku limuisa apika vove valume lapika vakãi o kala lavo, ci tava oku landa apika valume lapika vakãi kolofeka vio ñuali."
Leviticus25:45 Ndaño kovingendeleyi via tunga pokati kene, pamue kapata avo va kasi lene, ava va citiwila vofeka yene, ci tavavo oku landa apika okuti o va fuka."
Leviticus25:46 Apika vaco ci tava oku va sila omãla vene ndocipiñalo cavo coloneke viosi. Kokuavo oko wu muĩla apika va vumba vumba ño hũ, puãi vamanjene va Isareli ka ci tava oku va viala okuti vu liviala lukãlu."
Leviticus25:47 Nda ukombe pamue ocingendeleyi o kasi love o linga ohuasi kuenje ukuẽle o lisungue laye o sangiwa lusuke ha lilandisa kukombe pamue kocingendeleyi ci kasi love, ndaño kukuepata liukombe;"
Leviticus25:48 eci a landiwa ci tava oku yovuiwa. Ci tava okuti umue ku vamanjaye u yovola,"
Leviticus25:49 pamue isiaye yumalẽhe pamue omõla a isiaye ci tava oku u yovola, ndaño umue wiñi kepata liavo ositue laye ocili, ci tava oku u yovola; pamue nda wa linga ohuasi ci tava oku liyovola."
Leviticus25:50 O tenda lu wo landele tunde kunyamo a lilandisile kokuaye toke kunyamo wonjolela: olombongo vioniule yaye vi lisoka lanyamo aco; ci kala laye ca soka ndotembo yukuopange.
Leviticus25:51 Nda kua kamba anyamo a lua oniule yaye yi lisoka lao, yi tepuluiwe kolombongo a landiwile lavio."
Leviticus25:52 Nda kunyamo wonjolela kuo kamba anyamo ka a luile, o tenda laye, kuenje ca soka lanyamo aye haico a tiula ofeto yeyovo liaye."
Leviticus25:53 O kala laye ndukuopange wunyamo kunyamo, ka ko viale kovaso ove lukãlu."
Leviticus25:54 Oco nda ka yovuiwile vanyamo aco o tunda vunyamo wonjolela, eye muẽle lomala vaye kumuamue laye."
Leviticus25:55 Omo va Isareli va ndingila akuenje vange; ovo akuenje vange nda vopa vofeka ye Egito. Ame ndi Yehova Suku yene.
Leviticus26:1 Ko ka lisongeli iteka. Ko ka litalamisili ociñumañuma ca songiwa, pamue ongunji yoku fendela. Ko ka tumbiki ociteka cewe vofeka yene ho ci fendela, omo ame ndi Yehova Suku yene."
Leviticus26:2 Lavi asambata ange kuenda oku sumbila ocitumãlo cange ci kola. Ame ndi Yehova.
Leviticus26:3 Nda wendaendi lovisila viange loku patekela ovihandeleko viange ho vi lingaingi,"
Leviticus26:4 oco vondombo ndu wihi ombela kuenje osi yeca ovaima ayo loviti viovovapia vima epako liavio.
Leviticus26:5 Okusasa ku litokeka lokupia kuayuva, lokupia kuayuva ku litokeka luvo woku kũla. Vu lia, vu kuta okulia kuenje vu tunga vofeka yene loku handa."
Leviticus26:6 Ngeca ombembua vofeka kuenje vu pekela ño pũ, lomue u saluisi. Ovinyama vi lumana ndi vi puisa vofeka, ndaño osipata ka yi piti vofeka yene."
Leviticus26:7 Vu lupuisa ovanyali vene ha va kupukila kovaso ene losipata.
Leviticus26:8 Oco vatãlo yene va lupuisa ocita, locita cene ci lupuisa ekui liolohũlũkãi; kuenje ovanyãli vene va kupukila kovaso ene losipata."
Leviticus26:9 Ndu vanji vanji, ndu citaisi, ndu luisi, ndi kolisila kokuene ohuminyo yange."
Leviticus26:10 Vu lialia ohunju ya vonga kuenje vu tundisamo ohunju ho piñainyamo olomema viokaliye.
Leviticus26:11 Numbika pokati kene otavernakulu yange oco utima wange ka vu nyehũla.
Leviticus26:12 Mita mita pokati kene si lingi Suku yene, lene vu linga omanu vange."
Leviticus26:13 Ame ndi Yehova Suku yene, u wo wupi vofeka ye Egito, okuti ko lingi apika vavo. Nda teya olombambo violomi viene, ndo siuhisi ha wendi ciwa."
Leviticus26:14 Puãi nda ko njevi kuenda ko lingaingi ovihandeleko evi viosi;
Leviticus26:15 nda wu nyehũla ovisila viange, nda ovitima viene vi nyehũla oviholo viange, okuti ko lingi ovihandeleko viange viosi, wu nyõla puãi ohuminyo yange;"
Leviticus26:16 nda oco vu linga ndinga lene ndeci: ndu saluisi lonũlo lombambi ha vi vuvalisa ovaso, ha vi konyuisa utima. Vu kũla ombuto yene olivova omo ovanyali vene va yi lia."
Leviticus26:17 Ndu felisili ocipala cange kuenje wasiwi kovaso ovanyãli vene. Ava vo suvuki vo viali. Vu tila ño ndaño lomue o kasi oku hangisa.
Leviticus26:18 Nda haimo ko njeveleli olonjanja epanduvali eyambulo liakandu ene.
Leviticus26:19 Nyõla okulituna kunene wene. Ilu liene ndi li lingisa ndutale, losi yene ndosipi."
Leviticus26:20 Ongusu yene yo peseka ño, momo osi yene ka yeci ovaima ayo, ndaño oviti viofeka ka vimi epako."
Leviticus26:21 Oco nda wu tamãlãla lame kuenje ko njeveleli, ndu luisila vali olonjanja epanduvali afengi akandu ene."
Leviticus26:22 Numisa pokati kene ocinyama covusenge cu pundi omãla vene, ci nyõla olongombe viene, cu lingisi vañamiñami, kuenje olonjila viene vi wunda."
Leviticus26:23 Nda ko longisiwi lovina evi ho tiami kokuange puãi wu tamãlãli ño lame,"
Leviticus26:24 oco lamevo namãlãla len. Ndu veti ame muẽle loku luisa olonjanja epanduvali eyambulo liakandu ene.
Leviticus26:25 Ndu nenẽli osipata yu vetisi efetuluinyo liohuminyo. Nda wongolokeli vovaimbo ene, numa efengi pokati kene, oco wu pakuilua peka liovanyãli."
Leviticus26:26 Eci nyõla ombolo yeteku liene, ekui liakãi va yoka yoka ombolo yeteku liene, ekui liakãi va yoka yoka ombolo yene vofolono yimuamue, va wĩhi vali ombolo yene loku yi pesalisa. Vu lia puãi ko kuta."
Leviticus26:27 Nda haimo ko njevi ndaño ovina evi vio sangi puãi wu tamãlali ño lame,"
Leviticus26:28 oco ndi litamãlãla lene lonyeño, lamevo ndu yambuli loku luisa olonjanja epanduvali eyambulo liakandu ene."
Leviticus26:29 Vu lia ositu yatimba omãla vene valume lositu yatimba omãla vene vakãi.
Leviticus26:30 Nyõla olonumbuko viene loku timbula oviteka viene viekumbi. Nyinasi ovivimbi viene kilu liatimba oviteka viene kuenje utima wange u vu nyehũla.
Leviticus26:31 Ndingisa ovaimbo ene alunda. Nyõla ovitumãlo viene vi kola kuenda si tava oku lehũla uwa walemba ene.
Leviticus26:32 Oco ndingisa ofeka ekalasoko. Ovanyãli vene va tungamo va yi komõhẽla.
Leviticus26:33 Kuenje ndu sanduili volofeka loku vu polela osipata. Ofeka yene yi linga ekalasoko, lovaimbo ene alunda."
Leviticus26:34 Oco ofeka yi sanjukila asambata ayo osimbu yi kasi ndekalasoko lene vu kasi vofeka yovanyãli vene. Oco ofeka yi puyuka, yi sanjukila asambata ayo."
Leviticus26:35 Osimbu yi kasi ndekalasoko yi puyuka epuyuko lina ka ya puyukilile kasambata ene eci wa tungimo.
Leviticus26:36 Vakuẽle va supapo, ndi va tumisa uhonyohi wovitima viavo volofeka viovanyali vavo, kuenje okuyevala kuemẽla li enda lofela ku va lupuisa. Va tila ndu o tila osipata. Va kupuka eci lomue o va landula."
Leviticus26:37 Va likonjuaka huti ño kovaso osipata ndaño lomue o va lupuisa, kuenje ko kala lolohõlo vioku talama kovaso ovanyali vene."
Leviticus26:38 Oco wu taka pokati kolofeka, kuenje ofeka yovanyali vene yu li."
Leviticus26:39 Vakuẽle va supapo va sengeteta lolohole viavo volofeka viovanyãli vene. Va sengetetavo lolohole via vaisiavo kumosi lavo.
Leviticus26:40 Puãi nda va litavela olohole viavo lolohole via vaisiavo ndomo va ndueyela loku tamalala lame,"
Leviticus26:41 ndokuti lamevo nda tamalala lavo kuenje nda va nena vofeka yovanyãli vavo, oco nda utima wavo, una ka wa yelisiwile, u ketisua kuenje va tava keyambulo liolohole viavo,"
Leviticus26:42 oco njivaluka ohuminyo yange la Yakoba, lohuminyo yange la Isake, lohuminyo yange la Avirahama. Njivalukavo ofeka."
Leviticus26:43 Ofekavo yi siwa lavo, oco yi sanjukila asambata ayo osimbu yi kala ekalasoko lovo ka vemo. Ovo kuenje va tava keyambulo liolohole viavo, omo va nyehũla ovihõlo viange, lovitima viavo via nyehũla ovisila viange."
Leviticus26:44 Haime, ndaño cosi oco, eci va kasi vofeka yovanyãli vavo si va pamũla loku va nyehũla oku va nyõla pe, loku nyõla ohuminyo yange lavo, omo ame ndi Yehova Suku yavo."
Leviticus26:45 Puãi omo ndi va sole oco njivalukila ocisila nda lisila lolosekulu viavo vina ndopa vofeka ye Egito kovaso olofeka si lingi Suku yavo. Ame ndi Yehova.
Leviticus26:46 Evi ovio ovisila lovihõlo lovihandeleko Yehova a tukuila pokati kaye la va Isareli vomunda Sinai lomẽla wa Mose.
Leviticus27:1 Yehova wa popia la Mose hati,"
Leviticus27:2 Sapuila va Isareli huti, Eci omunu a likuminya ohuminyo yi kola, ove o sokiyila Yehova oseo yomanu vaco."
Leviticus27:3 Pokusokiya kuove ulume ukuanyamo akui avali toke kukuanyamo akuĩ epandu, oseo yove yi kala akui atãlo kolosiekele viopalata, vi lisoke lolosiekele vionembele."
Leviticus27:4 Nda ukãi oco oseo yove yi kala akui atatu kolosiekele.
Leviticus27:5 Oco tunde kukuanyamo atãlo toke kukuanyamo akui avali oseo yove yi kala, nda ulume akui avali kolosiekele, nda ukãi ekui kolosiekele."
Leviticus27:6 Kuenje nda ukuasãi ombulu toke kukuanyamo atãlo oco oseo yove yi kala, nda ulume olosiekele vitãlo viopalata, nda ukãi oseo yove yi kala olosiekele vitatu viopalata."
Leviticus27:7 Oco tunde kukuakui epandu kanyamo kua supa, nda ulume oseo yove yi kale ekui kolosiekele kolosiekele vitãlo, nda ukãi ekui kolosiekele."
Leviticus27:8 Puãi nda omunu waño, ka kuete ndoseo yove, vo kape kovaso yocitunda, kuenje ocitunda cu sokiyila oseo yaye. Ndeci a tẽla omunu waco wa likuminya haico ocitunda cu sokiyila."
Leviticus27:9 Kuenje nda ocinyama, cevi omanu va lumbila ku Yehova, viosi omunu a vi eca ku Yehova vi kola."
Leviticus27:10 Ka ka ci pongolole, ka ka piñainyepo eci ciwa kueci cĩvi, pamue ceci cĩvi kueci ciwa. Nda o piñainya ocinyama locinyama, oco ocinyama caco la kapiñala kaco kavali kavio vi kola."
Leviticus27:11 Kuenje nda ocinyama cevi vi vĩhĩsa, evi ka va vi lumbaila ku Yehova, o tumbika ocinyama caco kovaso ocitunda;"
Leviticus27:12 kuenje ocitunda ci ci sokiyila oseo, nda ciwa nda cĩvĩ, ndeci ove ucitunda o ci sokiya oco ci kala."
Leviticus27:13 Nda puãi muẽle o ci yovola a vandekeko koseo yove onepa yatãlo.
Leviticus27:14 Eci omunu a tumbika onjo yaye hã ha yi koli ku Yehova, oco ocitunda ci yi sokiyila oseo, nda yiwa nda yivi; ndeci ocitunda ci yi sokiyila haico yi kala."
Leviticus27:15 Kuenje nda u wa yi tumbika o yovola onjo yaye o vandeka kolombongo vioseo yove onepa yaco yatãlo oco yi kala yaye.
Leviticus27:16 Nda omunu o tumbika ku Yehova onepa yepia lia linga liaye muẽle, oseo yove yi linge ndokulima kuaco; apa pa kuliwa ohomeri yosevata ci soka akui atãlo kolosiekele."
Leviticus27:17 Nda o tumbika epia liaye tunde kunyamo wonjolela, oco ci kala ndoseo yove."
Leviticus27:18 Puãi nda o tumbika epia liaye kovaso yunyamo wonjolela, ocitunda cu tendela olombongo via soka lanyamo a kambako oku pitila kunyamo wonjolela, kuenje oseo yove yi tepuluka."
Leviticus27:19 Kuenje nda u wa tumbika epia o yongola oku li yovola o vandeka kolombongo vioseo yove onepa yatãlo kuenje li linga liaye.
Leviticus27:20 Nda ka yongola oku yovola epia liaco, pamue nda wa landisa epia komunu ukuavo, ka li yovuiwa vali."
Leviticus27:21 Epia liaco puãi, eci lia panduluka kunyamo wonjolela, li kola ku Yehova ndepia lia lumbiwa ndocilumba coku lisinga; li linga liocitunda."
Leviticus27:22 Kuenje nda o tumbika ku Yehova epia wa li landa, eli haliayeko muẽle,"
Leviticus27:23 oco ocitunda cu tendela eci ca soka loseo yove toke kunyamo wonjolela. Eteke liaco eye eca oseo yove, ci linga ndeci ci kola ku Yehova."
Leviticus27:24 Vunyamo wonjolela epia liaco li tiukila ku wa landele laye, haeye u lia kala usenge waye muẽle."
Leviticus27:25 Oloseo viove viosi vi kale olosiekele vionembele: akui avali olongera vi soka losiekele.
Leviticus27:26 Puãi olonuñulu viovinyama ka ci tava oku vi tumbika omo olonuñulu viaco via Yehova ale, ci kale ongombe, ci kale omeme onuñulu yi tiama ku Yehova."
Leviticus27:27 Nda ocinyama cevi vi vĩhĩsa, muẽle a ci yovole ndoseo yove, loku vandekako onepa yatãlo. Nda ka ci yovuiwa ci landisiwa ndoseo yove."
Leviticus27:28 Haimo lumue kovina viosi omunu a kuete, ci kale omunu, ci kale ocinyama, ci kale epia liusenge waye, lacimue ca lumbiwa ndocilumba coku lisinga cokuti wa ci lumba ku Yehova loku lisinga, ci landisua pamue oku yovuiwa. Cosi ca lumbiwa loku lisinga ci kola cimue ku Yehova."
Leviticus27:29 Lacimue ca lumbiwa loku lisinga, okuti ca lumbiwa lomanu loku lisinga, ci yovuiwa, ci ipaiwa muẽle."
Leviticus27:30 Kuenje onepa yosi yekui yovapia yi tiama ku Yehova, nda ombuto yovapia, nda epako liuti, onepa yekui yi kola, Ya Yehova."
Leviticus27:31 Nda omunu o yongola oku yovola cimue conepa yaye yekui, o vandekako onepa yaco yatãlo."
Leviticus27:32 Onepa yosi yekui yolongombe leyi yolomeme pamue olohombo, viosi vi pita pita vemẽhi liohunya, onepa yavio yekui yi kola ya Yehova."
Leviticus27:33 Ka ka pungule nda yiwa nda yĩvi; ka ka piñainye leci cikuavo; nda o piñainya oco muẽle leci ca piñalãpo kavali kavio vi kola. Ka ci yovuiwa.
Leviticus27:34 Evi ovio ovihandeleko Yehova a sapuila Mose vomunda Sinai. Wa vi sapuila Mose okuti Mose o sapuila va Isareli.
Numbers1:1 Keteke liatete, kosãi yavali, kulima wavali tunde kokutunda ke Egito oco Yehova wa popia la Mose vekalasoko lia Sinai, vombalaka yoku ñualehela laye, hati,"
Numbers1:2 Tendi ocikoti cosi ca Isareli, ci tendi epata epata, imo imo, onjo onjo. Alume vaco vu va tenda omunu omunu londuko yaye."
Numbers1:3 Ove la Arone vu tenda muẽle va Isareli vosi va tẽla oku enda kovita, okuti alume vosi tunde kuava va kuete alima akui avali."
Numbers1:4 Kuenje kepata epata ku noliwa osekulu yimue yi kuete ale epata liaye muẽle, oku u kuatisi."
Numbers1:5 Olonduko vialume vo kuatisi vievi: ko Ruvene, Elicuru, omõla a Sedeyuru."
Numbers1:6 Ko Simeone, Sielumiele, omõla a Curisiadai."
Numbers1:7 Ko Yuda, Nahisione, omõla a Aminadava."
Numbers1:8 Ko Isakare, Netanele, omõla a Cuare."
Numbers1:9 Ko Sevulono, Eliyava, omõla a Helone."
Numbers1:10 Komãla va Yosefe, ke Efarimi, Elisiama, omõla a Amihudu. Ko Manase, Gamaliyele, omõla a Pedacuru."
Numbers1:11 Ko Benjamini, Avidana, omõla a Gideoni."
Numbers1:12 Ko Dani, Ahiesere, omõla a Amisiadai."
Numbers1:13 Ka Asiere, Pagiyele, omõla a Okirana."
Numbers1:14 Ko Gadi, Eliyasafe, omõla a Dewele."
Numbers1:15 Ko Nafitali, Ahira, omõla a Enane."
Numbers1:16 Ava ovo va nõlĩwa kocikoti ca va Isareli, haivo olosekulu viapata avo muẽle, haivo akulu pokati kocikoti ca Isareli."
Numbers1:17 Mose la Arone va pañinya alume va tukuiwa olonduko,"
Numbers1:18 kuenje keteke liatete kosãi yavali oco vongolola va Isareli vosi. Va lisonehisa epata epata, imo imo. Tunde kuava va kuete akuĩ avali kalima kua supa va lisonehisa omunu omunu londuko yaye."
Numbers1:19 Ndeci Yehova a sapuila Mose, haico a va tendela vekalasoko lia Sinai."
Numbers1:20 Va Ruvene, nuñulu ya Isareli, vovaimo avo, epata epata, ndocikoti ca sekulu yavo, alume vosi va kuete akuĩ avali kalima kuenda kua supa, okuti vava va tẽla oku enda kovita, haivo va tendiwa lolonduko omunu omunu,"
Numbers1:21 poku tendiwa va tẽla akuĩ akuãla kolohũlũkãi kolohũlũkãi epandu lovita vitãlo viomanu. Ovo va Ruvene.
Numbers1:22 Va Simeone, vovaimo avo, epata epata, ndocikoti ca sekulu yavo, alume vosi va kuete akuĩ avali kalima kuenda kua supa, okuti vava va tẽla oku enda kovita, haivo va tendiwa lolonduko omunu omunu,"
Numbers1:23 poku tendiwa va tẽla akuĩ atãlo kolohũlũkãi kolohũlũkãi ecea lovita vitatu viomanu. Ovo va Simeone.
Numbers1:24 Va Gadi, vovaimo avo, epata epata, ndocikoti ca sekulu yavo, alume vosi va kuete akuĩ avali kalima kuenda kua supa, okuti vava va tẽla oku enda kovita, haivo va tendiwa lolonduko omunu omunu,"
Numbers1:25 poku tendiwa va tẽla akuĩ akuãla kolohũlũkãi vitãlo lovita epandu lakuĩ atãlo komanu. Ovo va Gadi.
Numbers1:26 Va Yuda, vovaimo avo, epata epata, ndocikoti ca sekulu yavo, alume vosi va kuete akuĩ avali kalima kuenda kua supa, okuti vava va tẽla oku enda kovita, haivo va tendiwa lolonduko omunu omunu,"
Numbers1:27 poku tendiwa, va tẽla akuĩ epanduvali kolohũlũkãi kolohũlũkãi vikuãla lovita epandu viomanu. Ovo va Yuda."
Numbers1:28 Va Isakare, vovaimo avo, epata epata, ndocikoti ca sekulu yavo, alume vosi va kuete akuĩ avali kalima kuenda kua supa, okuti vava va tẽla oku enda kovita, haivo va tendiwa lolonduko omunu omunu,"
Numbers1:29 poku tendiwa, va tẽla akuĩ atãlo kolohũlũkãi kolohũlũkãi vikuãla lovita vikuãla viomanu. Ovo va Isakare."
Numbers1:30 Va Sevulono, vovaimo avo, epata epata, ndocikoti colosekulu viavo, vakuanyamo akuĩ avali kuenda kua supa, vosi va tẽla oku enda kovita, haivo va tendiwa lolonduko omunu omunu,"
Numbers1:31 poku tendiwa, va tẽla akuĩ atãlo kolohũlũkãi kolohũlũkãi epanduvali lovita vikuãla viomanu. Ovo va Sevulono."
Numbers1:32 Va Yosefe okuti va Efarimi, vovaimo avo, epata epata, ndocikoti colosekulu viavo, vakuanyamo akuĩ avali kuenda kua supa, vosi va tẽla oku enda kovita, haivo va tendiwa lolonduko omunu omunu,"
Numbers1:33 poku tendiwa, va tẽla akuĩ akuãla kolohũlũkãi lovita vitãlo viomanu. Ovo va Efarimi."
Numbers1:34 Va Manase, vovaimo avo, epata epata, ndocikoti colosekulu viavo, vakuanyamo akuĩ avali kuenda kua supa, vosi va tẽla oku enda kovita haivo va tendiwa lolonduko omunu omunu;"
Numbers1:35 poku tendiwa va tẽla akuĩ atatu kolohũlũkãi kolohũlũkãi vivali lovita vivali viomanu. Ovo va Manase.
