1Chronicles13:5 Oco Daviti wongolola Isareli yosi, tunde ko Sihore yokEgito toke koku panda ko Hamati, ha va kopa ocikasa ca Yehova ko Kiriyata Yeari."
1Chronicles13:6 Daviti kumue la Isareli Vosi wa lamanela ko Baala ko Kiriyata Yeari, yi tiamẽla ko Yuda, ha va kopako ocikasa covisila via Suku Yehova, cina ca tukuiwa londuko ya Yehova, Ukuakutumãla pokati ka va Keruvi."
1Chronicles13:7 Yu vambatela ocikasa ca Suku vekalu liokaliye, va cupa vonjo ya Avinadava. Usa la Ahiyo ovo va songuila ekalu."
1Chronicles13:8 Daviti la Isareli yosi va cilila kovaso a Suku longusu yavo yosi, loku imba ovisungo, loku sika olohalupa lovisumba, loloñoma layundu kuenda olombeta."
1Chronicles13:9 Eci va pitila kocimbandi ca Kidono, oco Usa wa alũla eka liaye, ha yakela ocikasa, momo olongombe via likonjoka."
1Chronicles13:10 Kuenje onyeño ya Yehova ya wengukila Usa, yu wo veta momo wa alũila eka liaye kocikasa. Haipo muẽle a fila, kovaso a Suku."
1Chronicles13:11 Daviti wa sumua calua, omo Yehova a veta Usa. Yu wa luka usenge waco hati, Perece Usa, toke etaili lilo."
1Chronicles13:12 Keteke liaco, Daviti wa yokokela Suku kuenje hati, Ndi nena ndati ocikasa ca Suku konjo yange?"
1Chronicles13:13 Oco Daviti ka tualele ocikasa kimbo liaye muẽle, kimbo lia Daviti, puãi wa ci tuala konjo ya Oved Edome, u Giti."
1Chronicles13:14 Ocikasa ca Suku ca tumãla lepata lia Oved Edome, vonjo yaye, olosãi vitatu. Kuenje Yehova wa sumuluĩsa onjo ya Oved Edome, la cosi caye."
1Chronicles14:1 Hirama Soma ya Turo wa tuma olomunga ku Daviti. Wa tumavo oviti viovinendele kuenda vakuakusonga ovawe lolokalupindelu, ha vo tungila onjo."
1Chronicles14:2 Daviti wa limbuka okuti Yehova wo vialeka ha lingi Soma ya va Isareli. Wa limbukavo okuti usoma waye wa kemala calua mekonda liomanu vaye va Isareli.
1Chronicles14:3 Ko Yerusalãi, Daviti wa kuela vali akãi. Daviti wa cita vali omãla valume lomãla vakãi."
1Chronicles14:4 Olonduko viomãla a citila vo Yerusalãi vievi: Siamua la Siovava la Natana la Salomone,"
1Chronicles14:5 la Ivehari la Elisua la Elipelete
1Chronicles14:6 la Noga la Nefege la Yafiya,"
1Chronicles14:7 la Elisiama la Beliada la Elifelete.
1Chronicles14:8 Eci va Filisiti va yeva okuti Daviti wa wavekua ha lingi Soma kIsareli yosi, oco va Filisiti vosi va tunda ha va sandiliya Daviti. Kuenje Daviti wa ci yeva, yu wa va tundila."
1Chronicles14:9 Va Filisiti veya, va pakasa ocimbota ca Refaimi."
1Chronicles14:10 Daviti wa pula Yehova hati, Nundila va Filisiti, ale? O va eca peka liange ale? Yehova wa popia laye hati, Kuende ño momo ndi va eca peka liove."
1Chronicles14:11 Daviti wa enda ko Baale Perasimi kuenje haiko a va yulila. Daviti wa popia hati, Leka liange Yehova wolumula ovanyali vange ndendunde. Oco ocitumãlo caco va ci tukula vati Baale Perasimi."
1Chronicles14:12 Va Filisiti va siako oviteka viavo. Daviti wa tuma oku vi yoka, yu via yokiwa."
1Chronicles14:13 Va Filisiti veya vali, kuenje va pakasa ocimbota ca Refaimi."
1Chronicles14:14 Eci Daviti a pula vali Suku, Suku wa popia laye hati, Ku ka lamane. Ñuala konyima yavo. Lisanga lavo kuna ku kasi oviti viamoreira."
1Chronicles14:15 Eci o yeva kilu lioviti ondukuso ndokuenda kuasualali, oco tundila ocilunga momo Suku wa livanga kovaso yove ha nyõli olohoka via va Filisiti."
1Chronicles14:16 Daviti wa linga ndeci Suku o sapuila, kuenje va nyõla olohoka via va Filisiti tunde ko Giveone toke ko Gesere."
1Chronicles14:17 Oluhimo lua Daviti lua sandokaila kolofeka viosi, kuenda Yehova wa yokokisa olofeka viosi kovaso a Daviti."
1Chronicles15:1 Daviti wa litungila olonjo vimbo lia Daviti, kuenda wangiliyila ocikasa ca Suku ocitumãlo, wa ci tungila ombalaka."
1Chronicles15:2 Oco Daviti wa popia hati, Lomue wa sesamela oku ambata ocikasa ca Suku, te lika va Lewi, momo ovo Yehova a nola ha vambata ocikasa ca Suku, loku u vumba ño hu."
1Chronicles15:3 Oco Daviti wongoluila Isareli yosi ko Yerusalãi, ha va kopa ocikasa ca Yehova loku ci nena kocitumãlo caco, cina a angiliya."
1Chronicles15:4 Daviti wongolola va Arone, la va Lewi, vava:"
1Chronicles15:5 Po va Kohata, Uriyele, usongui, kumue lavangandiaye ocita lakui avali."
1Chronicles15:6 Po va Merari, Asaya, usongui, kumue lavangandiaye ovita vivali lakui avali."
1Chronicles15:7 Po va Gerisiomo, Yoele, usongui, kumue lavangandiaye ocita lakui atatu."
1Chronicles15:8 Po va Elicafana, Semaya, usongui, kumue lavangandiaye ovita vivali."
1Chronicles15:9 Po va Hevirone, Eliyele, usongui, kumue lavangandiaye akui ecelãla."
1Chronicles15:10 Po va Usiyele, Aminadava, usongui, kumue lavangandiaye ocita lekui lavavali."
1Chronicles15:11 Daviti wa pañinya ovitunda vivali Sadoke la Aviatare kuenda va Lewi ava: Uriyele la Asaya la Yoele la Semaya la Eliyele la Aminadava,"
1Chronicles15:12 kuenje wa popia lavo hati, Ene vulosekulu viapata a va Lewi. Liyelisi ene lavamanjene, oco vu kope ocikasa ca Yehova, Suku ya Isareli, loku ci nena kocitumãlo nda cangiliyila."
1Chronicles15:13 Omo heneko wa cambateli onjanja yatete, oco Yehova Suku yetu a tu vetela, momo ka tuo sandele ndocihandeleko caye."
1Chronicles15:14 Oco ovitunda la va Lewi va liyelisa, ha va kopa ocikasa ca Yehova, Suku ya Isareli."
1Chronicles15:15 Va Lewi vambatela ocikasa ca Suku kolomuangaluwa povitai viavo, ndomo Mose a ci handeleka, ndondaka ya Suku."
1Chronicles15:16 Daviti wa popia lasongui va va Lewi okuti va sokiye vamanjavo olonjimbi, ha va siki longusu ovisikilo viavo, ovisumba lolohalupa layundu, loku imba lolusale."
1Chronicles15:17 Oco va Lewi va tukula Hemani, omõla a Yoele, kuenda povangandiaye va tukulapo Asafe, omõla a Berekiya. Povangandiavo va Merari va tukulapo Etani omõla a Kusiaya."
1Chronicles15:18 Kuenda kumue lavo, kua tukuiwa vangandiavo vakuacisoko cavali, Sakariya la Bene la Yaasiyele la Semiramote la Yehiyele la Uni la Eliava la Benaya la Maaseya la Matitiya la Elifele la Mikineya la Oved Edome kuenda Yeyele, vosi yavo vakualombundi."
1Chronicles15:19 Hemani la Ssafe la Etani olonjimbi, va kala layundu osipi, ha va a siki longusu."
1Chronicles15:20 Sakariya la Asiyele la Semiramote la Yehiyele la Uni la Eliava la Maaseya la Benaya, va kala lovisumba viocileñi ca Alamote."
1Chronicles15:21 Kuenda Matitiya la Elifele la Mikineya la Oved Edome la Yeyele la Asasiya, va kala lolohalupa viocileñi ca Seminite, loku songuila ovisungo."
1Chronicles15:22 Kenaniya, usongui wa va Lewi, eye wa songuila ovisungo. Wa longisa oku imba, momo wa kala luloño waco."
1Chronicles15:23 Berekiya la Elikana, ovo vakualombundi viocikasa."
1Chronicles15:24 Sevaniya la Yosiafata la Netanele la Amasai la Sakanya la Benaya la Eliyesere, ovio ovitunda via sika olombeta kovaso yocikasa ca Suku. Oved Edome la Yehiya, ovo vakualombundi viocikasa."
1Chronicles15:25 Oco Daviti lovakulu va Isareli, lavakesongo liolohulukãi va enda lonjolela oku kopa ocikasa covisila via Yehova konjo ya Oved Edome."
1Chronicles15:26 Kuenje omo Suku a kuatisa va Lewi vana vambata ocikasa covisila via Yehova, oco va lumba olonui epanduvali lovitupi epanduvali."
1Chronicles15:27 Daviti wa wala uwalo wavalatanya. Va Lewi vambata ocikasa, lolonjimbi kuenda Kenaniya, usongui wolonjimbi, vosi yavo haico va wala. Daviti wa walavo efonde liovalatanya,"
1Chronicles15:28 Isareli yosi yambata ocikasa covisila via Yehova, loku ulula, loku totãlisa anguena lolombeta layundu lovisumba lolohalupa."
1Chronicles15:29 Kuenje, eci ocikasa covisila via Yehova ceya kimbo lia Daviti, Mikale, omõla a Saulu ukãi, wa kala ponjanela loku tala. Yu wa mola soma Daviti o cila loku piluka kuenje wo pembula vutima waye."
1Chronicles16:1 Yu va nena ocikasa ca Suku, va ci kapa vokati kombalaka ya tungile Daviti. Kuenje va lumbila kovaso a Suku ovilumba vioku pia elisi lovilumba viombembua."
1Chronicles16:2 Eci Daviti a mala loku lumba ovilumba vioku pia elisi lovilumba viombembua, oco wa sumuluisa omanu vosi vonduko ya Yehova."
1Chronicles16:3 Yu wa eca ombolo locikepa cositu lombunge yayuva a kukuta komunu omunu, ci kale ulume, ci kale ukãi."
1Chronicles16:4 Wa tukula vamue va Lewi ha va vumbi kovaso yocikasa ca Yehova, loku tumbangiya loku pandula loku sivaya Yehova, Suku ya Isareli."
1Chronicles16:5 Usongui waco Asafe, u o kuaimo Sakariya, kuenda Yeyele la Semiramote la Yehiyele la Matitiya la Eliava la Benaya la Oved Edome la Yeyele. Va sika ovisumba lolohalupa. Asafe puãi wa totãlisa ayundu."
1Chronicles16:6 Benaya la Yahasiele, ovitunda, va sika sika olombeta kovaso yocikasa covisila via Suku."
1Chronicles16:7 Keteke liaco muẽle, ca linga onjanja yatate okuti Daviti wa eca ku Asafe lokovangandiaye osamo eyi yoku pandula Yehova."
1Chronicles16:8 Panduli Yehova, vilikiyi onduko yaye. Sapuili omanu ovilinga viaye."
1Chronicles16:9 Wimbili ovisungo, wimbili ovisungo viesivayo. Vanguli ovikomo viaye viosi."
1Chronicles16:10 Lipandi londuko yaye yi kola. Ovitima viava va sanda Yehova vi yolele.
1Chronicles16:11 Sandi Yehova longusu yaye. Sandi ocipala caye oloneke viosi.
1Chronicles16:12 Ivaluki ovopange aye a linga, a saluisa, lovikomo viaye lolonimbu viomela waye,"
1Chronicles16:13 ene ambuto ya Avirahama ukuenje waye, ene amãla va Yakoba, wa noliwi laye."
1Chronicles16:14 Eye Yehova Suku yetu. Olonimbu viaye vi li voluali luosi.
1Chronicles16:15 Wa ivaluka ocisila caye oloneke viosi. Ondaka a handeleka kohulukãi yovitumbulukila,"
1Chronicles16:16 a likuminya la Avirahama, a eca ku Isake loku lisinga,"
1Chronicles16:17 wa yi kolisavo ku Yakoba ndocisila, ku Isareli ndocisila ka ci pui."
1Chronicles16:18 Hati, hu iha ofeka ya Kanana, ulilo wocipiñalo cene."
1Chronicles16:19 Cina va kaile alume ka va luile, ocili vañamiñami, haivo ovakombe,"
1Chronicles16:20 va tungayala kolofeka, va tunda kuviali u, veya komanu vakuavo,"
1Chronicles16:21 eye ka tavele umue oku va linga cĩvi. Ocili, wa pisa olosoma mekonda liavo,"
1Chronicles16:22 hati, Ko ka lambi kolombuavekua viange. Ko ka lingisi ovaprofeto vange."
1Chronicles16:23 Imbili Yehova, ene alofeka viosi. Lombololi eyovo liaye eteke keteke."
1Chronicles16:24 Sapuli ulamba waye kolofeka, ovikomo viaye pokati komanu vosi."
1Chronicles16:25 Omo Yehova unene, wa posokela esivayo lia piãla, haeye wa posokela esumbilo lia piãla, olosuku viosi ci sule."
1Chronicles16:26 Momo olosuku viosi violofeka, oviteka viaño. Puãi Yehova wa lulika ovailu."
1Chronicles16:27 Kovaso aye ku kasi ulamba lunene; vonembele yaye, upami lesanju."
1Chronicles16:28 Muisi Yehova, ene apata omanu, muisi Yehova ulamba lunene."
1Chronicles16:29 Muisi Yehova ulamba wa posokela onduko yaye. Neni ocilumba, enjui kovaso aye, fendeli Yehova leposo li kola."
1Chronicles16:30 Lulumili kovaso aye, alofeka viosi. Oluali laluovo lua kola, ka lu sondoloka."
1Chronicles16:31 Ovailu a sanjuke. Ongongo yi yolele. Va sapule kolofeka vati, Yehova o viala."
1Chronicles16:32 Okalunga kõle lovina viosi vie yukamo. Ovisenge viulule, la viosi vi kasimo."
1Chronicles16:33 Oco oviti viusenge vimba ovisungo vionjolela kovaso a Yehova, momo iya, ha tepela olofeka."
1Chronicles16:34 Panduli Yehova, momo uwa, omo ohenda yaye ka yi pui."
1Chronicles16:35 Popi hoti, Tu popele, a Suku yeyovo lietu. Tu ongolole, tu popele kolofeka, ha tu pandula onduko yove yi kola, ha tu ulula loku ku sivaya."
1Chronicles16:36 Yehova Suku ya Isareli a sivayiwe, tunde ka ku ci toke ka ku ci. Omanu vosi va linga vati, Amene, kuenje va sivaya Yehova."
1Chronicles16:37 Oco Daviti wa sia Asafe lavangandiaye kovaso yocikasa covisila via Yehova, ha va vumbi kovaso yocikasa, loku linga eteke keteke upange wa va sesamela."
1Chronicles16:38 Wa siavo Oved Edome lavangandiaye akui epandu lecẽlãla. Oved Edome, omõla a Yedutunu, la Hosa, ovo vakualombundi."
1Chronicles16:39 Kuenda ocitunda Sadoke la vangandiaye ovitunda, wa va kapa kovaso yotavernakulu ya Yehova, kowulu wa kala ko Giveone,"
1Chronicles16:40 ha va lumbaila Yehova ovilumba vioku pia elisi kilu liutala wovilumba vioku pia elisi, omele loñolosi, ndomo muẽle ca sonehiwa vovihandeleko via Yehova, vina a handeleka Isareli."
1Chronicles16:41 Kumue lavo kua kala Hemani la Yedutunu, la vakuavo va nõliwa, va tukuiwa kolonduko, ha va imbi olopandu ku Yehova, momo ohenda yaye yenda ño hu."
1Chronicles16:42 Hemani la Yedutunu va kala lolombeta layundu avakuakusika, kuenda ovisikilo viovisungo via Suku. Omala va Yedutunu, ovo vakualombundi."
1Chronicles16:43 Oco omanu vosi va enda, omunu omunu konjo yaye. Daviti wa tiukila ha sumuluisa onjo yaye."
1Chronicles17:1 Eci Daviti a kala vonjo yaye, Daviti wa popia luprofeto Natana hati, Tala, ame ñasi vonjo yovinendele, puãi ocikasa covisila via Yehova ci kasi ño vombalaka."
1Chronicles17:2 Natana wa popia la Daviti hati, Linga cosi ci li vutima wove momo Suku o kasi love."
1Chronicles17:3 Uteke waco puãi ondaka ya Yehova yeya ku Natana, yiti,"
1Chronicles17:4 Kuende ka sapuile ukuenje wange Daviti, huti, Ca popia Yehova ceci, hati, Ku ka nungile onjo yoku kalamo."
1Chronicles17:5 Momo sia la kala vonjo tunde eteke nda nena Isareli kulo toke etaili lilo. Puãi nda kala volombalaka viñi viñi lovovitumãlo viñi viñi.
1Chronicles17:6 Kuosi nda ñuala la Isareli yosi, kuli hẽ limue eteke nda pula olonganji via Isareli vana nda kapa ndangombo vomanu vange, siti, Nye ka wa nungilili onjo yovinendele?"
1Chronicles17:7 Oco popia lukuenje wange Daviti, huti, Ca popia Yehova Ukualohoka ceci, hati, Nda ku upa kovisenge koku tata olomeme okuti o linga Soma yomanu vange va Isareli."
1Chronicles17:8 Nda kala kala love kuosi wa endaenda, nda kundula ovanyali vove vosi kovaso ove, kuenda hu muisa onduko ndonduko yava va kemãla kilu lieve."
1Chronicles17:9 Kuenje mongiyila omanu vange va Isareli ocitumãlo, ndi va tuika ndocikũla okuti va kala vocitumãlo cavo muẽle, kuenje ka va sakalaisua vali. Olongangala ka vi va nyõli vali, ndeci via lingaile osimbu,"
1Chronicles17:10 tunde kotembo nda nolela omanu vange va Isareli olonganji. Mokuisavo ovanyali vove vosi. Kuenda vali hu sapuila okuti Yehova o ku tungila onjo.
1Chronicles17:11 Eci oloneke viove vi telisua kuenje o ka kala lolosekulu viove, oco noke ñatula ombuto yove, umue wopomãla vove muẽle, kuenje ndi pamisa uviali waye."
1Chronicles17:12 Eye o nungila onjo, lame ndi pamisa ocalo caye otembo ka yi pui."
1Chronicles17:13 Ame ndinga isiaye leye o linga omolange. Ohenda yange ka yi pongoloka si yupi kokuaye ndeci nda yupa ku u wa ku livangela,"
1Chronicles17:14 puãi ndu kolisila ño hu vonjo yange lovusoma wange, ocalo caye ci tumãla ño hu otembo ka yi pui."
1Chronicles17:15 Natana wa sapuila Daviti olondaka evi viosi locinjonde eci cosi.
1Chronicles17:16 Oco Soma Daviti wa iñila, wa tumãla kovaso a Yehova, yu wa popia hati, Ame hẽ, ame elie, a Yehova Suku, lepata liange lie, okuti wa songuila toke cilo?"
1Chronicles17:17 Haimo lumue eci citito kovaso ove a Suku. Momo wa tukuila epata liukuenje wove oloneke vi keya kovaso, wa sokisa lomunu o kuete omangu yinene, a Yehova Suku."
1Chronicles17:18 Kondaka yulamba wa muisa ukuenje wove, Daviti hẽ, o popiako vali nye? Wa kulĩha ukuenje wove."
1Chronicles17:19 A Yehova, omo wa sola ukuenje wove, lomo wa ci panga vutima wove, oco wa lingila unene waco wosi, loku situluila ovina evi vinene."
1Chronicles17:20 A Yehova, ndovina viosi tua yeva lovatui etu, ka kuli wa lisoka love, ka kuli Suku yikuavo."
1Chronicles17:21 Kilu lieve epata li pi lia lisoka lomanu vove va Isareli, vana Suku a endele oku va yovola ha va lingi omanu vaye, onduko yove ha yi kemala lovikomo viene vi koka usumba, loku tundisa olofeka kovaso omanu vove vana wa yovola kEgito?"
1Chronicles17:22 Momo omanu vove va Isareli wa va lingisa vove muẽle, toke koloneke ka vi pui, kuenje ove a Yehova, wa linga Suku yavo."
1Chronicles17:23 Kaliye, a Yehova, ondaka wa popia, yi tiamela kukuenje wove lokepata liaye, yi kolisiwe ño hu. Linga ndomo wa popia."
1Chronicles17:24 Yi kolisiwe, oco onduko yove yi kemainyaiwe ño hũ, oco omanu va popie vati, Yehova Ukualohoka, Suku ya Isareli, eye muẽle Suku ya Isareli. Kuenda epata liukuenje wove Daviti li kolisiwe kovaso ove."
1Chronicles17:25 Momo ove, a Suku yange, wa situlula kukuenje wove okuti wu tungila epata, oco ukuenje wove wa kuata utoi woku likutilila kovaso ove."
1Chronicles17:26 Kaliye, a Yehova, ove Suku, kuenje wa likuminya kukuenje wove ocina eci ca posoka."
1Chronicles17:27 Wa tava oku sumuluisa epata liukuenje wove, ha li kala ño hu kovaso ove. Momo a Yehova eci cosi ove o sumuluisa, ci sumuluha muẽle toke koloneke ka vi pui."
1Chronicles18:1 Kovaso yaco, Daviti wa yula va Filisiti, yu wa va vumbisa. Wa tambula Gati kumue lovaimbo alio peka lia va Filisiti."
1Chronicles18:2 Wa yula Moavi, kuenje va Moavi va linga akuenje va Daviti, yu vo lambuila ulambu."
1Chronicles18:3 Daviti wa yulavo Hadadesere, Soma ya Sova ko Hamati, osimbu a kala loku enda oku ka pamisila uviali waye kolui Ferati."
1Chronicles18:4 Daviti wo nyeha ohũlũkãi yakalu, lolohũlũkãi epanduvali viavakuakuendela kotuvalu, lakui avali kolohũlũkãi viasualali vakuakuendela posi. Daviti wa lakula akanja otuvalu tuosi tuakãlu, puãi wa supisapo otuvalu tuocita cakalu."
1Chronicles18:5 Eci va Suria vo ko Damasko veya oku kuatisa Hadadesere, Soma ya Sova, oco Daviti wa ipaya akui avali lavivali kolohũlũkãi via va Suria."
1Chronicles18:6 Oco Daviti wa kapa ovisoko viasualali vo Suria ya Damasko. Va Suria va linga akuenje va Daviti, kuenje vo lambuila ulambu. Yehova wa yulaisa Daviti kuosi a enda."
1Chronicles18:7 Daviti wa tambula oviyepelo viulu vina viambatelue lakuenje va Hadadesere, kuenje wa vi nena ko Yerusalãi."
1Chronicles18:8 Ko Tivihati lo ko Kuni ovaimbo a Hadadesere, Daviti wopako osipi yalua. Salomone oyo a tunga layo ociva cosipi lolongunji lovikuata viosipi."
1Chronicles18:9 Eci Tou, Soma ya Hamati, a yeva okuti Daviti wa yula olohoka viosi via Hadadesere, Soma ya Sova,"
1Chronicles18:10 oco wa tuma omolaye Hadorama ku Soma Daviti oku ko lama loku u panduila omo a yaka la Hadadesere, yu wo yula. Momo Hadadesere wa liyaka yaka calua la Tou. Kuenje wa tuma ovikuata viñi viñi viulu lopalata losipi."
1Chronicles18:11 Evi laviovo Soma Daviti wa vi tumbika ku Yehova, kumue lopalata lulu a pundile kolofeka viosi, kEdome la Moavi, loko va Amoni la va Filisiti la Amaleke."
1Chronicles18:12 Avisiai, omõla a Ceruya, wa ipaila ekui lecelala kolohulũkãi via va Edome vocimbota comongua."
1Chronicles18:13 Wa kapa ovisoko viasualali vo Edome. Va Edome vosi va linga akuenje va Daviti. Yehova wa yulaisa Daviti kuosi a enda.
1Chronicles18:14 Oco Daviti wa viala Isareli yosi. Wa tepisaila omanu vaye vosi lesunga locili.
1Chronicles18:15 Yoava omõla a Ceruya wa kala kesongo kolohoka. Yehosafata omõla a Ahilude wa kala usoleki walivulu.
1Chronicles18:16 Sadoke omõla a Ahituva kuenda Ahimeleke omõla a Aviatare, va kala ovitunda. Siavisia wa kala usonehi."
1Chronicles18:17 Benaya omõla a Yehoyada wa kala usongui wa va Kerete la va Pelete. Omãla va Daviti va kala asongui vupange wa Soma.
1Chronicles19:1 Kovaso yaco, Nahasi Soma ya va Amoni wa fa, kuenje omolaye wa piñala komangu yaye."
1Chronicles19:2 Daviti wa popia hati, Ñuatela Hanuni omõla a Nahasi ohenda, momo isiaye wa ñuatelele ohenda. Oco Daviti wa tuma olomunga oku ko lembelekela isiaye. Akuenje va David veya ku Hanuni vofeka ya va Amoni ha vo lembeleka."
1Chronicles19:3 Puãi olombuale via va Amoni via popia la Hanuni vati, Wa soka nga okuti omo Daviti a tuma kokuove ava va ku lembeleka, wa ci lingila esumbilo lia so? Akuenje vaye ka veyilile nga kokuove oku kulihisa ofeka loku yi nyõla loku yi lavulula?"
1Chronicles19:4 Oco Hanuni wa kuata akuenje va Daviti, wa va pemula, wa tetela uwalo wavo vombuelo yatako avo, yu wa va katula, kuenje va enda."
1Chronicles19:5 Eci va sapuila Daviti ondaka yalume vaco, eye wa tuma oku va landula, momo alume vaco va kala losõi yalua. Kuenje Soma hati, Kali handi ko Yeriko, toke olonjele viene vi kula vali, oco wiyi noke."
1Chronicles19:6 Eci va Amoni va limbuka okuti va likokela esuvu lia Daviti, oco Hanuni la va Amoni va tuma ohulũkãi yolotalendo viopalata oku fetela akalu lavakuakuendela kotuvalu voko Mesopotamia lokArama Maaka loko Sova."
1Chronicles19:7 Va fetela olohũlũkãi akuĩ atatu la vivali viakalu kuenda Soma ya Maaka kumue lolohoka viaye. Eye weya, yu wa tunga ocilombo kovaso a Medeva. Va Amoni va tunda vovaimbo avo, va liongoluila pamosi ha va yaki."
1Chronicles19:8 Eci Daviti a ci yeva, wa tuma Yoava kumue lolohoka viosi vialume va pama."
1Chronicles19:9 Va Amoni va tunda, va lialeka kepandavelo, osimbu olosoma vina vieyile, via likalela kusenge."
1Chronicles19:10 Eci Yoava a limbuka ndomo ocilunga ca kala, okuti konyima yaye ovita, kovaso yaye ovita, oco wa nola vamue pokati kasualali va velapo va va Isareli kuenje wa va aleka ha va yaki la va Suria."
1Chronicles19:11 Asualali vaye va supapo wa va eca peka lia manjaye Avisiai, kuenje va lialeka ha va yaki la va Amoni."
1Chronicles19:12 Eye wa popia hati, Nda ame va Suria si va tela oco ove wiya o ñuatisa. Puãi nda ove va Amoni ku va tela, oco ame hu kuatisa."
1Chronicles19:13 Kolisako! Tu linge ndalume mekonda liomanu vetu kuenda mekonda liovaimbo a Suku yetu. Yehova a linge eci co sungulukila.
1Chronicles19:14 Oco Yoava lomanu va kala kumue laye vamela ko va Suria ha va yaki, lovo va tila kovaso aye."
1Chronicles19:15 Eci va Amoni va mõla okuti va Suria va tila, lavovo va tila kovaso a Avisiai manja a Yoava kuenje va iñila vimbo. Oco Yoava weya ko Yerusalãi."
1Chronicles19:16 Puãi eci va Suria va limbuka okuti va yuliwa la Isareli, va tuma olomunga yu via kopile va Suria vana va kala kesinya lia Ferati. Siofake kesongo kolohoka via Hadadesere, eye wa va songuila."
1Chronicles19:17 Eci ca yevala ku Daviti, oco wongolola Isareli yosi, va yoka Yordão, yu veya ku va Suria kuenje va va katuila ovita. Eci Daviti a alekela va Suria ocilunga, ovo va yaka laye."
1Chronicles19:18 Va Suria va tila kovaso a Isareli, kuenje po va Suria Daviti wa ipapo alume vakuakuendisa olohũlukãi epanduvali viakãlu, lolohũlukai akuĩ a kuãla viasualali vakuakuendela posi. Wa ipavo Siofake kesongo kolohoka viavo."
1Chronicles19:19 Eci akuenje va Hadadesere va limbuka okuti va yuliwa la Isareli oco va linalisa la Daviti, kuenje vo vumba. Oco va Suria ka va tavele vali oku kuatisa va Amoni."
1Chronicles20:1 Kotembo yokuca kuolombela, haiyo otembo olosoma viendaenda kovita, oco Yoava wa tunda lolohoka, kuenje wa kundula ofeka ya va Amoni. Wa enda ko Raba, yu wa li ñuala ocingonja. Daviti puãi wa siala ko Yerusalãi. Yoava wa yula Raba, yu wa li kundula."
1Chronicles20:2 Daviti wopa ekolowa kutue wa Soma yavo. Wa mõla okuti okulema kualio kua soka ndotalendo yulu, kuenda vokati kalio mua kala ewe limue lia tĩla calua. Yu va li kapa kutue wa Daviti. Vimbo va pundamo ovikuata viakahandangala."
1Chronicles20:3 Wopavo omanu va kalamo, wa va kapa kupange woku selala lowu wetemo londiaviti. Eci oco Daviti a linga lovaimbo osi a va Amoni. Oco Daviti lomanu vosi va tiukila ko Yerusalãi."
1Chronicles20:4 Kovaso yaco ko Gesere kua kenduka ovita la va Filisiti. Sibekai u Husiati wa ipa Sipai, ukuambuto yovindululu, va Filisiti va yuliwa."
1Chronicles20:5 Kueya vali oku yaka la va Filisiti. Elihanana, omõla a Yairi, wa ipa Lahimi manja a Goliata u Giti. Ocikundo conjelia yaye ca soka nduti womakina yoku tuta olonanga."
1Chronicles20:6 Kueya vali ovita ko Gati, haiko kua kala ulume umue wa lepa calua. Wa kala lovimuine epandu keka leka, lovimuine epandu komai lomai, viosi via tẽla akuĩ avali la vikuala. Leyevo ukuambuto yovindululu."
1Chronicles20:7 Eci a vayela Isareli, Yonatão omõla a Simea, manja a Daviti, wa wipa."
1Chronicles20:8 Avandeti vakuambuto yovindululu vio ko Gati. Va pondiwa leka lia Daviti leka liakuenje vaye.
1Chronicles21:1 Satana wa katukila Isareli, yu wa tutuminya Daviti ha tendi va Isareli."
1Chronicles21:2 Oco Daviti wa popia la Yoava la vakesongo kolohoka hati, Kuendi, ka tendi va Isareli, tunde ko Bereseva toke ko Dani, oco vu ci sapuili okuti ñuliha nda vañami."
1Chronicles21:3 Yoava puãi hati, Omanu vaye nda vañami nda vañami, Yehova a va luise ocita colonjanja. A cime cange, a Soma, ovo havosiko he akuenje va cime cange? Cime cange o ci yonguila nye? Nye a kokelela Isareli ongole?"
1Chronicles21:4 Puãi ondaka ya Soma ya yula ondaka ya Yoava. Oco Yoava wa katuka wa ñuala kIsareli yosi, kuenje wa tiuka ko Yerusalãi."
1Chronicles21:5 Yoava wa sapuila Daviti okutendiwa kuaco kuomanu. KIsareli yosi kua kala ohuluwa locita colohulukãi vialume vakualosipata, kuenda ko Yuda kua kala ovita vikuala lakuĩ epandu vali kolohũlũkãi viavakualosipata."
1Chronicles21:6 Puãi ka tendele va Lewi la va Benjamini, momo ocihandeleko ca Soma ku Yoava ca linga ndumbondo."
1Chronicles21:7 Puãi Suku ka sanjukile lelinga eli, kuenje wa veta Isareli."
1Chronicles21:8 Daviti wa popia la Suku hati, Nda lueya calua oku linga ndoco. Cilo puãi, hu pinga, upa ongole yukuenje wove, momo ocili nda linga uveke."
1Chronicles21:9 Yehova wa popia la Gadi, ukuavitumasuku velombe lia Daviti, hati,"
1Chronicles21:10 Kuende, ka sapuile Daviti huti, Ca popia Yehova ceci, hati, Hu tukuila ovina vitatu. Pokati kavio nolapo cimue, oco hu ci lingile."
1Chronicles21:11 Oco Gadi weya ku Daviti, wa popia laye hati, Ca popia Yehova ceci, hati, Upapo eci o yongola:"
1Chronicles21:12 Nda anyamo atatu elambu; nda oku kundulua olosai vitatu lovanyali vove, osimbu osipata yovanyali vove yi ku landula; pamue vali oloneke vitatu viosipata ya Yehova ndokuti efengi vofeka osimbu ungelo wa Yehova a kundula vofeka yosi ya Isareli. Kaliye teta onimbu, si tiula etambululo ku u wa numa."
1Chronicles21:13 Oco Daviti wa popia la Gadi hati, Nda sakatela cimue! Hise ndi wile peka lia Yehova, momo ohenda yaye yalua. Si ka wile peka liomunu."
1Chronicles21:14 Oco Yehova wa tuma efengi kIsareli, Kuenje kIsareli kua fa akui epanduvali kolohũlũkãi viomanu."
1Chronicles21:15 Suku wa tuma ungelo ko Yerusalãi ha yi nyõli. Eci a si oku yi nyõla, Yehova wa vanjako kuenje wa livela nda ka tumile ohali yaco. Wa popia lungelo una wa kala loku nyõla hati, Kua pua, liwekapo. Ungelo wa Yehova wa talama kocimbandi ca Orinane u Yevusi."
1Chronicles21:16 Daviti wa petula ovaso aye kuenje wa mõla ungelo wa Yehova o tai pokati kosi lilu. Peka liaye pali osipata ya tua yõluiwilua Yerusalãi. Oco Daviti kumue lakulu, haivo va wala ovikelei, va lituvika posi."
1Chronicles21:17 Daviti wa popia la Suku hati, Hameko hẽ nda tumile oku tenda omanu? Ame, ame nda linga ekandu, haime nda lueya calua. Puãi olomeme evi hẽ, nye via linga? A Yehova Suku yange, hu pinga, eka liove li mbete ame, li vetevo epata lia tate, puãi ekundu ka li ka wile omanu vove."
1Chronicles21:18 Oco ungelo wa Yehova wa tuma Gadi ha sapuila Daviti okuti Daviti a lamane, kuenda a tungile Yehova utala kocimbandi ca Orinane u Yevusi."
1Chronicles21:19 Oco londaka ya Gadi, yina a popele vonduko ya Yehova, Daviti wa lamanelako."
1Chronicles21:20 Kaliye Orinane wa kala loku sasa otiliku. Wa ñualapo, yu wa mõla ungelo, kuenje omãla vaye vakuãla valume, vana va kala kumue laye, va salama."
1Chronicles21:21 Eci Daviti eya ku Orinane, Orinane wa vanja, yu wa mõla Daviti. Wa tunda kocimbandi, wa petamela kovaso a Daviti, wa tuvika ocipala caye posi."
1Chronicles21:22 Daviti wa popia la Orinane, hati, Nyihe ocimbandi oco nungilepo Yehova utala. Ci nyihe, hu feta ondando yaco ya soka. Oco ekundu limuhe pokati komanu."
1Chronicles21:23 Oco Orinane wa popia la Daviti, hati, Ci tambula ño! Cime cange Soma a linge eci co sungulukila. Tala, ngeca olongombe viovilumba vioku pia elisi, lolombulo vioku sasa ha vi lingi olohui, lotiliku yocilumba colomema. Cosi ndi ceca."
1Chronicles21:24 Puãi Soma Daviti wa popia la Orinane, hati, Oco hacoko, te ndi ci landa loku feta cosi. Si yongola oku tambula eci cove si ceci ku Yehova, ndaño oku lumba ovilumba vioku pia elisi evi ka via meselele."
1Chronicles21:25 Oco Daviti wa landa ocimbandi, yu wa feta ku Orinane ovita epandu violosiekele viulu wa pesaliwa."
1Chronicles21:26 Daviti oko a tungila Yehova utala. Wa lumba ovilumba vioku pia elisi lovilumba viombembua. Wa vilikiya ku Yehova, leye wo tambulula londalu yokilu, yu ya lokila kutala wocilumba coku pia elisi."
1Chronicles21:27 Oco Yehova wa handeleka ungelo, leye wa someha osipata yaye vocilalo cayo."
1Chronicles21:28 Kotembo yaco, eci Daviti a limbuka okuti Yehova wo kumbulula kocimbandi ca Orinane u Yevusi, oco wa lumbilako ovilumba."
1Chronicles21:29 Momo koloneke viaco ombalaka ya Yehova, yina Mose a tungile vekalasoko, lutala wocilumba coku pia elisi, via kala konumbuko ya Giveone."
1Chronicles21:30 Puãi Daviti ka telele oku endako ha puliliya Suku, momo wa kala lusumba wosipata yungelo wa Yehova."
1Chronicles22:1 Daviti wa popia hati, Yilo oyo onjo ya Yehova Suku, ulo owo utala wocilumba coku yokela va Isareli ovilumba vioku pia elisi."
1Chronicles22:2 Daviti wa handeleka oku ongolola vakualofeka va kala vofeka ya Isareli, kuenje wa tuma vakuakusonga ovawe ha va songi ovawe oku tunga onjo ya Suku."
1Chronicles22:3 Daviti wangiliya utale walua woku linga olombambo viapito kuenda atokekelo, kuenda osipi yalua okuti ndaño oku yi pesala, ka ci teliwa;"
1Chronicles22:4 kuenda ovinendele viakahandangala, momo va Sitono la va Turo va nena ovinendele via lua ku Daviti."
1Chronicles22:5 Daviti wa popia hati, Omolange Salomone umalehe handi, ka kolele, kuenda onjo yi tungilua Yehova yi laika oku posoka ca piala, oco ekemãlo liayo lulamba wayo u yevale kolofeka viosi. Oco njongola oku yangiliyila. Kuenje Daviti wangiliya ovina vialua osimbu ka file handi."
1Chronicles22:6 Yu wa kovonga omolaye Salomone, kuenje wa wiha ocikundi coku tungila Yehova Suku ya Isareli onjo."
1Chronicles22:7 Daviti wa popia la Salomone, hati, Amolange, ame nda kala lutima woku tungila onduko ya Yehova Suku yange onjo."
1Chronicles22:8 Puãi ondaka ya Yehova yeya kokuange, yiti, Ove wa pesela osonde yalua, wa linga ovita vinene, oco ku tungila onduko yange onjo, momo wa pesela osonde yalua kilu lieve, kovaso ange."
1Chronicles22:9 Ota, o ka cita omõla ulume, o linga ukuepuyuko, kuenje ndu wiha epuyuko kovanyali vaye vosi, vana va ñuala; momo onduko yaye Salomone, kuenje koloneke viaye ngeca ombembua lepuyuko kIsareli."
1Chronicles22:10 Eye o tungila onduko yange onjo. O linga omolange, lame ndinga isiaye, kuenje ñolisa ocalo cuviali waye kIsareli, oloneke ka vi pui."
1Chronicles22:11 Kaliye, amolange, Yehova a kale love, oco o sumuluhe. Tunga onjo ya Yehova Suku yove, ndomo a ku ci popela."
1Chronicles22:12 Ewa, Yehova a ku ihe olondunge lukulihiso kuenda a ku ihe ocikundi coku viala Isareli, oco o pokole kovihandeleko via Yehova, Suku yove."
1Chronicles22:13 Oco o sumuluha nda o lingainga lutate ovihandeleko lovisila via Isareli vina Yehova a kundika Mose. Kolisako, kuata utõi! Ku ka kale lusumba, ku ka yokoke!"
1Chronicles22:14 Kaliye, tala, ndaño lasakalalo alua, haimo nda angiliyila onjo ya Yehova ocita colohũlũkãi violotalendo viulu kuenda ohuluwa yolotalendo viopalata, kuendavo osipi lutale, haivio ka via pesalelue, momo vialua enene. Nda angiliyavo oviti lovawe love hu vokiyakovo."
1Chronicles22:15 Kuenda vali kuli vakuopange valua va kasi love, vakuakusonga ovawe, lolokalupindelu lolomesele via loñoloha kovopange aiñi aiñi."
1Chronicles22:16 Ulu lopalata losipi lutale, oku vi tenda ka ci teliwa. Votoka, kuatako, Yehova a kale love."
1Chronicles22:17 Daviti wa handelekavo olombuale viosi via Isareli, ha va kuatisa omolaye Salomone, hati,"
1Chronicles22:18 Yehova Suku yene ka kasi hẽ lene? Ka wihili hẽ ombembua kolonele viosi? Eye wa eca peka liange olonungi viofeka, kuenje ofeka ya pokuisilua kovaso a Yehova lomanu vaye."
1Chronicles22:19 Kaliye likapeli oku sanda Yehova Suku yene longusu yene yosi lutima wene wosi. Oco katuki, tungi onembele ya Yehova Suku, ho nena ocikasa covisila via Yehova, kumue lovikuata vi kola via Suku vonjo yi laika oku tungilua onduko ya Yehova."
1Chronicles23:1 Eci Daviti a linga ekongo haeye ukualoneke via lua, oco wa tumbika omolaye Salomone ndosoma ya Isareli."
1Chronicles23:2 Yu wongolola olombuale viosi via Isareli, lovitunda la va Lewi."
1Chronicles23:3 Va Lewi vakuanyamo akuĩ atatu lava va pitahalamo va tendiwa ulume lulume, kuenje va soka olohũlũkãi akui atatu lecelala."
1Chronicles23:4 Daviti wa popia hati, Pokati kavo pa kale olohũlũkãi akuĩ avali la vikuãla va kundikiwa upange wonjo ya Yehova. Olohũlũkãi epandu va linge ovakulu lolonganji."
1Chronicles23:5 Olohũlũkãi vikuãla va linge vakualombundi, Olohũlũkãi vikuãla va tumbangiye Yehova lovisikilo vina nda pangela oku sivaya lavio."
1Chronicles23:6 Daviti wa va tepa kovisoko, ndapata omãla va Lewi, Gerisiono la Kohata la Merari."
1Chronicles23:7 Pova Gerisiono, Ladana la Simei."
1Chronicles23:8 Omãla va Ladana, Yehiyele, usongui, kuenda Setama la Yoele, vatatu."
1Chronicles23:9 Omala va Simei, vava: Selomiti la Hasiyele la Harana, vatatu. Ovo olosekulu viapata a Ladana."
1Chronicles23:10 Omãla va Simei vava: Yahate la Sina la Yewusi kuenda Beriya. Kakuala kavo omãla va Simei.
1Chronicles23:11 Yahate eye usongui, wavali Sina. Puãi Yewusi la Beriya ka va kaile lomãla valua, oco va linga ño epata limuamue pokutendiwa kuaco."
1Chronicles23:12 Omãla va Kohata vava: Amirama la Yicihare la Hevirone kuenda Usiyele, vakuala."
1Chronicles23:13 Omãla va Amirama, Arone la Mose. Arone puãi wa tepiwa kuvakuavo, ha kolisa ovina via piala koku kola, eye kumue lomãla vaye, toke oloneke ka vi pui, ha va timĩha insensu kovaso a Yehova, loku u vumba loku sumuluisila vonduko yaye oloneke ka vi pui."
1Chronicles23:14 Puãi omãla va Mose, omunu wa Suku, va tendelua vepata lia Lewi."
1Chronicles23:15 Omãla va Mose, Gerisiomo la Eliyesere."
1Chronicles23:16 Omãla va Gerisiomo, Sevuele haeye usongui."
1Chronicles23:17 Omãla va Eliyesere, Rehaviya, haeye usongui. Eliyesere ka kaile vali lomãla vakuavo, puãi omãla va Rehaviya va luile muẽle."
1Chronicles23:18 Omãla va Yicihare, Selomiti, haeye usongui."
1Chronicles23:19 Omãla va Hevirone, vava: Yeriya haeye usongui, wavali Amariya, watatu Yahasiele, wakuãla Yekameama."
1Chronicles23:20 Omãla va Usiyele, Mika, haeye usongui, kuenda wavali Yesiya."
1Chronicles23:21 Omãla va Merari, Mahili la Musi. Omãla va Mahili, Eleasa la Kisi."
1Chronicles23:22 Eleasa wa fa, lomãla valume lakamue, te lika omãla vakãi. Kuenje vangandiavo, omãla va Kisi, va va kuela."
1Chronicles23:23 Omãla va Musi, Mahili la Edere la Yeremote, vatatu."
1Chronicles23:24 Ava ovo va Lewi ndapata olosekulu viavo, haivo akulu vapata avo ndomo va tendiwa kolonduko, omunu omunu. Ovo va linga upange woku vumba vonjo ya Yehova, tunde ku vakuanyamo akui avali lava va pitahalamo."
1Chronicles23:25 Momo Daviti wa popia hati, Yehova Suku ya Isareli wa eca epuyuko komanu vaye, kuenje o tunga ño hu vo Yerusalãi."
1Chronicles23:26 Oco va Lewi ka va kuete vali oku ambata otavemakulu lovikuata viosi viupange waco.
1Chronicles23:27 Ndocihandeleko ca sulako ca Daviti, va Lewi, vakuanyamo akui avali lava va pitahalamo, va tendiwa vosi."
1Chronicles23:28 Ocikele cavo oku kuatisa va Arone kupange wonjo ya Yehova, lovovitali lovolohondo, loku yelisa ovina viosi vi kola, loku linga upange wosi woku vumba vonjo ya Suku."
1Chronicles23:29 Va kalavo locikele combolo yoku taliwa, leci cosema ya fina yovilumba violomema, leci colombolo ka vi kuete etumbisa, levi via kangiwa vociyo, levi via yuyiwa, kuenda eci covikuata viosi vioku yonga, levi vioku seteka okulepa lusovi."
1Chronicles23:30 Omele lomele kuenda oñolosi loñolosi va talama loku pandula loku sivaya Yehova.
1Chronicles23:31 Kasambata lokokumoleha kuosãi lokoloneke violofesta va lumbaila kovaso a Yehova ovilumba viosi vioku pia elisi ndomo via tendiwa vovihandeleko vi tiamela kovilumba.
1Chronicles23:32 Va kalavo locikele combalaka yoku ñualẽhẽla la Yehova leci cohondo yi kola, leci ca vangandiavo va Arone, ha va lingi upange wonjo ya Yehova."
1Chronicles24:1 Ovisoko via va Arone, vievi: Omãla va Arone, vava: Nadava la Avihu la Eleasa kuenda Itamare."
1Chronicles24:2 Nadava la Avihu, ovo va tetekela isiavo okufa, yu ka va kaile lomãla. Oco Eleasa la Itamare va kala komangu yutunda."
1Chronicles24:3 Sadoke, wopo va Eleasa, kuenda Ahimeleke, wopo va Itamare, kavali kavo Daviti wa va tepisa kovisoko, ndupange wavo."
1Chronicles24:4 Po va Eleasa pa sangiwa asongui valua, po va Itamare ci sule. Ovo va tepiwa ndomo: po va Eleasa pa kala ekui lepandu kovakulu vapata. Kuenda po va Itamare, pa kale ecelala kovakulu vapata."
1Chronicles24:5 Va tepiwa locela, ocisoko locisoko, momo kua kala asongui vocitumãlo ci kola lasongui va Suku, ci kale po va Eleasa, ci kale po va Itamare."
1Chronicles24:6 Usonehi Semaya, omõla a Netanele, haeye u Lewi, wa va sonehela kovaso a Soma lolombuale, lokovaso a Sadoke ocitunda, la Ahimeleke omõla a Aviatare lokovaso ovakulu vapata lovitunda la va Lewi. Va Eleasa va va nolelapo epata limue, va Itamare va va nolelapovo epata limue."
1Chronicles24:7 Ocela catete ca veta Yehoyarive, cavali Yedaya;"
1Chronicles24:8 catatu Harimi, cakuãla Seori"
1Chronicles24:9 catãlo Malikiya, cepandu Miyamine;"
1Chronicles24:10 cepanduvali Hako, cecelala Aviya;"
1Chronicles24:11 cecea Yesiua, cekui Sekaniya;"
1Chronicles24:12 cekui lamosi Eliasivi, cekui lavali Yakimi;"
1Chronicles24:13 cekui latatu Hupa, cekui lakuãla Yeseveava;"
1Chronicles24:14 cekui latãlo Biliga, cekui lepandu Imere;"
1Chronicles24:15 cekui lepandu vali Hesiri, cekui lecelãla Haficece;"
1Chronicles24:16 cekui lecea Petahiya, cakui avali Yehesekele;"
1Chronicles24:17 cakui avali lamosi Yakini, cakui avali lavali Gamulu;"
1Chronicles24:18 cakui avali latatu, Delaya, cakui avali lakuãla Maasiya."
1Chronicles24:19 Va tukuilua ocikele coku iñila vonjo ya Yehova ndomo isiavo Arone a va ci sila, ndovihandeleko via wiha Yehova, Suku ya Isareli."
1Chronicles24:20 Omãla vakuavo va Lewi, vava: Pomala va Amirama, Siuvaele, kuenda pomãla va Siuvaele, Yehideya."
1Chronicles24:21 Pu Rehaviya, pomãla va Rehaviya, Yisiya usongui."
1Chronicles24:22 Po va Yicihare, Selomoti. Pomala va Selomoti, Yahate."
1Chronicles24:23 Omãla va Hevirone vava: watete Yeriya, wavali Amariya, watatu Yahasiele, wakuala Yekameama."
1Chronicles24:24 Omãla va Usiyele, Mika. Pomala va Mika, Siamiri."
1Chronicles24:25 Manja a Mika, Yisiya. Pomala va Yisiya, Sakariya."
1Chronicles24:26 Omãla va Merari, Mahili la Musi. Omãla va Yahasiya, Beno."
1Chronicles24:27 Omãla va Merari, haivo va Yahasiya, vava: Beno la Siohama la Sakuru kuenda Iviri."
1Chronicles24:28 Pu Mahili, Eleasa, haeye ka citile omãla valume."
1Chronicles24:29 Pomala va Kisi Yerahimele.
1Chronicles24:30 Omãla va Musi, Mahili la Edere la Yerimote. Ava ovo omãla va Lewi ndepata liolosekulu viavo."
1Chronicles24:31 Ovo, ndeci vangandiavo omãla va Arone, va imbavo ocela kovaso a Soma Daviti la Sadoke la Ahimeleke lokovaso ovakulu vapata ovitunda la va Lewi. Eci oco va linga, ci kale lukulu wepata, ci kale lu o sule povamanjaye."
1Chronicles25:1 Kuenda vali Daviti lavakesongo volohoka va tepa vamue pomala va Asafe, la Hemani la Yedutunu, ha va imbi owanji lolohalupa lovisumba layundu. Ava va kala lovikele viupange waco vava:"
1Chronicles25:2 Pomala va Asafe, Sakuru la Yosefe la Netaniya kuenda Asarela, omãla va Asafe, haivo va songuilua la Asafe, ukuakuimba owanji ndocihandeleko ca Soma."
1Chronicles25:3 Pu Yedutunu, omãla va Yedutunu, Gedaliya la Ceri la Yesiaya la Hasiaviya kuenda Matitiya, epandu. Ovo va songuilua la isiavo Yedutunu, ukuakuimba owanji lohalupa, loku pandula loku sivaya Yehova."
1Chronicles25:4 Pu Hemani, omãla va Hemani, Bukiya la Mataniya la Usiyele la Sevuele la Yerimote la Hananiya la Nanani la Eliyata la Gidaliti la Romamitiesere la Yosibikasia la Maloti la Hotiri kuenda Mahasiote."
1Chronicles25:5 Ava vosi omãla va Hemani, ukuakusituluila Soma olondaka via Suku, loku kemainya unene waye. Suku wa iha Hemani ekui lavakuala komala valume kuenda omãla vatatu vakãi."
1Chronicles25:6 Ovo vosi va linga upange wonjo ya Suku kuenje va songuilua la isiavo, oku imba ovisungo layundu lovisumba lolohalupa, vonjo ya Yehova. Asafe la Yedutunu la Hemani va yevelaila ku Soma."
1Chronicles25:7 Ovo oku va tenda kumue la vangandiavo vana va longisiwa oku imbiwa Yehova ovisungo, haivo vakuoloño, va soka ovita vivali lakui ecelala lecelala komanu."
1Chronicles25:8 Ci kale ava vatito vanene, ci kale alongisi lolondonge, vosi yavo va imbila ovikele viavo ocela."
1Chronicles25:9 Ocela catete ca veta Asafe, ca linga ca Yosefe. Cavali ca veta Gedaliya, lavamanjaye lomãla vaye ekui lavavali."
1Chronicles25:10 Catatu va veta Sakuru, lomãla vaye lavamanjaye, ekui lavavali."
1Chronicles25:11 Cakuala ca veta Yiciri lomãla vaye lavamanjaye, ekui lavavali."
1Chronicles25:12 Catãlo ca veta Netaniya, lomãla vaye lavamanjaye, ekui lavavali."
1Chronicles25:13 Cepandu ca veta Bukiya, lomãla vaye lavamanjaye, ekui la vavali."
1Chronicles25:14 Cepanduvali ca veta Yesiarela, lomãla vaye lavamanjaye, ekui lavavali."
1Chronicles25:15 Cecelala ca veta Yesiaya, lomãla vaye lavamanjaye, ekui lavavali."
1Chronicles25:16 Cecea ca veta Mataniya, lomãla vaye la vamanjaye, ekui lavavali."
1Chronicles25:17 Cekui ca veta Simei, lomãla vaye lavamanjaye ekui lavavali."
1Chronicles25:18 Cekui la mosi ca veta Asarele, lomãla vaye lavamanjaye ekui lavavali."
1Chronicles25:19 Cekui lavali ca veta Hasiaviya, lomãla vaye lavamanjaye ekui lavavali."
1Chronicles25:20 Cekui latatu, ca veta Siuvaele, lomãla vaye lavamanjaye ekui lavavali."
1Chronicles25:21 Cekui lakuãla ca veta Matitiya lomãla vaye lavamanjaye ekui lavavali.
1Chronicles25:22 Cekui latãlo ca veta Yeremote, lomãla vaye lavamanjaye ekui lavavali."
1Chronicles25:23 Cekui lepandu ca veta Hananiya, lomãla vaye lavamanjaye ekui la vavali."
1Chronicles25:24 Cekui lepanduvali ca veta Yosibikasia, lomãla vaye lavamanjaye ekui lavavali."
1Chronicles25:25 Cekui lecelala ca veta Hanani, lomãla vaye lavamanjaye, ekui lavavali."
1Chronicles25:26 Cekui lecea ca veta Maloti, lomãla vaye lavamanjaye, ekui lavavali."
1Chronicles25:27 Cakui avali ca veta Eliata lomãla vaye lavamanjaye, ekui lavavali."
1Chronicles25:28 Cakui avali lamosi ca veta Hotiri, lomãla vaye lavamanjaye, ekui lavavali."
1Chronicles25:29 Cakui avali lavali ca veta Gidaliti, lomãla vaye lavamanjaye ekui lavavali."
1Chronicles25:30 Cakui avali latatu ca veta Mahasiote, lomãla vaye lavamanjaye ekui lavavali."
1Chronicles25:31 Cakui avali lakuãla ca veta Romanitiesere, lomãla vaye lavamanajye, ekui lavavali."
1Chronicles26:1 Ovisoko viavakualombundi vievi: Po va Korihi, pa kala Meselemiya, omõla a Kore, umue pomala va Asafe."
1Chronicles26:2 Meselemiya wa kala lomãla, vava: Sakariya, uveli waye, wavali Yehiyaele, watatu Sevadiya, wakuala Yatiniyele,"
1Chronicles26:3 watalo Elami, wepandu Yehohanana, wepanduvali Eliyoenai."
1Chronicles26:4 Oved Edome wa kala lomãla, vava: Semaya uveli waye, wavali Yehosavade, watatu Yowa, wakuala Sakare, watãlo Netanele,"
1Chronicles26:5 wepandu Amiyele, wepanduvali Isakare, wecelala Peulitai, momo Suku wo sumuluisa."
1Chronicles26:6 Omolaye Semaya kuo citiluavo omãla, va viala vepata liolosekulu viavo, momo alume va pama vakuotoi."
1Chronicles26:7 Omãla va Semaya vava: Otini la Refaele la Ovede la Elisavade, lavamanjavo, Elihu la Semakiya, alume vakuotõi."
1Chronicles26:8 Ava vosi omãla va Oved Edome, ovo lomãla vavo kumue lavamanjavo, vosi yavo alume va pama, vakuangusu kupange. Va Oved Edome vosi va soka akui epandu lavavali."
1Chronicles26:9 Meselemiya wa kala lomãla lavamanjaye, ekui lecelala, alume vakuotoi."
1Chronicles26:10 Kuenda Hosa, wopomala va Merari, wa kalavo lomãla; vava: watete Simiri, ndaño heyeko uveli, haimo isiaye wo kapa kovaso ya vakuavo."
1Chronicles26:11 Wavali Hilikiya, watatu Tevaliya, wakuãla Sakariya. Omãla vosi va Hosa, lavamanjaye, va soka ekui lavatau."
1Chronicles26:12 Ovisoko evindeti viavakualombundi, lasongui vavio kumue la vamanjavo, va tambula ovikele vioku vumba vonjo ya Yehova."
1Chronicles26:13 Ci kale ava vatito, ci kale ava vanene, vosi va imbila olombundi viavo ocela, ndapata olosekulu viavo."
1Chronicles26:14 Ocela conele yokutundilo ca veta Selemiya. Noke va imbila omõlaye Sakariya ocela, ukuakulungula lolondunge, kuenje wa vetiya locela conele yoko Norte."
1Chronicles26:15 Onele yoko Sul ya eciwa ku Oved Edome, lonjo yolosila komãla vaye."
1Chronicles26:16 Siupi la Hosa va tambula onele yokutakelo kumosi lombundi Sialekete vonjila yi lamanisa. Ondavululi ya lisuñama londavululi.
1Chronicles26:17 Kutundilo kua kala va Lewi epandu, ko Norte vakuãla veteke, ko Sul vakuãla veteke, kuenda konjo yolosila kua kala vavali la vavali."
1Chronicles26:18 Ko Paribara, konele yutakelo, kua kala vakuãla konjila kuenda vavali ko Paribara."
1Chronicles26:19 Evi ovio ovisoko viavakualombundi, pomãla va va Korihi lopomãla va Merari."
1Chronicles26:20 Ahiya, umue pova Lewi, eye ukuacikele cukuasi wonjo ya Suku lukuasi wovina vi kola."
1Chronicles26:21 Omãla va Ladana, omãla va Ladana u Gerisiono, vava: Yehiyeli."
1Chronicles26:22 Omãla va Yehiyeli, Setama la Manjaye Yoele, ovo vakuacikele cukuasi wonjo ya Yehova."
1Chronicles26:23 Pova Amirama lopova Yicihare lopova Hevirone lopova Usiyele,"
1Chronicles26:24 pa kala Sevuele, omõla a Gerisiomo, omõla a Mose, eye kalei kovokuasi."
1Chronicles26:25 Vamanjaye va citiwa la Eliyesere, vava: omolaye Rehaviva, omõlaye Yesiaye, omolaye Yorame, omolaye Sikiri, omolaye Selomiti."
1Chronicles26:26 Eye Selomiti kumue la vamanjaye wa lava ukuasi wosi wovina vi kola, vina via tumbikiwa la Soma Daviti lolosekulu viapata lavakesongo volohũlũkãi lava vovita, kuenda vakesongo kolohoka."
1Chronicles26:27 Povikuata va pundile kovita va tumbikapo vimue oku tumbulula lavio onjo ya Yehova.
1Chronicles26:28 Cosi ca tumbikilue la Samuele ukuavinjoinjoi kuenda Saulu, omõla a a Kisi, la Avinere, omõla a Nere, la Yoava, omõla a Ceruya, lu wosi wa tumbikile cimue, ovina viaco viosi muẽle via kala peka lia Selomoti la vamanjaye."
1Chronicles26:29 Pova Yicihare, Kenaniya kumue lomãla vaye va linga upange wofeka ndolombiali kuenda ndolonganji kIsareli."
1Chronicles26:30 Pova Hevirone, Hasiaviya lavamanjaye, alume vocili, haivo va kala locikele ca Isareli kesinya lia Yordão, konele yutakelo, va soka ohulukãi lovita epanduvali komanu. Ovo va songuila upange wosi wa Yehova, lowu wa Soma."
1Chronicles26:31 Pova Hevirone, Yeriya eye sekulu ya va Hevirone, ndocikoti capata avo. Kulima wakui akuãla wusoma wa Daviti, va sandiliya pokati kavo, yu va sangapo alume va pama vakuotoi. Imbo liavo Yasere ya Gileada."
1Chronicles26:32 Vamanja a Yeriya alume vocili. Ovo va soka olohulukãi vivali lovita epanduvali kakulu vapata avo. Soma Daviti wa va kapa ndasongui va va Ruvene la va Gadi lonepa yepata lia va Manase, oku songola olondaka viosi vi tiamẽla ku Suku, levi via Soma."
1Chronicles27:1 Ava ovo va Isareli, ndomo va tendiwa, ndokuti akulu vapata la vakesongo volohũlũkãi lava vovita, kumosi lasongui vana va vumba Soma oku songowaila ovisoko viava veyaiya osai kosãi, unyamo wosi. Ocisoko locisoko ca kala lolohũlũkãi akui avali lavikuala komanu."
1Chronicles27:2 Usongui wocisoko catete, cosãi yatete, Yasioveama, omõla a Savidiyele. Vocisoko caye mua kala olohulukãi akui avali lavikuãla komanu."
1Chronicles27:3 Eye umue wopomala va Pereci, haeye usongui wa vakesongo vosi volohoka viokosãi yatete."
1Chronicles27:4 Usongui wocisoko cosaĩ yavali, Dodai u Ahoha. Vocisoko caye mua kalavo usongui Mikilote. Vocisoko caye mua"
1Chronicles27:5 Kesongo liatatu liolohoka, viosãi yatatu, Benaya omõla ocitunda cinene Yehoyada. Vocisoko caye mua kala olohũlũkãi akui avali lavikuala komanu."
1Chronicles27:6 U eye Benaya, una wa linga onoi pokati kakui atatu, haeye wa tumĩla akui atatu. Omolaye Amisavada, eye wa kala locikele cocisoko caco."
1Chronicles27:7 Kesongo liakuãla kosãi yakuãla, Asahele, manja a Yoava, lu wa kuamamo Sevadiya, omolaye. Vocisoko caye mua kala olohũlũkãi akui avali lavikuala komanu."
1Chronicles27:8 Kesongo liatãlo, kosãi yatãlo, Siamihuta u Yisira. Vocisoko caye mua kala olohũlũkãi akui avali lavikuala komanu."
1Chronicles27:9 Kesongo liepandu, kosãi yepandu Ira, omõla a Yikesi, u Tekoa. Vocisoko caye mua kala olohũlũkãi akui avali lavikuala komanu."
1Chronicles27:10 Kesongo liepanduvali kosãi yepanduvali, Helece u Peloni, wopomala va Efarimi. Vocisoko caye mua kala olohũlũkãi akui avali lavikuala komanu."
1Chronicles27:11 Kesongo liecelala kosãi yecelala, Sibekai u Husiati, umue pova Sera. Vocisoko caye mua kala olohũlũkãi akuĩ avali lavikuãla komanu."
1Chronicles27:12 Kesongo liecea kosãi yecea, Aviyesere u Anatote, umue pova Benjamini. Vocisoko caye mua kala olohũlũkãi akui avali lavikuãla komanu."
1Chronicles27:13 Kesongo liekui kosãi yekui, Maharai u Netofa, umue pova Sera. Vocisoko caye mua kala olohũlũkãi akui avali lavikuala komanu."
1Chronicles27:14 Kesongo liekui la mosi, kosãi yekui la mosi, Benaya u piratoni, umue wopomala va Efarimi. Vocisoko caye mua kala olohũlũkãi akuĩ avali lavikuala komanu."
1Chronicles27:15 Kesongo liekui lavali kosãi yekui lavali, Helidai, u Netofa, ukuepata lia Otiniyele. Vocisoko caye mua kala olohũlũkãi akuĩ avali lavikuala komanu."
1Chronicles27:16 Asongui vapata a Isareli, vava: usongui wa va Ruvene, Eliyesere, omõla a Sikiri. Usongui wa va Simeone, Sefatiya, omõla a Maaka."
1Chronicles27:17 Usongui wa va Lewi, Hasiaviya, omõla a Kemuele. Usongui wa va Arone, Sadoke."
1Chronicles27:18 Usongui wa Yuda, Elihu, umue povamanja a Daviti. Usongui wa Isakare, Omiri, omõla a Mingeli."
1Chronicles27:19 Usongui wa Sevulono, Yisimaya, omõla a Ovadiya. Usongui wa Nafitali, Yeremote, omõla a Asiriyele."
1Chronicles27:20 Usongui wa va Efarimi, Hosea, omõla a Asasiye. Usongui wonepa liepata lia Manase, Yoele, omõla a Pedaya."
1Chronicles27:21 Usongui wonepa yepata lia Manase ko Gileada, Ido, omõla a Sakariya. Usongui wa Benjamini Yahasiyele, omõla a Avinere."
1Chronicles27:22 Usongui wa Dani, Asariele omõla a Yerohama. Ava ovo asongui vapata a Isareli."
1Chronicles27:23 Puãi vakuanyamo akui avali lava ka va pitililemo, Daviti ka va tendele momo Yehova wa popele hati, Ndi luisa Isareli ndolombungululu viokilu."
1Chronicles27:24 Yoava, omõla a Ceruya, wa fetikile oku tenda, puãi ka malusuile, momo onyeño ya Yehova ya ci wengukilila Isareli, kuenje owiñi waco velivulu liasapulo a Soma Daviti, ka wa soneheluemo."
1Chronicles27:25 Asimawete, omõla a Adiyele, eye ukuacikele covokuasi a Soma. Yonatana, omõla a Usiya, wa lava olosila vovapia kuenda vovaimbo anene la atito kuenda volombonge."
1Chronicles27:26 Esiri, omõla a Keluvu, eye usongui wava va linga upange wovapia, woku lima."
1Chronicles27:27 Simei u Rama, eye ukuacikele coviumbo viayuva. Savidi u Sifimi, eye ukuacikele covinyu via solekiwa volosila viaco."
1Chronicles27:28 Baale Hanana u Gedere, wa lava oviti violiveira kuenda ovilemba via kala katapi. Yowasi ukuacikele colosila viulela,"
1Chronicles27:29 Sitirai u Siarono wa tata oviunda via lila ko Siarono. Siafata, omõla a Adilai wa tata oviunda via kala kovimbota."
1Chronicles27:30 Ovili u Isameli wa tata olongamelo. Yehideya u Meronote wa tata ovimbulu.
1Chronicles27:31 Yasisi u Hagere wa tata oviunda violomeme. Vosi ava, ovo vakalei kovokuasi a Soma Daviti."
1Chronicles27:32 Yonatana, inanu ya Daviti, eye ondunguli, haeye ukualondunge haeye ukuavisonehua. Yehiyele, omõla a Hakimoni, wa kala kumue lomãla va Soma."
1Chronicles27:33 Ahitofele, eye ondunguli ya Soma. Husiai, u Ariki, eye ekamba lia Soma."
1Chronicles27:34 U wa kuama Ahitofele, Yehoyada omõla a Benaya, kuenda Aviatare. Yoava eye kesongo liolohoka via Soma."
1Chronicles28:1 Daviti yu wongoluila ko Yerusalãi olombuale viosi via Isareli, lasongui vapata la vakesongo liovisoko vina via vumba Soma, kuenda vakesongo liolohũlũkãi la vakesongo liovita, kuenda vakalei kovokuasi lovikuata viosi via Soma, levi viomãla vaye, kuenda vakalei velombe lalume vakuotõi la vosi muẽle va pama vakuotõi."
1Chronicles28:2 Oco Soma Daviti wa votoka vilu, yu wa popia hati, Ene avamanjange, amanu vange! Njeveleli. Nda kala lutima woku tungila ocikasa covisila via Yehova onjo yimue yepuyuko, haiyo yociliatelo ca Suku. Kuenje nda angiliyile hã si yi tungi."
1Chronicles28:3 Puãi Suku wa popia lame hati, Ku ka tungile onduko yange onjo, momo wukuavita kuenda wa pesela osonde."
1Chronicles28:4 Haimo Yehova Suku ya Isareli, wa nola ame vepata liosi lia tate, si lingi ño hu Soma ya Isareli. Momo wa nõla Yuda, ha lingi ombiali, kuenje vepata lia Yuda omo a nõla epata lia tate. Pomãla va tate, ame a sanjukilapo ha ndingisa Soma ya Isareli yosi."
1Chronicles28:5 Pomãla vange vosi, momo Yehova wa nyiha omãla valua, eye wa nolapo omolange Salomone ha tumãla kocalo cusoma wa Yehova kIsareli."
1Chronicles28:6 Wa popia lame hati, Omõlove Salomone, eye o tunga onjo yange lovitali viange, momo ndo nõla ha lingi omolange, lame ndinga isiaye."
1Chronicles28:7 Kuenje, nda o pandikaisa loku linga ovihandeleko viange lovihõlo viange, ndeci etaili, oco ñolisa usoma waye olotembo ka vi pui."
1Chronicles28:8 Kaliye, kovaso a Isareli yosi, haiyo ohongele ya Yehova, kuenda kovaso a Suku o tu yevite, lavi kuenda sandiliyi ovihandeleko viosi via Yehova Suku yene, oco vu tumãle vofeka yilo yiwa, loku yeca ndocipiñalo komãla vene, koloneke vi enda ño hu."
1Chronicles28:9 Love, amolange, a Salomone, kuliha Suku ya soyove, u vumba loku pua evelo kuenda lutima wove wosi. Momo Yehova o pendusola ovitima viosi, kuenje o limbuka ovipangelo viosi viovisimilo. Nda ove u sanda, eye o tava oku sangiwa love. Puãi nda u yanduluka, leye o ku takumũla ño hũ."
1Chronicles28:10 Oco kaliye yevelela. Momo Suku wa ku nola hu tungi onembele ongusu, ci linga."
1Chronicles28:11 Oco Daviti wa eca komolaye Salomone oseteko yocindumba conembele, leyi yolonjo viaco, leyi yolohondo vioku soleka ovokuasi, leyi yolosapalalo, leyi yolohondo viovokati, kuenda eyi yohondo yocitumãlo cohenda."
1Chronicles28:12 Wa wihavo oseteko yovina viosi a sokoluile lespiritu ndokuti yeyi yovitali vionjo ya Yehova, leyi yolohondo viosi via ñualako, leyi yolohondo viovokuasi onjo ya Suku, leyi yolohondo vioku soleka ukuasi wovina vi kola;"
1Chronicles28:13 leyi yi tiamela kovisoko viovitunda la va Lewi, leyi yupange wosi wonjo ya Yehova, leyi yovikuata viosi viupange wonjo ya Yehova."
1Chronicles28:14 Wo tukuila opesu yulu woku panga ovikuata viosi viovopange aiñi aiñi. Wo tukuilavo opesu yovikuata viosi viopalata, viovopange aiñi aiñi."
1Chronicles28:15 Wo tukuilavo opesu yolondiyelo viulu leyi yolovela viaco, ndokuti ondiyelo londiyelo kumosi lolovela viayo, kuenda vali opesu yolondiyelo viopalata, ndokuti yondiyelo londiyelo kumosi lolovela viayo, ndesilivilo liayo kupange."
1Chronicles28:16 Wa tukulavo opesu yulu woku panga olomesa violombolo vioku taliwa, ulu womesa lomesa, leyi yopalata yoku panga olomesa viopalata."
1Chronicles28:17 Wa tukulavo opesu yulu wopululu wolongalufu, lowu wolombasiya, lowu watiyela ulu wa fina, lowu wolokopo viulu, lopesu yokopo lokopo, kuenda yatiyela opalata, etiyela letiyela."
1Chronicles28:18 Wa ecavo ulu wopululu, wa pesaliwa, woku panga utala winsensu, kuenda ulu woseteko yekalu, hailio va Keruvi, vana va nyanyumula avava avo loku tuvika ocikasa covisila via Yehova."
1Chronicles28:19 Daviti hati, Ocisonehua ceka lia Yehova, oco ca ndomboluila ovina evi viosi, ndaño muẽle ovopange osi oseteko yilo."
1Chronicles28:20 Daviti wa popia lomolaye Salomone hati, Kolisako, kuata utõi, linga upange u. Ku ka kale lusumba, ku ka yokoke, momo Yehova Suku, haeye Suku yange, o kasi love. Eye ka ku tokoka, ndaño oku ku yanduluka, toke upange wosi wonjo ya Yehova u pua."
1Chronicles28:21 Tala, ovisoko viovitunda levi via va Lewi, vievi, kuenje vi linga upange wosi wonjo ya Suku. Kuenda kupange waco wosi o laika oku kala lomanu vosi vana va loñoloha, haivo va tava oku linga ovopange aiñi aiñi; ndaño asongui lomanu vosi lovo le va pokola kovihandeleko viove."
1Chronicles29:1 Soma Daviti wa popia lohongele yosi, hati, Omolange Salomone, eye lika wa noliwa la Suku, haimo umalehe handi, ka kolele, kuenda upange ulo unene. Momo onjo yaco hayomunuko, puãi ya Yehova Suku."
1Chronicles29:2 Oco nda likapela longusu yange yosi, oku angiliyila onjo ya Suku yange ulu wovina vi sesamela oku pangiwa lulu, lopalata yovina vi sesamela oku pangiwa lopapalata, losipi yovina vi sesamela oku pangiwa losipi, lutale wovina vi sesamela oku pangiwa lutale, loviti viovina vi sesamela oku pangiwa loviti, kuenda ovawe a berilo la a oku posuisa apa pa sokotolua, lovawe a nĩna hao ovivalo viñi viñi, lovawe a tĩla aiñi aiñi, kuenda ovawe a sieleña, alua, akahandangala."
1Chronicles29:3 Kuenda vali, loku vokiya kilu lia viosi nda angiliyila ale onjo yi kola, ñuete ukuasi wange muẽle wulu lopalata, kuenje ndu weca konjo ya Suku yange, momo ñuetele onjo ya Suku yange ocisola;"
1Chronicles29:4 ndokuti olohulukãi vitatu violotalendo viulu, ulu wOfiri, kuenda olohũlũkãi epanduvali viopalata ya yenguluiwa yoku laña ovimano violonjo."
1Chronicles29:5 Ulu waco wovina vi sesamela oku pangiwa lulu, kuenda opalata yovina vi sesamela oku pangiwa lopalata, leyi yovopange aiñi aiñi osi a lingiwa lovaka olomesele. Oco helie o panga oku lumba, ha litumbika etaili ku Yehova?"
1Chronicles29:6 Oco akulu vapata lolombuale viapata a Isareli lavakesongo liolohũlũkãi lava vovita, kuenda vakalei kupange wa Soma, vosi yavo va panga oku lumba."
1Chronicles29:7 Va eca kupange wonjo ya Suku olohũlũkãi vitãlo violotalendo viulu, lolohũlũkãi ekui violombongo viovivela, lolohũlũkãi ekui violotalendo viopalata, lolohũlũkãi ekui lecelala violotalendo viosipi kuenda ocita colohũlũkãi violotalendo viutale."
1Chronicles29:8 Ava va kala lovawe a tĩla, va a eca kukuasi wonjo ya Yehova, peka lia Yehiyele u Gerisiono."
1Chronicles29:9 Oco omanu va sanjuka, momo va panga oku lumba. Lutima wa sunguluka va panga oku lumba ku Yehova. Soma Daviti, leyevo wa ci sanjukila lesanju lia lua."
1Chronicles29:10 Oco Daviti wa tumbangiya Yehova kovaso ohongele yosi. Daviti wa popia hati, A Yehova, Suku ya isietu Isareli, kokuove ku kale etumbangiyo koloneke vienda ño hu!"
1Chronicles29:11 A Yehova, ekemalo liove! Unene wove, kuenda ulamba leyulo lunumbu, cosi cove, momo cosi ci kasi kilu leci ci kasi kilu lieve, cove! Usoma wove, a Yehova, kuenda ove wa kemãla, wa tulamela vosi, haive Fu!"
1Chronicles29:12 Kokuove ku tunda ukuasi lesivayo, haive o viala ovina viosi. Peka liove pali upami lunene. Peka liove pali omoko yoku kemanyaisa, leyi yoku eca ongusu kovina viosi."
1Chronicles29:13 Kaliye, a Suku yetu, tu ku imbila olopandu, tu sivaya onduko yove ya kemãla."
1Chronicles29:14 Puãi ame hẽ, ame elie, lomanu vange ovo velie, okuti tu tela oku lumba ndoco lutima wosi? Momo ovina viosi vi tunda kokuove, kuenje tua ku iha ño eci cove ale."
1Chronicles29:15 Tuvingendeleyi kovaso ove, tuakombe, ndeci olosekulu vietu viosi. Oloneke vietu kilu lieve vi pita ndocilembo, ka kuli oku tumãla."
1Chronicles29:16 A Yehova Suku yetu, ovina evi viosi viakahandangala tua vi angiliya, ha tu ku tungila onjo, ove londuko yove, viosi via tunda peka liove, kuenda viove muẽle."
1Chronicles29:17 A Suku yange, nda kulihavo okuti wukuakunyika utima, loku sanjukila esunguluko. Ame, nda panga oku lumba ovina evi viosi lesunguluko liutima wange. Kaliye nda kuata onjolela oku mõla ndomo omanu vove va kasi palo loku ku lumbila lutima wosi."
1Chronicles29:18 A Yehova, a Suku yolosekulu vietu Avirahama la Isake la Isareli, lava ño hu onjongole eyi kuenda ovisimilo evi vutima womanu vove. Songuila ovitima viavo kokuove."
1Chronicles29:19 Eca komolange Salomone utima wocili, oco a lave ovihandeleko viove, lovovangi ove lovisila viove loku linga ovina evi viosi loku tunga onjo yulamba, yina nda angiliyila."
1Chronicles29:20 Daviti wa popia lohongele yosi, hati, Sivayi Yehova Suku yene! Oco ohongele yosi ya sivaya Yehova, Suku yolosekulu viavo. Va petamisa ovitue viavo, yu va fendela Suku, kuenda Soma."
1Chronicles29:21 Va lumba ovilumba ku Yehova, kuenda hela liaco va lumba ku Yehova ovilumba vioku pia elisi, ndokuti ohulukãi yolonui, lohũlũkãi yovitupi, lohũlũkãi yolomeme, kumue lovilumba viaco vioku nyua. Va lumbilavo Isareli yosi ovilumba vialua."
1Chronicles29:22 Kuenje keteke liaco, va lia loku nyuila kovaso a Yehova lesanju lia lua. Va vialeka Salomone, omõla a Daviti, onjanja yavali, yu vo wavekela kovaso a Yehova ha lingi osoma, kuenda va waveka Sadoke ha lingi ocitunda."
1Chronicles29:23 Oco Salomone wa tumãla kocalo ca Yehova ndosoma loku piñala komangu ya isiaye Daviti. Yu wa sumuluha, kuenje Isareli yosi ya pokola kokuaye."
1Chronicles29:24 Olombuale viosi lalume vakuotõi, kumue lomãla vosi va Soma Daviti, va vumba Soma Salomone."
1Chronicles29:25 Yehova wa kemalisa calua Salomone kovaso a Isareli yosi, kuenje wa wiha ulamba luwale wa piãla, olosoma viosi viatete ci sule."
1Chronicles29:26 Daviti, omõla a Jese, wa viala kIsareli yosi."
1Chronicles29:27 Oloneke viaye a viala kIsareli via soka akuĩ akuãla kanyamo. Ko Hevirone, wa vialako anyamo epanduvali, ko Yerusalãi anyamo akui atatu la atatu."
1Chronicles29:28 Kuenje wa fa tupu ekongo liocili, ukualoneke vialua, kuenda we yukililua lovokuasi lulamba. Kuenje omolaye Salomone wa piñala komagu yaye."
1Chronicles29:29 Ovilinga via Soma Daviti, evi viatete levi via sulako, tala, via sonehiwa velivulu lia Samuele ukuavitumasuku lo velivulu liuprofeto Natana kuenda velivulu lia Gadi ukuavitumasuku."
1Chronicles29:30 Asapulo uviali waye wosi la a unene waye loviyaneke viosi via pita laye, levi via pita la Isareli, pamue vali lovosoma osi olofeka, cosi muẽle ca sonehiwamovo."
2Chronicles1:1 Salomone, omõla a Daviti, wa kolisiwa vusoma waye, kuenje Yehova, Suku yaye, wa kala laye, kuenda wo kemalisa cimue."
2Chronicles1:2 Salomone yu wa popia la Isareli yosi, la vakesongo liolohũlũkãi lava vovita, lolonganji, lolombuale via Isareli yosi, lakulu vapata."
2Chronicles1:3 Oco Salomone wa enda kumue lohongele yosi kowulu woko Giveone, momo oko kua kala ombalaka yoku ñualẽhẽla la Yehova, yina Mose, ukuenje wa Yehova, a tungile vekalasoko."
2Chronicles1:4 Puãi ocikasa ca Suku, Daviti wa cupile ale ko Kiriyata Yeari loku ci nena kocitumãlo Daviti a cangiliyilile, momo wa ci tungilile ombalaka ko Yerusalãi."
2Chronicles1:5 Utala wosipi, una Becalele, omõla a Uri, omõla a Huri, a tungile, wa kalavo kovaso yo tavernakulu ya Yehova. Kuenje Salomone kumue lohongele va sanda Yehova."
2Chronicles1:6 Salomone yu wa lamanela kutala wosipi kovaso a Yehova, kombalaka yoku ñualẽhẽla la Yehova kuenje wa lumbilako ohũlũkãi yovilumba vioku pia elisi."
2Chronicles1:7 Kuteke waco Yehova wa tukulukila Salomone, yu wa popia laye hati, Tukula eci ndu ku ĩha."
2Chronicles1:8 Salomone wa popia la Suku hati, Ove wa muisa ohenda yalua tate Daviti, kuenje wa miñalisa komangu yaye yusoma."
2Chronicles1:9 Kaliye, a Yehova Suku, ohuminyo yove ku tate Daviti yi lemuluhe, momo wa ndingisa Soma yepata lialua ndoneketela yoposi."
2Chronicles1:10 Kaliye nyihe olondunge lukulihiso pokutunda kuange lopokuiñila kuange kovaso epata elindeti, momo helie o tela oku tetuluila epata eli liove, hailio linene cimue?"
2Chronicles1:11 Oco Suku wa popia la Salomone hati, Omo eci oco ca kala vutima wove, kuenje kua pingile ovipako lukuasi, pamue ekemalo, pamue omuenyo wava va ku suvuka, kuenda ndaño omuenyo wa lepa kuo pingile, puãi wa pinga olondunge lukũlĩhiso woku viala omanu vange, vana nda ku vialekela,"
2Chronicles1:12 oco olondunge lukulihiso viu kuihiwa. Kuenda ndu ku iha ovipako lukuasi lekemãlo lia lua ndokuti olosoma viosi via ku tetekela pamue vievi vi ku kuama, ci sule."
2Chronicles1:13 Oco Salomone wa tiuka konumbuko yoko Giveone, kombalaka yoku ñualẽhela la Yehova, yu weya ko Yerusalãi. Kuenje wa viala kIsareli."
2Chronicles1:14 Salomone wongoluila pamosi akãlu lavakuakuendela kotuvalu. Wa kala lohũlũkãi lovita vikuãla viakãlu lekui lavivali kolohũlũkãi viavakuakuendela kotuvalu. Wa va kapa vovaimbo akãlu kuenda vo Yerusalãi kumue la Soma.
2Chronicles1:15 Vo Yerusalãi, Soma wa siatisa opalata lulu ndovawe, kuenda ovinendele wa vi luisa ndoviti viakuyu vatapi."
2Chronicles1:16 Otuvalu tua Salomone tua tunda kEgito loko Kuwe. Ovafũli va Soma va tu landa landa londando ko Kuwe.
2Chronicles1:17 Va landa landa ekãlu kEgito lovita epandu kolosiekele viopalata kuenda okavalu ka landaiwa locita lakui atãlo kolosiekele. Kuenda ovo va nenailakovo olosoma viosi via va Hiti lolosoma via Suria.
2Chronicles2:1 Kaliye Salomone wa panga oku tungila onduko ya Yehova onembele kuenda eyemba liaye muẽle.
2Chronicles2:2 Salomone wa tukula akui epanduvali kolohũlũkãi vialume vakuakuambata ovilemo, lakui ecelala kolohũlũkãi va songa ovawe kolomunda, kuenda Olohũlũkãi vitatu lovita epandu kalume va va lavulola."
2Chronicles2:3 Salomone wa tuma ku Hutama Soma ya Turo, hati, Ndeci wa lingaile la tate Daviti, kuenje wo tumisaile ovinendele ha litungila onjo yoku kalamo, lingavo ndoco lame."
2Chronicles2:4 Tala, ñasi oku tungila onduko ya Yehova Suku yange onjo si yi tumbika kokuaye oku timihila insensu violosimbolua kovaso aye loku lumbaila olombolo vioku taliwa lovilumba vioku pia elisi, omẽle loñolosi, kasambata lokokumoleha kuosãi, lokolofesta via tukuiwa via Yehova Suku yetu, ndeci ca handelekelua Isareli otembo ka yi pui."
2Chronicles2:5 Onjo ñasi oku tunga yinene, momo Suku yetu unene, haeye o kasi kilu liolosuku viosi."
2Chronicles2:6 Puãi helie o tẽla oku u tungila onjo, nda vilu, lovilu liovailu ka suimo? Ame he, ame elie okuti ndu tungila onjo, nda hacitumãloko cimue ño coku timihila insensu kovaso aye?"
2Chronicles2:7 Oco kaliye numise omesele yimue yulu lopalata losipi lutale, haeye omesele yolonanga vi vumbula, lohusu, lonoloti, haeye o tela oku luvikiya, oco a kale kumue lolomesele vi kasi lame vo Yuda lo vo Yerusalãi, vina tate Daviti a nolele."
2Chronicles2:8 Numisekovo oviti viovinendele longaye lalimugi vioko Levanone, momo nda kuliha okuti akuenje vove va loñoloha oku timbula oviti vo Levanone. Oco akuenje vange va kala kumue lakuenje vove,"
2Chronicles2:9 ha va ngangiliyila oviti vialua, momo onjo ndi laika oku tunga yinene haiyo ya posoka cimue."
2Chronicles2:10 Akuenje vove vakuakutimbula oviti, ndi va iha akui avali kolohũlũkãi violonjongo viotiliku ya vandulua, lakui avali kolohũlũkãi violonjongo viosevata, lakui avali kolohũlũkãi violombatu viovinyu, lakui avali kolohũlũkãi violombatu viulela."
2Chronicles2:11 Oco Hurama, Soma ya Turo, wa kumbulula lukanda, yu wo tuma ku Salomone hati, Omo Yehova a sole omanu vaye, oco a ku lingisila Soma yavo."
2Chronicles2:12 Hurama wa popiavo hati, Yehova, Suku ya Isareli, a sivayiwe, u wa panga ilu losi. Wa eca ku Soma Daviti omõla ukualondunge, wa lunguka haeye ukuovanga, o tungila Yehova onembele kuenda o tungavo eyemba liaye muẽle."
2Chronicles2:13 Kaliye nda tuma Hurama Abi omesele haeye ukualondunge,"
2Chronicles2:14 omõla ukãi umue wopo va Dani. Isiaye wa kala u Turo. Wa loñoloha kupange wulu lopalata losipi lutale lovawe loviti, haeye omesele yolonanga vi vumbula, lonoloti lohusu kuenda ovalatanya. O luvikiyavo ovina viñi viñi kuenda o songa eci cosi co tukuilua. A kale kumue lolomesele viove, lolomesele via cime cange, so Daviti."
2Chronicles2:15 Oco kaliye, otiliku losevata lulela lovinyu vina cime cange a popele, a vi tume kakuenje vaye."
2Chronicles2:16 Tu ku timbuila vo Levanone oviti viosi o sukila. Tu ku vi nenela loku vi kuta ovitungu ha vi endi lovava okalunga toke ko Yopa, kuenje ove o vi tuala ko Yerusalãi."
2Chronicles2:17 Salomone wa tenda vakualofeka vosi va kala vofeka ya Isareli, vana isiaye Daviti a tendele ale. Kua sangiwa ocita lakui atãlo lavitatu kolohũlũkãi lovita epandu viomanu."
2Chronicles2:18 Pomanu vaco, wa tukulapo akui epanduvali kolohũlũkãi vakuakuambata ovilemo, lakui ecelala kolohũlũkãi va songa ovawe kolomunda, kuenda olohũlũkãi vitatu lovita epandu va lavulola omanu loku va talavayisa."
2Chronicles3:1 Oco Salomone wa fetika oku tunga onjo ya Yehova ko Yerusalãi, komunda Moriya, kocimbandi ca Orinane u Yevusi, kuna Yehova a tukulukilile isiaye Daviti, haiko Daviti a angiliyile."
2Chronicles3:2 Yu wa fetika oku tunga keteke lia vali liosãi yavali, kulima wakuãla wusoma waye."
2Chronicles3:3 Oseteko Salomone a tunga layo onjo ya Suku yeyi: Okulepa kuayo akui epandu kovikeya, wa tenda lukeya wale, kuenda upati waco akui avali kovikeya."
2Chronicles3:4 Okulepa kuocindumba ca kala kovaso yonjo kua lisoka lupati wonjo, ndokuti akui avali kovikeya kuenda usovi waco ocita lakui avali kovikeya. Wa ci laña vokati lulu wa fina."
2Chronicles3:5 Vohondo yinene wa yambelamo lavaya ovinendele, kuenda wa lañamo lulu wa fina, loku luvikiyamo oviti vieva lalienge."
2Chronicles3:6 Onjo wa yi posuisa lovawe a tĩla. Ulu waco ulu wo ko Parawayi.
2Chronicles3:7 Onjo kumue lolohangalo viaco, lovikuli, lovimano, lapito aco, cosi wa ci lañavo lulu. Vovimano wa luvikiyamo vakeruvi."
2Chronicles3:8 Yu wa tunga ohondo yi kola koku kola. Okulepa kuayo kua lisoka lupati wonjo, ndokuti ovikeya akui avali. Upati wayo akui avali kovikeya. Wa yi laña lulu wa fina, wa soka ovita epandu kolotalendo."
2Chronicles3:9 Ulu wolombambo oku u yonga, wa soka akui atãlo kolosiekele. Olohondo viokilu wa vi laña lulu."
2Chronicles3:10 Vonjo yi kola koku kola wa songelamo vakeruvi vavali, yu wa va laña lulu."
2Chronicles3:11 Avava avakeruvi, okulepa kuao kua soka akui avali kovikeya. Evava lia umue povakeruvi lia soka ovikeya vitãlo, kuenda liasa vocimano conjo. Evava likuavo lia kalavo lovikeya vitãlo, kuenda liasa vevava liukeruvi ukuavo."
2Chronicles3:12 Evava liukeruvi ukuavo lia soka ovikeya vitãlo, kuenda liasa vocimano conjo. Evava liaye likuavo lia kalavo lovikeya vitãlo kuenda lia litokeka levava liukeruvi ukuavo."
2Chronicles3:13 Avava a vakeruvi a nyanyumuha kuenje a soka akui avali kovikeya. Vakeruvi va tai vilu kuenje ovipala viavo via imba ovaso vonjo,"
2Chronicles3:14 Yu wa tonga ongumbo lonanga yonoloti leyi yi vumbula leyi yi kusuka kumosi lovalatanya, kuenje wa pangelako oviluvialuvia viavakeruvi."
2Chronicles3:15 Wa panga olongunji vivali kovaso yonjo, usovi wavio wa soka ovikeya akui atatu layitãlo. Utue wongunji longunji wa soka ovikeya vitãlo."
2Chronicles3:16 Wa panga alienge nda yana ovocitumãlo ci kola kuenje wa a kapa kosungu yolongunji. Wa panga ocita caromã kuenje wa a kapa kalienge.
2Chronicles3:17 Wa sembika olongunji kovaso yonembele, yimue kondio yikuavo kepili. Yokondio wa yi luka, hati, Yakini, leyi yokepĩli wa yi luka hati, Boase."
2Chronicles4:1 Wa panga utala wosipi. Okulepa kuawo kua soka akui avali kovikeya. Upati wawo akui avali kovikeya. Usovi wawo ekui liovikeya.
2Chronicles4:2 Wa panga ociva cosipi ya yenguluiwa. Tunde kongenge yimue toke kongenge yikuavo, ci kuete ekui liovikeya. Ca ñualapo lie! Kuenje usovi waco wa soka ovikeya vitãlo. Ukolo wovikeya akui atatu owo u ci tokeka."
2Chronicles4:3 Vemi liongenge mua ñualisua oviluvialuvia viatila, vocikeya lovocikeya ekui liatila, hao a ñuala kociva. Atila a kala ovilala vivali, a itililua pamosi lociva."
2Chronicles4:4 Ca tumãla kilu liolongombe ekui la vivali, vitatu via imba ovaso ko Norte, vitatu via imba ovaso kutakelo, vitatu via imba ovaso ko Sul, vitatu via imba ovaso kutundilo, kuenje ociva ca kapiwa kilu liavio. Olombunda viavio via loña vokati."
2Chronicles4:5 Upamo waco wa lisoka lupati weka liomunu, kuenje ongenge yaco ya pangiwa ndongenge yokopo, ndoneleho yevongevonge. Cambata olohulukãi vitatu violombatu."
2Chronicles4:6 Wa pangavo ekui liolombasiya vioku sukuila. Vitãlo wa vi kapa kondio, vitãlo kepili. Omo va sukola eci ca tiamẽla kocilumba coku pia elisi. Ociva ca kala covitunda coku pusila."
2Chronicles4:7 Wa panga ekui liolondiyelo viulu, ndomo ca handelekiwa, kuenje wa vi kapa vonembele, kondio vitãlo, kepili vitãlo."
2Chronicles4:8 Wa pangavo ekui liolomesa, kuenje wa vi kapa vonembele, kondio vitãlo, kepili vitãlo. Wa tunga ocita colombasiya viulu."
2Chronicles4:9 Wa tunga ocitali covitunda kuenda ocitali cinene, kumue lapito aco kuenda wa a laña losipi."
2Chronicles4:10 Wa kapa ociva konele yondio, kevindi liamba ovaso ko Sul lokutundilo."
2Chronicles4:11 Hurama wa tunga olombia, lolopa kuenda olombasiya. Oco Hurama wa malusula upange a lingila Soma Salomone vonjo ya Suku, wowu:"
2Chronicles4:12 Olongunji vivali kumosi lasataimo aco kuenda ovitue vivali, vina via kala kosungu yolongunji; kuenda awanda avali ovikete oku sikilila lao asataimo avali ovitue violongunji;"
2Chronicles4:13 kuenda ovita vikuãla via-romã oku kapa kawanda aco avali, loku sikilila lao asataimo avali ovitue violongunji; owanda lowanda wa kala lovilala vivali viaromã."
2Chronicles4:14 Wa tungavo ekui lialukuki kumue lolombasiya viaco kilu lialukuki;
2Chronicles4:15 kuenda ociva lolongombe ekui la vivali vemi liaco.
2Chronicles4:16 Olombia, lolopa lolongalufu kumue lovikuata viaco viosi, Hurama Abi eye wa vi tungila Soma Salomone losipi ya kungiwa, ha vi kala vonjo ya Yehova."
2Chronicles4:17 Ketapi lia Yordão, posi yotuma, pokati ka Sukote la Cereda, opo Soma a vitilila."
2Chronicles4:18 Salomone eye wa tunga ovikuata evi viosi viakahandangala, ndaño oku pesala osipi yaco, ka ca teliwile."
2Chronicles4:19 Salomone wa tunga ovikuata viosi vionjo ya Yehova ndokuti utala wulu lolomesa violombolo vioku taliwa,"
2Chronicles4:20 kuenda olondiyelo kumosi lolovela viavio viulu wa yenguluiwa, ha vi taimila kovaso yocitumãlo ci kola, ndomo ca handelekiwa."
2Chronicles4:21 Oloneleho lolondiyelo lolomala wa vi panga lulu, lulu wopululu."
2Chronicles4:22 Otuayola, lolombasiya, lovikapo vinsensu, loviyukilo wa vi tunga lulu wopululu. Apito olombundi viovohondo yi kola koku kola la a onjo yonembele a pangiwa lulu."
2Chronicles5:1 Oco upange wosi Soma Salomone a lingila onjo ya Yehova wa pua. Salomone wa nenamo ovina isiaye Daviti a tumbikile, opalata lulu lovikuata viosi kuenje wa vi soleka vovokuasi onjo ya Suku."
2Chronicles5:2 Oco Salomone wongoluila vo Yerusalãi akulu va Isareli lasongui vosi vapata, lolombuale viapata a va Isareli, ha va kopa ocikasa covisila via Yehova kimbo lia Daviti, hailio Siono."
2Chronicles5:3 Alume vosi va Isareli va liongoluila ku Soma Salomone, kofesta yosãi yepanduvali."
2Chronicles5:4 Akulu vosi va Isareli veya kuenje va Lewi va yelula ocikasa.
2Chronicles5:5 Kuenje va nena ocikasa lombalaka yoku ñualehela la Yehova lovikuata viosi vi kola, vina via kala vombalaka. Ovitunda la va Lewi ovo va vi nena."
2Chronicles5:6 Soma Salomone wa kala kovaso yocikasa, kumue lohongele yosi ya Isareli yo liongoluila. Va lumba olomeme lolongombe vialua, oku vi tenda ka ca telelue."
2Chronicles5:7 Oco ovitunda via nena ocikasa covisila via Yehova vocitumãlo caco, vocitumãlo ci kola conjo, vohondo yi kola koku kola, vemi liavava a vakeruvi."
2Chronicles5:8 Vakeruvi va nyanyumuĩla avava avo kilu liocitumãlo cocikasa, kuenda vakeruvi va sikilila ocikasa kumue lolomuangaluwa viaco."
2Chronicles5:9 Olomuangaluwa viocikasa, omo via lepa calua, olosungu viavio via molehela vohondo yi kola, kovaso yocitumãlo ci kola. Puãi posamua ka via molẽhele. Kuenje haimo vi li toke etaili lilo."
2Chronicles5:10 Vocikasa caco ka mua kaile cimue cikuavo, te lika ovawe avali ana Mose a kapelemo ko Horeve, cina Yehova a lisila ocisila la va Isareli, eci va tunda kEgito."
2Chronicles5:11 Kaliye, eci ovitunda via tunda kohondo yi kola, omo ovitunda viosi vina via kalapo via likolisile kuenda ka via litepele kovisoko,"
2Chronicles5:12 olonjimbi viosi via va Lewi, Asafe la Hemani la Yedutunu lomãla vavo, lavangandiavo, va wala ovalatanya; va talama layundu lovisumba lolohalupa konele yutundilo wutala, kumue locita lakui avali kovitunda vakuakusika olombeta;"
2Chronicles5:13 eci vakuakusika olombeta lolonjimbi va katuila pamosi ocisungo coku sivaya loku pandula Yehova, leci ocisungo ca totãla kumue lolombeta layundu lovisikilo vikuavo, kuenje va sivaya Yehova vati, Momo uwa, momo ohenda yaye ka yi pongoloka yenda ño hu, oco onjo, onjo ya Yehova, ye yuka lelende."
2Chronicles5:14 Kuenje ovitunda ka via telele oku kalamo loku linga upange, omo mua kala elende, lomo ulamba wa Yehova wa yukisa onjo ya Suku."
2Chronicles6:1 Oco Salomone wa popia hati, Yehova hati, Nda panga oku tumãla vowelema wowi!"
2Chronicles6:2 Nda ku tungila onjo yoku tumalamo. Nda ku tungila ocitumãlo hu kalamo otembo ka yi pui.
2Chronicles6:3 Soma wa pukukako, kuenje wa sumuluisa ohongele yosi ya Isareli, oco ohongele yosi ya Isareli ya talama vilu."
2Chronicles6:4 Eye wa popia hati, Yehova Suka ya Isareli a sivayiwe, una wa popia lomẽla waye la tate Daviti, loku ci lemulula leka liaye, hati,"
2Chronicles6:5 Tunde apa ndopa omanu vange va Isareli kofeka yEgito, povapata osi a Isareli, lalimue imbo nda nolapo ha li tungi onjo, onduko yange ha yi kalamo; kuenda lomue omunu nda nola ha lingi osoma yomanu vange va Isareli."
2Chronicles6:6 Puãi nda nola Yerusalãi, onduko yange ha yi kalamo; kuenda nda nola Daviti ha viala omanu vange va Isareli."
2Chronicles6:7 Tate Daviti wa kala lutima woku tungila onduko ya Yehova Suku ya Isareli onjo.
2Chronicles6:8 Puãi Yehova wa popia la tate Daviti, hati, Omo vutima wove mua kala ocisimilo coku tungila onduko yange onjo, wa linga ciwa oku kala lutima waco."
2Chronicles6:9 Haimo lumue ku tungi onjo, puãi omolove o tunda koviongo viove, eye o tungila onduko yange onjo."
2Chronicles6:10 Yehova wa kolisa ondaka yaye yina a popele, nda piñala komangu ya tate Daviti, nda tumãla kocalo ca Isareli, ndeci Yehova a likuminyile, kuenje nda tungila onduko ya Yehova Suku ya Isareli onjo."
2Chronicles6:11 Haimo nda kapa ocikasa muna mu kasi ocisila ca Yehova, cina a lisilile la va Isareli."
2Chronicles6:12 Oco Salomone wa talama vilu kovaso yutala wa Yehova, kovaso yohongele yosi ya Isareli, yu wolõla ovoko aye."
2Chronicles6:13 Salomone wa tungile ocimbulumbumba cosipi. Okulepa kuaco kua soka ovikeya vitãlo, upati waco ovikeya vitãlo, lusovi ovikeya vitatu. Wa ci kapele vokati kocitali, kuenje wa talama kilu liaco, Noke wa kekama kolongolo viaye kovaso ohongele yosi ya Isareli, yu woluĩla ovoko aye vilu,"
2Chronicles6:14 kuenje hati, A Yehova Suku ya Isareli, ndaño kilu ndaño posi ka kuli Suku wa lisoka love, wukuakulava ocisila haive wukuahenda ka yi pongoloka lovakuenje vove vana va endaila kovaso ove lutima wavo wosi."
2Chronicles6:15 Wa telisila ukuenje wove, tate Daviti, eci wo likuminyile; ocili ove wa popia lomẽla wove kuenje wa ci lemulula leka liove, ndomo ci kasi etaili lilo."
2Chronicles6:16 Kaliye a Yehova, Suku ya Isareli, telisila ukuenje wove tate Daviti, eci wo likuminya, huti, Kovaso ange, ku kambi kapiñala o tumãla kocalo ca Isareli, nda omãla vove va lunguka vonjila yavo loku endaila vovihandeleko viange, ndeci ove wa endaila kovaso ange."
2Chronicles6:17 Kaliye a Yehova, Suku ya Isareli, ondaka yove yina wa popia lukuenje wove Daviti yi telisiwe."
2Chronicles6:18 Puãi ocili Suku o tava hẽ oku tunga kilu lieve? Ota, vilu, lovilu liovailu ku suimo! Oco hẽ, vonjo eyi nda ku tungila o suamo ndati?"
2Chronicles6:19 Haimo a Yehova Suku yange, tava kohutililo yukuenje wove lokelombelo liaye, yevelela kevilikiyo lokohutililo yina ukuenje wove a likutilila kovaso ove."
2Chronicles6:20 Ovaso ove a vanje konjo yilo utanya luteke, a vanje vocitumãlo eci wa likuminyile oku kapamo onduko yove, oco o yevelele kohutililo yukuenje wove a likutilila vonjo yilo."
2Chronicles6:21 Yevelela kelombelo liukuenje wove leli liomanu vove va Isareli, eci va likutilila loku imba ovaso konjo yilo. Kocitumãlo cove kilu, tava oku yeva, kuenje eci o yevako, ecela."
2Chronicles6:22 Nda omunu umue o lueyela ukuavo kuenda vo kisika oku lisinga kuenje iya loku lisingila kovaso yutala wove vonjo yilo,"
2Chronicles6:23 oco ove kilu, yevelela, linga kuenda tetuluila akuenje vove, loku pisa ondingaĩvi, ovilinga viaye vivi ha vi wila kutue waye muẽle, puãi yowisa ukuesunga loku u muisa onima yesunga liaye."
2Chronicles6:24 Nda omanu vove va Isareli va kupuilua kovaso unyali, momo va ku lueyela, kuenje nda va kondokela kokuove loku limbuka onduko yove, loku likutilila loku lomba kokuove vonjo yilo,"
2Chronicles6:25 oco ove, kilu, yevelela kuenda ecela ekandu liomanu vove va Isareli, va tiuwiya vali kofeka yina wa ecele kokuavo lokolosekulu viavo."
