Psalms134:3 Yehova, u wa lulika liu longongo, haeye o kasi vo Siono, o sumũlũisi."
Psalms135:1 Sivayi Yehova. Sivayi onduko ya Yehova. U sivayi, ene akuenje va Yehova."
Psalms135:2 Ene wakuakutalama vonjo ya Yehova, vovitali vionjo ya Suku yetu,"
Psalms135:3 sivayi Yehova, momo Yehova uwa. Imbili onduko yaye ovisungo momo eye ukuacali."
Psalms135:4 Ocili, Yehova wa linolela Yakoba, Isareli ha lingi waye muẽle."
Psalms135:5 Momo nda kũlĩha okuti Yehova unene. Cime cetu wa piãla olosuku viosi.
Psalms135:6 Yehova cosi a panga haico a linga, kilu lo posi, vokalunga lo valondo osi."
Psalms135:7 O londaisa ombundu kasukiyo ongongo. O sokiyila ombela oviliakulo. Upopa ofela vatambo aye.
Psalms135:8 Wa kundula olonuñulu via Egito, levi viomanu levi viovinyama."
Psalms135:9 Wa tuma olondimbukiso lovikomo vokati kove, a Egito, ku Fareo lo kovakuenje vaye vosi."
Psalms135:10 Wa kundula olofeka via lua, kuenje wa ipa olosoma vinene."
Psalms135:11 Siyoni, Soma ya va Amori, Oge, Soma ya Basiane, lovosoma osi a Kanana."
Psalms135:12 Kuenje wa eca ovisenge viavio ndocipiñalo. Oco ocipiñalo ca va Isareli, omanu vaye."
Psalms135:13 Onduko yove, a Yehova, ka yi pui. A Yehova, onduko yove ya kemãla kovapata osi."
Psalms135:14 Momo Yehova o tetela omanu vaye onimbu yoku va yovuisa kuenje o lingila akuenje vaye ohenda.
Psalms135:15 Oviteka violofeka opalata lulu, ovilulikilo viovaka omanu."
Psalms135:16 Vi kasi lolomela, puãi ka vi popi. Vi kasi lovaso, puãi ka vi lete."
Psalms135:17 Vi kasi lovatui, puãi ka vi yevite. Ka mu li ofela volomela viavio."
Psalms135:18 Ava va vi lulika, kuenda vosi va vi kolela, va lisoke lavio!"
Psalms135:19 Ene anjo ya Isareli, sivayi Yehova. Ene anjo ya Arone, sivayi Yehova."
Psalms135:20 Ene anjo ya Lewi, sivayi Yehova. Ene wakuakusumbila Yehova, sivayi Yehova."
Psalms135:21 Yehova a sivayiwile vo Siono. Eye wa tunga vo Yerusalãi. Sivayi Yehova.
Psalms136:1 Panduli Yehova, momo uwa, momo ohenda yaye ka yi pui."
Psalms136:2 Panduli Suku yolosuku, momo ohenda yaye ka yi pui."
Psalms136:3 Panduli Ñala yoloñala, momo ohenda yaye ka yi pui."
Psalms136:4 U o lingainga ovikomo vinene lika waye, momo ohenda yaye ka yi pui."
Psalms136:5 U wa lulika ilu lolondunge viaye, momo ohenda yaye ka yi pui."
Psalms136:6 U'wa yala ongongo kilu liovava, momo ohenda yaye ka yi pui."
Psalms136:7 U wa lulika ovinyi vinene, momo ohenda yaye ka yi pui."
Psalms136:8 Ekumbi ha li viala kutanya, momo ohenda yaye ka yi pui."
Psalms136:9 Osãi lolombungululu ha vi viala kuteke, momo ohenda yaye ka yi pui."
Psalms136:10 U wa kundula olonuñulu via va Egito, momo ohenda yaye ka yi pui."
Psalms136:11 Wa tundisa Isareli pokati kavo, momo ohenda yaye ka yi pui,"
Psalms136:12 leka lia pama, lokuokuo kuoloha, momo ohenda yaye ka yi pui."
Psalms136:13 U wa tepa pokati o Kalunga Kakusuka, momo ohenda yaye ka yi pui."
Psalms136:14 Yu wa pitisa Isareli vokati kaco, momo ohenda yaye ka yi pui."
Psalms136:15 Wa kupikila puãi Fareo lolohoka viaye vo Kalunga Kakusuka, momo ohenda yaye ka yi pui."
Psalms136:16 U wa songuila omanu vaye vekalasoko, momo ohenda yaye ka yi pui."
Psalms136:17 U wa kundula olosoma vinene, momo ohenda yaye ka yi pui."
Psalms136:18 Wa ipa olosoma via kemala, momo ohenda yaye ka yi pui."
Psalms136:19 Siyoni, Soma ya va Amori, momo ohenda yaye ka yi pui."
Psalms136:20 La Oge, Soma ya Basiane, momo ohenda yaye ka yi pui."
Psalms136:21 Wa eca ovisenge viavo ndocipiñalo, momo ohenda yaye ka yi pui."
Psalms136:22 Oco ocipiñalo ca Isareli ukuenje waye, momo ohenda yaye ka yi pui."
Psalms136:23 Wa tu ivaluka kukukui wetu, momo ohenda yaye ka yi pui."
Psalms136:24 Wa tu popela kovanyali vetu, momo ohenda yaye ka yi pui."
Psalms136:25 Ecaeca okulia ku vosi vakuetimba, momo ohenda yaye ka yi pui."
Psalms136:26 Panduli Suku ukuailu, momo ohenda yaye ka yi pui."
Psalms137:1 Kolondui via Bavulono oko tua tumãla. Tua lila eci tua ivaluka Siono.
Psalms137:2 Kovawunje ovokati kavio oko tua pateka olohalupa vietu,"
Psalms137:3 haiko ava va tu kuata va tu silihila ovisungo. Ava va tu punda va tu siliha onjolela, vati, Tu imbili cimue ocisungo coko Siono."
Psalms137:4 Tu imba hẽ ndati ocisungo ca Yehova vofeka yamale?
Psalms137:5 A Yerusalãi, nda hu ivala eka liange liondio li siõsie!"
Psalms137:6 Elimi liange li lamelele kuliakusu nda siu ku ivaluka, nda si velisapo Yerusalãi, okuti esanju liange lia velapo li sule."
Psalms137:7 A Yehova, ivalukila va Edome eteke lia Yerusalãi, eci va linga vati, Li papululi. Li papululi toke koviseveto vialio."
Psalms137:8 Amõla a Bavulono ukãi, okuakunyola! U o ku linga ove ndomo ove wa tu linga etu, o sumũlũha."
Psalms137:9 U o kuata oloñaña viove ha vi tiasola kewe, o sumũlũha."
Psalms138:1 A Yehova, hu pandul a lutima wange wosi. Kovaso olosuku hu imbila ovisungo viesivayo."
Psalms138:2 Metama loku imba ovaso konembele yove yi kola, kuenje manduila onduko yove locisola cove ka ci pui kuenda ocili cove. Wa kemalisa ca piãla onduko yove londaka yove."
Psalms138:3 Eteke nda vilikiya wa nambulula. Wa luisa ongusu yange yovutima.
Psalms138:4 Olosoma viosi viokilu lieve vi ku sivaya, a Yehova, momo via yeva olondaka viomela wove."
Psalms138:5 Vi imbila ovituwa via Yehova ovisungo, momo ulamba wa Yehova wa lua."
Psalms138:6 Momo Yehova, ndaño unene ca piãla, haimo ivaluka olohukui. Vakuepela puãi, o va vanjela ocipãla."
Psalms138:7 Ndaño ngendaila pokati kovitangi ove o mindula, haive woluila eka konyeño yovanyali vange, kuenje eka liove liondio li mopela."
Psalms138:8 Yehova o linga eci a njonguila. A Yehova, ocisola cove ka ci pui cenda ño-o hũ. Ku ka yanduluke oviluvo viovaka ove."
Psalms139:1 A Yehova, ove wa ñulĩhisa, wa ñuliha muẽle."
Psalms139:2 Wa ñuliha poku tumãla lo poku votoka. Wa limbuka ovisimilo viange tunde kupãla.
Psalms139:3 Wa ndengusula kolonjila viange lo poku pekela. Ovituwa viange viosi wa vi limbuka.
Psalms139:4 Ka ku li ondaka kelimi liange te ove, a Yehova, wa yi kũlĩha yosi."
Psalms139:5 Wa sitika kovaso lo konyima. Wa ñapa eka liove.
Psalms139:6 Okukũlĩha kuaco kua ñomohisa. Kua miãla, siu ku tẽla."
Psalms139:7 Ngenda pi si yuvula Espiritu liove? Nilila pi apa ove ku kasi?
Psalms139:8 Nda ndonda kilu, haiko o kasi. Nda njala ula vonjembo, haimo o kasi."
Psalms139:9 Nda nyañula avava omele si tungi kesukiyo liokalunga,"
Psalms139:10 ndaño oko eka liove li songuila, haiko eka liove liondio li ñuata."
Psalms139:11 Nda ndinga siti, Owelema u nuvike. Ocinyi ñasi laco ci linge nduteke,—"
Psalms139:12 ndaño owelema kokuove hawelemako. Uteke wa tua ndutanya. Owelema locinyei via lisoka.
Psalms139:13 Ovimatamata viange viovokati ove wa vi lulika. Wa ndulika vimo lia mai.
Psalms139:14 Hu sivayaila ocikomo como wa ndulika. Ovopange ove a komohisa. Ove wa kũlĩha pe utima wange.
Psalms139:15 Akepa ange ka a wundile kokuove cina nda lulikiwa vuyombeki, cina nda tungiwa luloño kosi yongongo."
Psalms139:16 Ovaso ove a ndete eci ovimatamata vietimba liange ka via lulikiwile handi. Velivulu liove oloneke viosi via nukuiwila omo via sonehiwa osimbu ka viko handi.
Psalms139:17 A Suku, ovisimilo viove ndi vi sole ca lua. Oku vi tenda via lua muẽle."
Psalms139:18 Nda ndi vi tenda, via lua, eseke li sule. Eci masuka, haimo ñasi love."
Psalms139:19 A Suku, ciwa nda wipa olondingaĩvi, ciwa nda vakuakupesela osonde va nunda."
Psalms139:20 Momo va ku popia ci kola. Ovanyali vove va tukula onduko yove lesanda.
Psalms139:21 Si suvuka he, a Yehova, ava va ku suvuka? Si nyehula he, ava va tamalala love?"
Psalms139:22 Nda va suvuka enene, va linga ovanyali vange."
Psalms139:23 Ñulĩhise, a Suku. Kũlĩha utima wange. Seteke. Kũlĩha ovisimilo viange,"
Psalms139:24 hu vanji nda ñasi lovituwa vievĩho. Songuile vonjila ka yi pui.
Psalms140:1 Mopele, a Yehova, komanu vãvi. Silamele koloñangisi"
Psalms140:2 vi tumba tumba ahãla ãvi vitima viavo, haivio vi sovola ño-o ovita."
Psalms140:3 Va lepika alimi avo ndolonyõha. Owule wombuta u li volomela viavo.
Psalms140:4 Mopele, a Yehova, povaka olondingaĩvi. Silamele koloñangisi vi kapela ovitima koku ñonjola olomai."
Psalms140:5 Vakuepela va nela onjanjo. Va yala ovikolo ndowanda. Va ñapela ulivi konele yonjila.
Psalms140:6 Nda popia la Yehova siti, Ove Suku yange. Vonguila etui kokulikutilila kuange, a Yehova."
Psalms140:7 A Yehova, a Suku yange, opopeli wange wa pama, ove wa vindikiya utue wange eteke liocilunga."
Psalms140:8 A Yehova, ku ka ece kondingaĩvi evi a yongola. Ku ka tave okuti olongombo viayo vĩvi vi amako."
Psalms140:9 Ava va mungika va lituna. Va nyõlehe lumamohe u tunda volomela viavo.
Psalms140:10 Akãla ondalu a va lokele. Va imbiwe vovitunu omu ka va tundi vali.
Psalms140:11 Ukualundi ka ka tunge vofeka! Evĩho li landule oñangisi loku yi veta veta.
Psalms140:12 Nda kũlĩha okuti Yehova oñuatisi yava va kangisua, haeye o tetuluila olohukui lesunga."
Psalms140:13 Ocili, ukuesunga o pandula onduko yove. Ava va sunguluka va kala hũ kovaso ove."
Psalms141:1 A Yehova, nda ku vilikiya, ñokele lombili. Vonguila etui kondaka yange eci hu vilikiya."
Psalms141:2 Ohutililo yange kokuove yi linge ndinsensu. Okutulika kuovaka ange ku linge ndocilumba coñolosi.
Psalms141:3 Kapa ondavi komela wange, a Yehova. Lava epito liomela wange."
Psalms141:4 Ku ka tiamise utima wange kovina vĩvi, ndaño koku endaenda lolondingaĩvi okuti nduahãla lovilinga via vĩha. Si ka kale kale kolofesta viavio."
Psalms141:5 Eci ukuesunga a njambula pamue oku natula ci kale kokuange ndohenda, puãi ulela wavakuevĩho lalimue eteke ka u ka waveke utue wange, momo ndukuakulikutililila oku yuvula viavo via vĩha."
Psalms141:6 Eci va eciwa kolonganji vi va kangisa oco va limbuka okuti ondaka ya Yehova yocili.
Psalms141:7 Ndeci ewe li toliwa loku nyanyowaila vofeka haico akepa avo a nyanyohãila komela wonjembo.
Psalms141:8 Ovaso ange puãi, a imbiwa kokuove, a Yehova Suku. Ove wuciwundilo cange. Ku ka sie okuti ombindikiyo mbu."
Psalms141:9 Njuvuise onjanjo va nela kuenda ovilivi violondingaĩvi.
Psalms141:10 Olondingaĩvi vi fe volonjanjo viavio muẽle osimbu ame muluka.
Psalms142:1 Mbilikiya ku Yehova londaka yange. Londaka yange ndi likutilila ku Yehova.
Psalms142:2 Njitila kovaso aye okulisiõsiõla kuange. Ndu lomboluila ohali yange.
Psalms142:3 Eci espiritu liange lia hongua ove wa kũlĩha onjila yange. Vonjila ngendaila va nelamo onjanjo.
Psalms142:4 Mbanja kondio kuenje ñulĩhisa puãi ka ku li umue o ñapako. Oko nilila ka ku mõleha. Ka kuli u o sole omuenyo wange.
Psalms142:5 Mbilikiya kokuove, a Yehova. Ndinga siti, Ove wucikolo cange, haive wunepa yange vofeka ya vakuamuenyo."
Psalms142:6 Yeva evilikiyo liange momo nda sepuka cimue. Mopele kuava va nalisa ohali. Momo va mbelapo kongusu.
Psalms142:7 Njupe vokayike okuti mandula onduko yove. Vakuesunga va ñuala omo ove o sumũlũisa.
Psalms143:1 Yeva ohutililo yange, a Yehova. Vonguila etui kalombelo ange. Omo o kasi lesunga locili, nambulule."
Psalms143:2 Ku ka tuale ukuenje wove vekanga, momo kovaso ove ka kuli u o kasi lomuenyo wa lipua."
Psalms143:3 Omo unyali wa suvalisa, kuenje wa kupuila omuenyo wange posi, wa numalisa vowelema ndava va fa ale osimbu,"
Psalms143:4 oco espiritu liange ka li kuete vali ongusu, lutima vokati kange u kasi lupongo."
Psalms143:5 Njivaluka oloneke vionahũlu. Sokolola ovilinga viove viosi. Sinyanyẽha upange wovaka ove.
Psalms143:6 Ngoluila kokuove ovaka. Utima wange u ku kuetele enyona ndeli liofeka yekango.
Psalms143:7 A Yehova, yayulako oku nambulula. Espiritu liange li kasi oku konyõha. Ku ka mbundisile ocipala cove sanga ndinga ndava va lokila vonjembo."
Psalms143:8 Omele njukise ocisola cove ka ci pui, momo nda ku kolela. Njimbe onumbi yonjila nda posokela oku endelamo, momo nda tiamisa utima wange kokuove"

Psalms143:11 A Yehova, popela omuenyo wange mekonda lionduko yove. Omo o kasi lesunga, vohali ñasi, njupemo."
Psalms143:12 Omo o kasi locisola ka ci pui, kundula ovanyali vange loku nyõla vosi va suvalisa. Momo ndukuenje wove."
Psalms144:1 Yehova, eye ewe liange, a sivayiwe. O longisa ovaka ange ovita, lovimuĩni viange oku yaka."
Psalms144:2 Eye ewe liange, haeye ocikolo cange. Eye ombonge yange, haeye upopeli wange. Eye ombindikiyo yange, kokuaye oko nda wunda. O njulisa olofeka okuti vi mbumba."
Psalms144:3 A Yehova, omunu hẽ nye okuti o wivaluka, pamue omõla omunu okuti u sokolola?"
Psalms144:4 Omunu wa lisoka lofela yaño. Oloneke viaye via linga ndocilelembia ci pita.
Psalms144:5 Petamisa ilu liove, a Yehova, loka. Lamba olomunda okuti ku tunda owisi."
Psalms144:6 Liakuisa olomanyula, va sandola. Imba ovisongo viove, va lundula."
Psalms144:7 Kilu o kasi, olola eka liove. Mopele. Njupe vovava anene lo povaka a vakualofeka."
Psalms144:8 Olomela viavo vi limbaika, lovaka avo olondio ovaka uhembi."

Psalms144:11 Muluise kosipata yĩvi. Mopele povaka a vakualofeka. Ovimela viavo vi popia uhembi, lovaka avo olondio ovaka uhembi."
Psalms144:12 Omãla vetu valume vutila wavo va linge ndovikũla via kula ciwa. Lomãla vetu vakãi va linge ndovawe avindi a songiwila onjo yosoma.
Psalms144:13 Olosila vietu vi yuke olomema viovaima osi. Olomeme vietu vi citile kovisenge vietu olohũlũkãi lolohũlũwa.
Psalms144:14 Olongombe vietu vi mine mine ciwa. Ka vi ka pulumũle ndaño oku cita ovife. Volokololo vietu ka mu ka yevale oku litetelela ohali.
Psalms144:15 Ava va kasi ndoco va sumũlũha. Ofeka yokuti, Yehova eye Suku yavo, oyo ya sumũlũha ocili."

Psalms145:2 Oloneke viosi hu panduila. Sivaya ño-o hũ onduko yove.
Psalms145:3 Yehova unene, wa posokela enene esivayo. Unene waye ka u kũlĩhisua."
Psalms145:4 Ocitumbulukila ci sivaya ovopange ove kocitumbulukila cikuavo. Va lombolola ovilinga viove violohõlo.
Psalms145:5 Ulamba wa piãla wuviali wove, lovilinga viove vi komohĩsa, ovio sinyanyẽha."
Psalms145:6 Omanu va sapula unene wovilinga viove vi yokokisa. Lame ndombolola okukemãla kuove.
Psalms145:7 Va tukula oluhimo lunu wove wa lua kuenje va imbila esunga liove ovisungo.

Psalms145:10 Oviluvo viove viosi vi ku pandula, a Yehova. Olosandu viove vi ku pandiya."
Psalms145:11 Va vangula ulamba wuviali wove, loku sapula unene wove,"

Psalms145:14 Yehova o yakela vosi va yongola oku kupuka. O petula vosi va petama.
Psalms145:15 Vosi va ku imba ovaso, kuenje o va avela okulia kuvo waco."
Psalms145:16 O nyanyumula eka liove, kuenje o kutisa viosi vi kasi lomuenyo."
Psalms145:17 Yehova ukuesunga kovituwa viaye viosi, haeye ukuahenda kovilinga viaye viosi."
Psalms145:18 Yehova o kasi ocipepi la vosi vo vilikiya, okuti vo vilikiya ocili."
Psalms145:19 O muisa vosi vo sumbila evi va yongola. O yeva uteto wavo, o va popela."
Psalms145:20 Yehova o silamela vosi vo sole, olondingaĩvi puãi, o vi nyõla."

Psalms147:1 Sivayi Yehova. Momo Suku yetu ukuahenda kuenje oku wimbila ovisungo viesivayo oco ciwa, haico ca sesamela."
Psalms147:2 Yehova o tumbulula Yerusalãi, haeye ongolola va Isareli va takumũha."
Psalms147:3 O sakola ava va teka kovitima, kuenje itika apute avo."
Psalms147:4 Eye o tenda olombungululu viosi. Viosi o vi tukula olonduko viavio.
Psalms147:5 Cime cetu unene, olohõlo viaye via lua cimue. Ovina viosi viu lomboloka."
Psalms147:6 Yehova o votola ava va kangisua, olondingaĩvi o vi kupuila posi."
Psalms147:7 Imbili Yehova lolupandu. Imbili Suku yetu ovisungo viesivayo lohalupa.
Psalms147:8 Eye o sitika ilu lalende. Eye angiliyila ongongo ombela. O yundisa owangu kolomunda.
Psalms147:9 Ecaeca kovinyama okulia kuavio komãla vovikuamanga nda va lila.
Psalms147:10 Eye ka yolela ongusu yokavalu, ka sanjukila ovolu ulume."
Psalms147:11 Yehova o sanjukila ava vo sumbila, ava va imba ovaso ocisola caye ka ci pui."

Psalms147:13 Momo o kolisa olomimbiliko violombundi viove, o sumũlũisa omãla vove vovokati kove."
Psalms147:14 O ku ñualisa lovikanjo vi kasi lombembua. O ku kutisa lotiliku ya fina.
Psalms147:15 O tuma ocihandeleko caye kilu lieve. Ondaka yaye yenda lonjanga yalua.
Psalms147:16 O lokisa neve ndovonya omeme. O waya ocikokoto ndetiko.
Psalms147:17 O lokisa ociwe caye ndolosisi. Helie o talama lombambi yaye?
Psalms147:18 O tuma ondaka yaye, o vi yengulula. O sikisa ofela yaye kuenje ovava a enda."
Psalms147:19 O sapuila Yakoba ondaka yaye. O lombolola ku Isareli ovisila viaye lovihõlo viaye.
Psalms147:20 Layimue vali ofeka a linga ndoco. Layimue vali ofeka ya kũlĩha ovihõlo viaye. Sivayi Yehova.

Psalms150:2 U sivayaili ovilinga viaye vinene. U sivayi ndunene waye wa piãla.

Proverbs1:1 Olosapo via Salomone, omõla a Daviti, haeye Soma ya va Isareli, vievi:"
Proverbs1:2 Okuti omanu va kũlĩha olondunge loku longiwa, va yeva olondaka viuloño,"
Proverbs1:3 va pindisua levi via sunguluka, levi viesunga locili, levi via suñama,"
Proverbs1:4 okuti olondunge vi eciwa ku vakuanumbi, lukũlĩhiso lesuluviko kamalẽhe."
Proverbs1:5 Ukualondunge layevo o tẽla oku yeva loku amamako kukũlĩhiso, lu wa lunguka o tẽla oku liupilako uloño"
Proverbs1:6 woku yeva olusapo locisetahai, kuenda olondaka violonoño lalupolo avio."
Proverbs1:7 Oku sumbila Yehova oko efetikilo liolondunge. Aveke va tomba tomba uloño loku longiwa.
Proverbs1:8 Amõlãnge, tava kalungulo aso, ku ka sinile okulonga kua nyoho."
Proverbs1:9 Momo ovio via linga ocifuto ca posoka kutue wove, kuenda olomota posingo yove."
Proverbs1:10 Amõlange, nda olondingaĩvi vi ku tamba ku ka tave."
Proverbs1:11 Nda va linga vati, Enju tu ende, tu ka lavekele osonde, tu ka seselele omãla vamãle olivova,"
Proverbs1:12 tu va ine ño lomuenyo ndeci ongehena, pamue olungunge ndeci eyambo;"
Proverbs1:13 oco tu mõla ukuasi wosi wa posoka, tu yukisa olonjo vietu levi tu punda;"
Proverbs1:14 litokeka yapa letu; tu kali lonjeke yimosi pokati ketu.—
Proverbs1:15 Amõlange, ku ka endaende lavo. Yuwisa olomãi viove kalila avo."
Proverbs1:16 Momo olomãi viavo vi loña kũvi, va yayuila oku pesela osonde."
Proverbs1:17 Momo onjanjo yi petuiwa omangonya nda onjila yi yi lete ale.
Proverbs1:18 Ovo puãi, osonde yavo muẽle va yi lavekela; lovimuenyo viavo muẽle va vi seselela."
Proverbs1:19 Olio efulilo lia vosi va sanga ukuasi poku punda. Ava va ci linga va liwa ovo muẽle.
Proverbs1:20 Ndunge o vilakayaila volokololo, o kalokaila vovitanda."
Proverbs1:21 O vilakayaila povila; o kundaila kolombundi vimbo, hati,"
Proverbs1:22 Ene, a vakuanumbi, toke eteke lipi vu sola onumbi yene? Lene, alomembuli, toke eteke lipi vu sanjukila okupembula kuene? Lene, aveke, toke eteke lipi vu suvuka olondunge?"
Proverbs1:23 Yevi okutembula kuange. Ndu situluili utima wange. Ndu sapuili olondaka viange.
Proverbs1:24 Omo ndo kovongi kuenje wa likali, ndo payuli kuenje lomue wa tava,"
Proverbs1:25 puãi wa pukuli alungulo ange osi, kuenda ka wa taveli kokulemẽla kuange,"
Proverbs1:26 oco njola epembe ohali yene, ndu laluli eteke usumba wu kuati,"
Proverbs1:27 eteke usumba wu kuati ndehunguhungu, kuenda olohali viu veti ndocipepe, lelamba longuele viu wili."
Proverbs1:28 Oco va mbilikiya, puãi si tava, va sandiliya, puãi ka va sangi."
Proverbs1:29 Omo va suvuka olondunge, kuenje ka va nolẽle oku sumbila Yehova,"
Proverbs1:30 ka va yonguile alungulo ange, kuenje va lavisa okulonga kuange kuosi,"
Proverbs1:31 oco va lia epako liovituwa viavo, ve kuta enene ovisimilo viavo muẽle."
Proverbs1:32 Ocili umbinde wa vakuanumbi u va fisa, eveli liaveke li va nyõla."
Proverbs1:33 U o njeva puãi o kala ciwa, utima u tula, usumba wevĩho mbu."
Proverbs2:1 Amõlange, nda o tava kolondaka viange, loku seleka vutima ovihandeleko viange,"
Proverbs2:2 okuti o vonguila etui liove kolondunge, loku tiamisa utima wove kuloño,"
Proverbs2:3 ocili, nda o sandiliya ukũlĩhĩso, loku lipilikila uloño,"
Proverbs2:4 nda o vi sanda sanda ndeci va sanda sanda opalata kolomina, kuenda o vi vanjiliya ndeci va vanjiliya ukuasi wa selekiwa,"
Proverbs2:5 oco o kũliha oku sumbila Yehova, kuenje o sanga ukũlĩhiso wa Suku."
Proverbs2:6 Momo Yehova eye ukuakueca olondunge. Vomẽla waye mu tunda tunda ukũlĩhiso luloño.
Proverbs2:7 O solekela ava va sunguluka olondunge viocili, haeye ombindikiyo yolondingesunga."
Proverbs2:8 O lava lava olonjila viesunga. O vetatela onjila yolondingesunga viaye.
Proverbs2:9 Oco o limbuka esunga locili kuenda eci ca sunguluka, onjila yosi yiwa,"
Proverbs2:10 Momo olondunge viñila vutima wove, kuenje uloño u sanjuisa omuenyo wove."
Proverbs2:11 Utate u ku silamẽla. Olondunge vi ku lava lava,"
Proverbs2:12 ha vi ku popela konjila yevĩho, kuenda kokuava va popia popia esanda,"
Proverbs2:13 haivo va pambuka kolonjila via suñama, ha va endela volonjila viowelema;"
Proverbs2:14 haivo va sanjukila oku linga ca vĩha, va yolela okutatama kuevĩho."
Proverbs2:15 Olonjila viavo via penga, okuenda kuavo ka kua suñamele."
Proverbs2:16 Ove o popeliwa kelãsãla, kuenda kocipuepue cukombe ci popia popia ombambe,"
Proverbs2:17 haico ca sia ekamba liaye liokutila, loku ivalako ovisila via Suku yaye."
Proverbs2:18 Momo onjo yaye ya petamẽla kokufa, olonjila viokonjo yaye vi loña konjembo."
Proverbs2:19 Lomue enda kokuaye o tiuka, ndaño oku wila vali volonjila viomuenyo ka wilamo."
Proverbs2:20 Oco ove wendaila vonjila ya vakuacili, o kakatela volonjila violondingesunga."
Proverbs2:21 Momo vakuesunga va tunga vofeka, Vakuacili va tumalamo."
Proverbs2:22 Vakuakandu puãi va tundisua vofeka, kuenda vakuosuanji va veyuiwamo."
Proverbs3:1 Amõlange, ku ka ivaleko alungulo ange. Patekela ovihandeleko viange."
Proverbs3:2 Momo ovio vi ku muisa oloneke via lua, lanyamo omuenyo, kuenda ombembua."
Proverbs3:3 Ohenda locili ka vi ka ku tunde, vi pandekela kosingo yove, vi soneha vutima wove,"
Proverbs3:4 oco o soliwa, kuenje o sanga oluhimo luwa ku Suku lo komanu."
Proverbs3:5 Kolela Yehova lutima wove wosi. Ku ka tiamẽle kolondunge viove muẽle.
Proverbs3:6 U sumbila kolongenda viove viosi, kuenje eye o suñamisa olonjila viove."
Proverbs3:7 Ku ka kolele olondunge viove. Sumbila Yehova, tinduka kũvi."
Proverbs3:8 Oco etimba liove li kuata uhayele, kuenda akepa ove a kavuluka."
Proverbs3:9 Vumba Yehova lovipako viove, lelombolo lia tete kokungula kuove kuosi,"
Proverbs3:10 oco olosila viove vi yuka olomema, kuenda ocikoselo ci supoka ovinyu."
Proverbs3:11 Amõlange, ku ka pukule okupindisa kua Yehova. Okulonga kuaye ka ku ka ku kume."
Proverbs3:12 Yehova o pokuisa u a sole, ndeci ci lingainga onjali lomõlaye a sanjukila."
Proverbs3:13 Wa sumũlũha omunu o sanga Ndunge, kuenda omunu o limuisa uloño,"
Proverbs3:14 momo ondando yaye ya velapo, yopalata yi sule, ukuasi waye wa velapo, wulu u sule."
Proverbs3:15 O silivila muẽle, wa tĩla ca lua, olomota viondongo vi sule. Cosi omunu a livela ka ci lisoki laye."
Proverbs3:16 Peka liaye liondio pa li oloneke via lua viomuenyo, pepĩli ukuasi lunene."
Proverbs3:17 Olonjila viaye via sunguluka; kolohoka viaye ombembua lika.
Proverbs3:18 Eye uti womuenyo kuava vo kuatelela. Ava vosi vo kuata va sumũlũha.
Proverbs3:19 Yehova wa sovola oluali lolondunge. Wa lulika ilu luloño.
Proverbs3:20 Luloño waye wa tumuhĩsa ovava, haiwo a lokisa lawo owume u tunda kalende."
Proverbs3:21 Amõlange, tata olondunge lutate, ka vi ka ku pusumuhe,"
Proverbs3:22 kuenje vi linga omuenyo wutima wove, kuenda eposo liosingo yove;"
Proverbs3:23 oco wenda ciwa vonjila yove, okuti omai yove ka yi likasulapo."
Proverbs3:24 Nda o tumãla ku kuata usumba; eci o pekela, otulo tu posoka."
Proverbs3:25 Oco ku yokokela ocisalu ciya ocipikipiki, ndaño ekundu li veta ondingaĩvi."
Proverbs3:26 Momo Yehova eye ombetateli yove, haeye o popela omãi yove kolonjanjo."
Proverbs3:27 Ku ka likandangiye oku linga ohenda ava va yi sukila, nda o ci tẽla oku yi linga."
Proverbs3:28 Ku ka popie lukuẽle huti, Kuende yapa, tiuka noke. Hẽla oco hu ihã, —osimbu o kasi ale laco."
Proverbs3:29 Ku ka simĩle cimue cĩvi ukuẽle o lisungue laye, haeye wa ku kolela."
Proverbs3:30 Ku ka litĩle lomunu olivova eci ka ku lingile cimue cĩvi.
Proverbs3:31 Ku ka livele ongusu yonjaki, ku ka nole onjila yimue yaye."
Proverbs3:32 Momo Yehova o nyale ocimbinde, puãi o kolela ava va sunguluka."
Proverbs3:33 Esiñalo lia Yehova li wila vonjo yondingaĩvi, puãi esumũlũho lia Yehova li wila vonjo yondingesunga."
Proverbs3:34 Ocili eye o pembula olomembuli, puãi o linga ambombe ohenda."
Proverbs3:35 Vakualondunge va sumbiwa, aveke puãi va sepuiwa."
Proverbs4:1 Ene amãla, yevi alungulo aso. Yeveleli ho kuata uloño."
Proverbs4:2 Ame ndu wihi alungulo a posoka. Ko ka si ovilongua viange.
Proverbs4:3 Eci nda kala omõla, haime ndimõla ongunga ku maĩ, nda endaenda la tate,"
Proverbs4:4 yu wa ndongaisa hati, Utima wove u patekele olondaka viange. Linga ovihandeleko viange oco o mõla omuenyo."
Proverbs4:5 Ku ka ivaleko, ndaño oku sia, olondaka viomẽla wange. Kuata olondunge kuenda uloño."
Proverbs4:6 Ku ka vi yanduluke oco vi ku vetatela. Vi sola oco vi ku tata tata.
Proverbs4:7 Efetikilo liolondunge lieli, kuata olondu nge. Pesela cosi o kuete hu kuata olondunge."
Proverbs4:8 Vi kemainya kuenje viu ku amisako. Vi patekela kuenje viu ku sumbisa.
Proverbs4:9 Vi futisa utue wove ocifuto ca posoka. Vi ku muisa ekolowa liulamba.
Proverbs4:10 Yevelela, amõlange, tava kolondaka via nge, oco anyamo omuenyo wove a lua."
Proverbs4:11 Nda ku longisila vonjila yolondunge. Nda ku songuila valila esunga.
Proverbs4:12 Eci wenda omai yove ka yi tatekiwa. Ndaño o lupuka ku lilondoka.
Proverbs4:13 Kuata kalungulo, ku ka a ece vali; a patekela omo o-o omuenyo wove."
Proverbs4:14 Ku ka wile vonjila yolondingaĩvi, ndaño oku endela vonjila ya vakuevĩho."
Proverbs4:15 Yi yuvula, ku ka pitemo. Yi pitãhãla, kuende ño."
Proverbs4:16 Omo ovo ka va pekela te va linga cĩvi. Va pumba otulo te va lueyisa umue.
Proverbs4:17 Va lialia ombolo yi tunda kevĩho. Va nyuanyua ovinyu vi tunda kemande.
Proverbs4:18 Onjila yondingesunga ya soka ndocinyi congula, camamako kokutua toke ca linga utanya."
Proverbs4:19 Onjila yolondingaĩvi ya soka ndowelema. Ka vi lete eci vi lipunduka laco.
Proverbs4:20 Amõlange, tava kolondaka viange. Vonguila etui kalungulo ange."
Proverbs4:21 Ka vi ka ku limbe ño. Vi patekela vutima wove.
Proverbs4:22 Momo ovio omuenyo wava va vi sanga, haivio uhayele watimba avo."
Proverbs4:23 Lava utima wove lepandi, omo kokuawo oko ku tunda olono viomuenyo."
Proverbs4:24 Imbapo umamohe vomela wove. Olondaka viesanda vi kale ocipãla love.
Proverbs4:25 Ovaso ove a vanje kovaso, a suñame muẽle miu!"
Proverbs4:26 Kũlĩhisa ciwa onjila yolomai viove, oco olongenda viove viosi vi sunguluke."
Proverbs4:27 Ku ka pengele kondio ndaño kepĩli. Tindula omãi yove kũvi.
Proverbs5:1 Amõlange, tava kolondunge viange. Vonguila etui kuloño wange,"
Proverbs5:2 ndokuti o kala ukuesuluviko, lomẽla wove u tata ukũlĩhiso."
Proverbs5:3 Momo omẽla wocipuepue u lola lola owiki. Olondaka viaye via leñela, ulela u sule."
Proverbs5:4 Kefulilo puãi o vi lulisa ndondulu, o vi tuisa ndosipata ya tua nelembali."
Proverbs5:5 Olomãi viaye vi lokila kokufa. Ananga aye a panda konjembo.
Proverbs5:6 Ocili, ka endela vonjila yomuenyo, olonjila viaye via penga penga ño, kuenje eye ka ci kũlĩhile."
Proverbs5:7 Cilo amãla vange, njeveleli. Ko ka tinduki kolondaka viomẽla wange."
Proverbs5:8 Onjila yene yi kale ocipãla laye. Ko ka endi kuvelo wonjo yaye,"
Proverbs5:9 sanga vu pesela esumbilo liene, kuenda weci ovimuenyo viene ku umue ko kapeliko;"
Proverbs5:10 sanga vakuavo va sanjukila ukuasi wene, kuenda epako liovopange ene li enda konjo yukombe waño;"
Proverbs5:11 kuenje kesulilo, eci ositu yene latimba ene a nyõlẽha,"
Proverbs5:12 vu livela hoti, Avoyo, nda suvukile alungulo. Nda pembuile okulongiwa."
Proverbs5:13 Sia pokuile kondaka yalongisi vange. Sia yevelile olondaka violondunguli viange.
Proverbs5:14 Pa ñambele ño naito oku pisiwa okufa pekanga lia vakuetu.
Proverbs5:15 Nyuanyua ovava ovocitapela cove, kuenda ana a tunda tunda vocisimo cove."
Proverbs5:16 Olono viove hẽ vi sanduiwa ha vi lingi olondui viovava volokololo?
Proverbs5:17 Vi linge ño viove, lika wove, ka vi ka linge via vamue vañi."
Proverbs5:18 Ono yove yi sumũlũhe. Sanjukila ukãi wove wombutulua,"
Proverbs5:19 una wa soka ndombambi ya posoka, pamue ndohoha ya fina. Elembeleko liaye li ku sanjuise olonjanja viosi. Sanjukila ocisola caye oloneke viosi."
Proverbs5:20 Amõlange, nye o solela ukãi wamãle? Nye wa likondekela locipuepue?"
Proverbs5:21 Momo, olonjila viomunu vi molẽha kovaso a Yehova. Eye o lavulula olonjila viaye viosi."
Proverbs5:22 Olohõle viondingaĩvi viu kuata, kuenje yi fila vovikolo viakandu aye."
Proverbs5:23 Yi fa omo ya kamba oku lipokuisa. Yi nyolẽha omo uveke wayo wa lua.
Proverbs6:1 Amõlange, nda wa linga ombangi yukuẽle, pamue nda wa lisila oseo kukombe,"
Proverbs6:2 nda wa litela onjanjo lolondaka viomẽla wove, kuenje wa kuatiwa muẽle lolondaka viomẽla wove,—"
Proverbs6:3 Amõlange, nda oco wa linga, omo o kasi ale povaka ukuẽle, oku lipopela linga ndomo: Kuende lombili, ka livondele lukuẽle."
Proverbs6:4 Ovaso ove ka a ka kuate otulo, ovikutukutu ka vi ka suñile."
Proverbs6:5 Lipopela ndohoha yi tila enyanga, pamue ndonjila yi tila ometuli."
Proverbs6:6 Kuende kolunjinji acisiãi. Sokolola ovituwa vialuo hu lunguka.
Proverbs6:7 Ka lu kuete osoma, pamue ocime, ndaño ombiali,"
Proverbs6:8 haimo lu vanjiliya ohuta yaluo yokondombo, kuenda lu ungola ovilia vialuo poku lombola."
Proverbs6:9 Acisiãi, o pekela toke kekumbi li pi? Ekumbi li pi o pasuka kotulo tuove?"
Proverbs6:10 Mekonda liokatulo katito lokakusuñila kãno, kuenda okuliketika naito ovaka hu puyuka,"
Proverbs6:11 oco uputu u ku sanga ndocingumba, kuenda usuke ndukuavita."
Proverbs6:12 Omunu uvi, haeye ondingohõle, o popia popia uhembi,"
Proverbs6:13 o pakola ovaso, o sesama olomãi, imbaimba onumbi lovimuine,"
Proverbs6:14 lutima waye wahuku o sovola evĩho loku sanomõla ovama,"
Proverbs6:15 oco ohali yu veta ocipikipiki, o teka ocipikipiki, ka sakuiwa vali."
Proverbs6:16 Ku li ovina epandu Yehova a suvuka, epanduvali muẽle a nyale, vievi:"
Proverbs6:17 Ovaso epela,— elimi liuhembi,— ovaka a pesela osonde yu we lipua,—"
Proverbs6:18 utima u sokolola ovipango vĩvi,— olomãi vi yolokela kevĩho,—"
Proverbs6:19 ombangi yesanda yi popia uhembi,— kuenda u o sanomõla ovama pokati kava va situe."
Proverbs6:20 Amõlange, patekela ocihandeleko ca so. Ku ka tombe alungulo a nyõho."
Proverbs6:21 Vi pandekela vutima wove, vi wala wala posingo yove."
Proverbs6:22 Eci wenda viu ku songuila, eci o pekela viu ku lava, eci o pasuka vi vangula love."
Proverbs6:23 Momo ocihandeleko oco ovela, elungulo olio ocinyi, olondaka vioku longa ovio onjila yomuenyo,"
Proverbs6:24 vi tela oku ku popela kukuokahonga, kuenda kombambe yelimi liocipuepue."
Proverbs6:25 Utima wove ka u ka livele eposo liaye. Ka ka ku tambe lovaso aye.
Proverbs6:26 Ocili, ombaisi yi ku nenela oku kamba ombolo, ocipuepue puãi ci sandiliya omuenyo wove."
Proverbs6:27 Ulume nga o tela oku angata ondalu okuti olonanga viaye ka vi pi?
Proverbs6:28 Pamue o tela oku endela pakala ondalu, okuti olomai viaye ka vi pi?"
Proverbs6:29 Haico ci kasi lu enda kukãi wamale, wosi u lamba ka pumbi oku yambuiwa."
Proverbs6:30 Ka va sepula hẽ ocimunu nda civila onjala eci ca lambuka?
Proverbs6:31 Kuenje nda ca sangiwa ci kuete oku feta olonjanja epanduvali, ndokuti eca ovikuata viosi viovonjo yaye."
Proverbs6:32 Puãi u o linga uvaisi wa kamba olondunge. U o ci linga o linyõla eye muẽle.
Proverbs6:33 O sanga olombole losõi, epembe liaye ka limũha vali."
Proverbs6:34 Momo ukuelume u funguisa ulume. Eteke lioku fetuluinya ka kuete ohenda.
Proverbs6:35 Layimue ofeto a tava. Ndaño o wiha ukuasi wa lua haimo ka tulumuha.
Proverbs7:1 Amõlange, lava olondaka viange, kuenda ovihandeleko viange vi patekela vutima."
Proverbs7:2 Lava ovihandeleko viange oco o kala lomuenyo. Kuenda ovisila viange vi tata ndomoliso.
Proverbs7:3 Vi pandekela kovimuine viove kuosi wendaenda. Vi soneha vutima wove.
Proverbs7:4 Popia la Ndunge huti, Ove mukãi wange. Tukula Noño huti, Ukuetu,—"
Proverbs7:5 ndokuti o ku popela kelãsãla, kocipuepue ci popia ño ombambe."
Proverbs7:6 Momo nda vanjela ponjanela yovonjo yange,"
Proverbs7:7 kuenje nda mõla vamue ka va lungukile. Yu pokati kamãlehe vaco nda limbukilapo ukuenje umue wa kamba olondunge.
Proverbs7:8 Yu wa pita kokololo ocipepi levindi liokonjo yaye, wa endela vonjila yi panda konjo yaye,"
Proverbs7:9 koluvumbulu, koñolosi, pokati kowelema wuteke."
Proverbs7:10 Kuenje tala, ukãi umue wa ñualehẽla laye, wa wala uwalo wupuepue, haeye ukuatutu,"
Proverbs7:11 ukuakulipilisa londaka yaye, haeye o tungayala, ka tumayala vonjo yaye,"
Proverbs7:12 yu kolokololo, yu kovila, o lavakaila kavindi osi."
Proverbs7:13 Kuenje wa kuata ukuenje waco, wo sipula, locipãla cutõi wa popia laye hati,"
Proverbs7:14 Nda ka lumbile ovilumba, etali nda telisa olohuminyo viange."
Proverbs7:15 Oco nda tundila oku ku landula loku ku sandiliya, kuenje nda ku sanga."
Proverbs7:16 Nda yala ale ula wange lolonyime, lolonyime violinyu yavala añi añi o ke Egito."
Proverbs7:17 Nda lẽhisa ula wange la mura kuenda candala lakasia.
Proverbs7:18 Enju, tu tẽlĩse ocisola cetu toke ku ca, tu lisanjuise locisola."
Proverbs7:19 Momo ulume wange vonjo kemo, wa enda ungende wupãla,"
Proverbs7:20 wambata ocipete colombongo peka. O tiuka eteke osai yi tunga ongalo.
Proverbs7:21 Wo tamba lombambe ya lua, wo yula lolondaka viaye via leñela."
Proverbs7:22 Ukuenje yu wo kuama ndongombe yi kasi loku enda kepondelo, pamue ndombambi yi panda konjanjo,"
Proverbs7:23 toke usongo wa yasa komuma, pamue ndonjila yi yayuila kowiki, kuenje ka yi ci cokuti wa petuiwila omuenyo waye."
Proverbs7:24 Cilo, amãla vange, njeveleli. Tavi kolondaka viomẽla wange."
Proverbs7:25 Utima wove ka u ka pambukile kolonjila viaye. Ku ka tungayale volonjila viaye.
Proverbs7:26 Momo va nyõlẽha laye va lua, va pondiwa laye vakahandangala."
Proverbs7:27 Onjo yaye oyo onjila yokonjembo, ya lunga muẽle kolohondo viokufa."
Proverbs8:1 Ndunge hẽ ka kovonga? Noño hẽ ka vilikiya?
Proverbs8:2 Kanyaha alila lo volonjila, oko a talayama."
Proverbs8:3 Kolombundi viovimbo, kovivelo viaco muẽle, oko a vilakaiyaila, hati,"
Proverbs8:4 Ene alume, ene muẽle ndo kovongi. Nda lipilikila komãla valume."
Proverbs8:5 Ene wa kambi olondunge, lilongisi olondunge. Lene waveke, yeveleli."
Proverbs8:6 Yeveleli ya, omo mopia ovina via piãla. Komẽla wange ku tunda evi via sunguluka."
Proverbs8:7 Momo omẽla wange u vangola esunga, omẽla wesanda ndu nyale."
Proverbs8:8 Olondaka viosi viomẽla wange viocili muẽle, ca penga pamue cuhembi ka cimo."
Proverbs8:9 Viosi vi linga ocili kukualondunge, haivio vi sungulukila ava va sanga ukũlĩhĩso."
Proverbs8:10 Kuati alungulo ange, opalata hayoko, kuenda uloño, ulu hawoko, ndaño ulu wa nõliwa."
Proverbs8:11 Momo olondunge via velapo, ovawe a tĩla a sule. Ovina viosi o livela ka vi lisoki lavio."
Proverbs8:12 Ame Ndunge, nda tunga la Nate. Ndi sanga uloño loku lunguka."
Proverbs8:13 Oku sumbila Yehova oko oku suvuka evĩho. Epela, lemande, lonjila yĩvi, kuenda omẽla wuhembi, viosi ndi vi suvuka."
Proverbs8:14 Kokuange ku li elungulo luloño wocili, haime ñuete olondunge lupami."
Proverbs8:15 Eci ame ñasi olosoma vi viala, lakulu va tetolola lesunga."
Proverbs8:16 Eci ame ñasi omãla volosoma va kuata uviali, kuenda olombuale vi viala oluali."
Proverbs8:17 Ame sole ava va sole, lava va sandiliya va sanga."
Proverbs8:18 Kokuange ku li ukuasi lesumbilo, ukuasi una u tumãla kuenda esumũlũho."
Proverbs8:19 Apako ange a velapo, ulu u sule, ndaño ulu wa nõlĩwa. Onima yange ya velapo, opalata, ndaño eyi ya tila, yi sule."
Proverbs8:20 Ame ngendaila vonjila ya suñama, lovalila a sunguluka,"
Proverbs8:21 hã si muisa ukuasi vana va sole, loku yukisa oviseleko viavo."
Proverbs8:22 Yehova wa ndulika kefetikilo liupange waye. Ame tete kovopange aye onahũlũlua.
Proverbs8:23 Nda sovuiwa kefetikilo kuna ka ku ci, oluali handi ka luko."
Proverbs8:24 Cina ka kua kaile okalunga oco va nyita, osimbu olono ka via tombokale handi ovava."
Proverbs8:25 Cina olomunda ka via kapiwile handi, kuenda oviwulu kaviko, oco nda citiwa."
Proverbs8:26 Cina eye ka lulikile handi olofeka lovisenge, ndaño oneketela yatete kilu lieve."
Proverbs8:27 Eci a sovola ovailu ame haiko nda kala, eci a ñualisa ocingondombela kilu liokalunga,—"
Proverbs8:28 eci a kolisa ilu kilu, leci a tuiya olono viokalunga,—"
Proverbs8:29 eci a seteka ulilo wokalunga, ndokuti ovava ka a pitahãla uhandeleko waye,— leci a seteka ociseveto coluali,"
Proverbs8:30 oco ame nda kala laye ndomesele. Oloneke viosi eye wa sanjukila. Lame nda sanjuka kovaso aye otembo yosi.
Proverbs8:31 Nda yolela muẽle olofeka violuali luaye, nda sanjukilavo omãla vomanu."
Proverbs8:32 Cilo, amãla vange, njeveleli. Va sumũluha ava va lava lava olonjila viange."
Proverbs8:33 Tavi kalungulo ho lunguki, ko ka a likali."
Proverbs8:34 Wa sumũlũha omunu o njevelela, haeye o lavelela oloneke viosi kolombundi viange, loku talamẽla kovikuli viapito ange."
Proverbs8:35 Ocili u wa sanga ame o sanga omuenyo, haeye o muĩla esumũluho ku Yehova."
Proverbs8:36 U wa ndueyela o lipumbisa eye muẽle. Vosi va suvuka ovo va sole oku fa.
Proverbs9:1 Ndunge wa tunga onjo yaye, wa sembika olomanji viaye epanduvali."
Proverbs9:2 Wa ipaya ovinyama viaye, wa angiliya ovinyu, wa yala omesa yaye."
Proverbs9:3 Wa tuma afeko vaye, ha va vilikiya koviwulu vimbo, vati,"
Proverbs9:4 U ka lungukile a pambukile palo. O popia lava ka va kuete olondunge hati,"
Proverbs9:5 Enjui, u liko kombolo yange, u nyuiko kovinyu nda tenga."
Proverbs9:6 Tinduki kuveke ha vu kala lomuenyo. Endeli vonjila yolondunge.
Proverbs9:7 U o lemẽla ukuetombo o sanga atuka, lu o pisa ondingaĩvi o tondalawa."
Proverbs9:8 Ku ka lemẽle ukuetombo sanga o ku suvuka. Lemela ukualondunge kuenje o ku sola.
Proverbs9:9 Longa ukualondunge kuenje eye amamako kolondunge. Longisa ukuesunga kuenje eye amamako kukũlĩhiso.
Proverbs9:10 Oku sumbila Yehova oko efetikilo liolondunge. Oku kũliha Suku o kola oko uloño.
Proverbs9:11 Momo kokuange oloneke viove vi ka luila, kuenje anyamo ove a vokiyilua."
Proverbs9:12 Nda wa kuata olondunge wa vi likuatela ove muẽle. Nda wukuetombo puãi, ngongo yove!"
Proverbs9:13 Ukãi ukuesanda o yuela ño, wa pua olondunge, ka kũlĩha osõi."
Proverbs9:14 O yotaila puvelo wonjo yaye. O tumayala kovivulu viovimbo,"
Proverbs9:15 ha vilakaiya ava va vinjuka, haivo va pita ombamba,"
Proverbs9:16 hati, Wosi wa pua olondunge a pambukile palo. O popia lu ka kuete olondunge hati,"
Proverbs9:17 Ovava a iviwa o-o a sõsa. Ombolo ya liwa uyombeki oyo yi pepa.
Proverbs9:18 Puãi o ka ci okuti ava va fa ale haiko va kasi, ka civo okuti akombe vaye va kasi valondo onjembo."
Proverbs10:1 Omõla nda ukualondunge o sanjuisa isiaye. Omõla nda eveke puãi o sumuisa inaye.
Proverbs10:2 Ukuasi wa tunda kũvi ka u sumuluisa omunu. Esunga puãi li popela kokufa.
Proverbs10:3 Yehova ka tava okuti ondingesunga yi lambuka, haeye o tateka ocipululu condingaĩvi."
Proverbs10:4 Eka liepipi li koka uputu, eka liombili puãi li muisa ukuasi."
Proverbs10:5 Omõla ungula kotembo yondombo wa lunguka, Puãi omõla o pekela otulo kotembo yelombolo o kutisa osõi."
Proverbs10:6 Asumũlũho a kala kutue wondingesunga, omẽla wondingaivi puãi u yuka lemande."
Proverbs10:7 Onjivaluko yukuesunga oyo esumũluho, onduko yondingaĩvi puãi yi sekala."
Proverbs10:8 Ukualondunge vutima o tava kovihandeleko, puãi u o popia ño esanda o nyõleha."
Proverbs10:9 U endaenda lesunga o koka, u puãi o pengisa olonjila viaye o limbukiwa."
Proverbs10:10 U o pakula liso o talisa ohali, u puãi o lemela lutoi o muisa ombembua."
Proverbs10:11 Omẽla wondingesunga owo ono yomuenyo, omẽla wondingaĩvi puãi we yuka emande."
Proverbs10:12 Esuvu li sanomõla ovaima, ocisola puãi ka ci tendi akambo."
Proverbs10:13 Vomẽla wonoño mu sangiwa olondunge, puãi ombueti ya sesamẽla vonyima yundeti wa kamba olondunge."
Proverbs10:14 Vakualondunge va soleka uloño, okupopia kueveke puãi ku koka enyõleho."
Proverbs10:15 Ocikolo cohuasi ukuasi waye, ci nyõla olosuke usuke wavio."
Proverbs10:16 Onima yondingesunga yi tuala komuenyo, onima yolondingaĩvi yi tuala koku nyõlẽha."
Proverbs10:17 U o patekela alungulo o kasi vonjila yomuenyo, u puãi o tomba alungulo o nyelẽla."
Proverbs10:18 U o seleka esuvu o kuete omẽla wuhembi, lu o popia usokui eye eveke."
Proverbs10:19 Pokati kolondaka via lua ka pa kambi ahuku, u puãi o pokuisa elimi liaye eye wa lunguka."
Proverbs10:20 Elimi liukuesunga opalata ya noliwa, utima wondingaĩvi ocina caño."
Proverbs10:21 Omẽla wondingesunga u tekula va lua, aveke puãi va fila omo va kamba olondunge."
Proverbs10:22 Esumũlũho lia Yehova li muisa ukuasi, hailio ka li vokiya vali ohali."
Proverbs10:23 Keveke oku linga cĩvi kua soka ndoku papala, kukualondunge puãi oku linga esunga oko esanju."
Proverbs10:24 Eci ondingaĩvi yi ci kuetele ohele oco cu wiya. Onjongole yondingesunga puãi yi tẽlisua.
Proverbs10:25 Eci ehunguhungu li pita ondingaĩvi kayiko vali, ukuesunga puãi o kala hũ."
Proverbs10:26 Ndeci owuña windangele kovayo, pamue owisi vovaso, haico ukuawesi kuava vo tuma tuma."
Proverbs10:27 Okusumbila Yehova kuamisako oloneke, anyamo olondingaĩvi puãi a tepuluka."
Proverbs10:28 Elavoko liukuesunga li tẽlisua lesanju, elavoko liondingaĩvi puãi li nyõlẽha."
Proverbs10:29 Yehova eye ocikolo ca vakuesunga, haeye unyõli wolondingaĩvi."
Proverbs10:30 Vakuesunga ka va sondoloka vali, olondingaĩvi puãi ka vi tumãla vofeka."
Proverbs10:31 Omẽla wondingesunga u vangola olondu nge, elimi liuhembi puãi li tetiwa."
Proverbs10:32 Omẽla wondingesunga u kũlĩha eci ca sunguluka, omẽla wondingaĩvi puãi u kũlĩha eci ca tatama."
Proverbs11:1 Omesaliso yeliaño Yehova o yi nyale, oseteko yocili yu sanjuisa."
Proverbs11:2 Eci epela liya oco osõi yiyavo, ambombe puãi, ovo va kuete olondunge."
Proverbs11:3 Ocili ca vakuesunga ci va songuila, puãi okutatama kuolondingaĩvi ku va nyõla."
Proverbs11:4 Ukuasi ko sumũluisa keteke lionyeño, esunga puãi li popela kokufa."
Proverbs11:5 Esunga liukuacili liu suñamisila onjila yaye, ondingaĩvi puãi yi nyolẽha lũvi wayo."
Proverbs11:6 Esunga liava va pua evelo li va popela, vakuelimbi puãi va kuatiwa lolohõle viavo."
Proverbs11:7 Eci omunu ũvi a fa elavoko liaye limuha, elavoko lia vakuevĩho li pua."
Proverbs11:8 Ondingesunga yi puluka kelamba, ondingaĩvi yi piñalapo."
Proverbs11:9 Omunu ũvi o nyõla ukuavo lomẽla waye, olondingesunga puãi vi popeliwa lukũlĩhiso."
Proverbs11:10 Vakuesunga nda va sumũlũha imbo li yolela, olondingaĩvi nda vi nyõleha omanu volula."
Proverbs11:11 Imbo li kemalisua lesumũluho lia vakuacili, puãi lomẽla wolondingaĩvi li papuluka."
Proverbs11:12 U o lavisa ukuavo wa kamba olondunge, puãi u wa lunguka uha ño."
Proverbs11:13 Emamõhe o limbulula viuyombeki, puãi u wa kolelua ocili o vi uhila."
Proverbs11:14 Apa ka peli alungulo omanu va nyõlẽha, apa puãi peli olondunguli via lova opo peli okukoka."
Proverbs11:15 U wa likapa uvangi wu ka kulĩhĩle o yambuiwa, puãi u o nyale olonjeke o koka."
Proverbs11:16 Ukãi wa sunguluka o sumbiwa, alume vakuacipululu va limuisa ukuasi."
Proverbs11:17 Ukuahenda o lisumuluisa eye muẽle, ukuaviñali puãi o livalula eye muẽle."
Proverbs11:18 Ondingaĩvi yi tambula ofeto yesanda, ukuakuwaya esunga puãi o tambula onima yocili."
Proverbs11:19 U o kuama esunga o panda komuenyo, u o kuama evĩho o limuisa okufa."
Proverbs11:20 Yehova o nyale vakuelimbi liutima, vakualonjila via pua evĩho puãi o va sanjukila."
Proverbs11:21 Ocili muẽle ondingaĩvi ka yi pumbi oku yambuiwa, olondingesunga puãi vi popelua."
Proverbs11:22 Ndeci ocinunga culu kupinyo wongulu, haico ci kasi ukãi wa posoka nda ka kuete olondunge."
Proverbs11:23 Onjongole yondingesunga yi sulila lika vuwa, elavoko liondingaĩvi li sulila vonyeño,"
Proverbs11:24 Umue ecaeca oviali, haimo ukuasi waye u yukinyua. Ukuavo puãi o limĩla, ka ecaeca ndomo co sesamẽla oku eca, kuenje o mõla usuke."
Proverbs11:25 Ukuacali o sumũlũha. U o nyuisa nyuisa ovava o nyuisiwavo.
Proverbs11:26 Omanu va siñala u o va limĩla olomema, puãi asumũlũho a kala lu o va vi landaisa."
Proverbs11:27 U o sandiliya esunga o sandiliya oku soliwa, evĩho puaĩ liya ku o sandiliya evĩho."
Proverbs11:28 U o kolela ukuasi waye uvuka, vakuesunga puãi vamako ndemela lionjovo."
Proverbs11:29 U o sakalaisa onjo yaye o siala vofela. Eveke li vumba ukualondunge.
Proverbs11:30 Epako liukuesunga uti womuenyo. Ukualondunge o kuata kuata ovitima viomanu.
Proverbs11:31 Nda ukuesunga o yambuiwa palo posi ka ci piãla hẽ kondingaĩvi lukuakandu?
Proverbs12:1 Wosi o sole oku pindisua eye o sole ukũlĩhiso, u puãi o suvuka oku longiwa eye wa seluka."
Proverbs12:2 Ukuesunga o tambula ohenda ku Yehova, u o sima sima evĩho puãi o tambula episo."
Proverbs12:3 Lomue omunu o tuamẽla levĩho, olombombo viukuesunga puãi ka vi veyuka."
Proverbs12:4 Ukãi uwa eye ulamba wa veyaye, ukãi ukuesanda puãi wa soka ndoku vola vakepa aye."
Proverbs12:5 Ovisimĩlo violondingesunga viocili, alungulo olondingaĩvi elimbi."
Proverbs12:6 Olondaka violondingaĩvi vi lavakala osonde, omẽla wa vakuesunga puãi u popela omanu."
Proverbs12:7 Olondingaĩvi vi lunduiwa kuenje vi takata, onjo yukuesunga puãi yi tumãla."
Proverbs12:8 Omunu o sivayiwa ndolondunge viaye, ukuemande puãi o lavisiwa."
Proverbs12:9 Omunu o sule, o litekula lupange waye, eye wa velapo, omunu o likemainya, puãi wa suka okulia, eye o sule."
Proverbs12:10 Ondingesunga yi sokolola omuenyo wocinyama cayo, ohenda yondingaĩvi puãi ungangala."
Proverbs12:11 U o lima lima ovapia aye eye o sanga okulia ku u tẽla, puãi u o tungayala ño eye wa kamba olondunge."
Proverbs12:12 Ocikolo condingaĩvi ci papuluka, olombombo violondingesunga puãi vi kuatelela."
Proverbs12:13 Ukuevĩho o kuatiwa lolohole viomẽla waye, ukuesunga puãi o puluka kelamba."
Proverbs12:14 Epako liwa liomẽla li kutisa omunu, ovopange ovaka omunu o tiuwila onima."
Proverbs12:15 Onjila yeveke yo sunguluka, ukualondunge puãi o yeva kalungulo."

Proverbs12:19 Omẽla wukuacili u kala hũ, elimi liuhembi puãi li pua lombili."
Proverbs12:20 Elimbi li kasi vutima wava va panga evĩho, ava puãi va panga esunga va kuete onjolela."
Proverbs12:21 Lacimue cĩvi ciya kukuesunga, olondingaĩvi puãi vi tala tala olohali."
Proverbs12:22 Yehova o nyale ovimẽla viuhembi, puãi o sanjukila vakuakulinga ocili."

Proverbs12:25 Ohele vutima womunu yu petamisa, ondaka yohenda puãi yu petula."
Proverbs12:26 Ukuesunga o sia evĩho, onjila yolondingaĩvi yi va nyẽlisa."
Proverbs12:27 Ukuawesi ka yoki ositu a yeva, ukuambili puãi o limuisa ukuasi wa lua."

Proverbs13:1 Omõla nda ukualondunge o yeva kalungulo a soyaye, puãi ukuetombo ka tava oku longiwa."
Proverbs13:2 Omunu ukuesunga o lialia elau kepako liomẽla waye, puãi ukuevĩho o livela lika emande."
Proverbs13:3 U o lava lava omẽla waye o popela omuenyo waye, u puãi ukuakusamoha enene o nyõlẽha."
Proverbs13:4 Ukuawesi o livela kuenje lacimue a sanga, ukuambili puãi o kuta."
Proverbs13:5 Ukuesunga o suvuka uhembi, ondingaĩvi puãi yi lingainga evĩho lakutisasõi."
Proverbs13:6 Esunga li lava ukuacili, puãi evĩho li nyõla ukuakandu."
Proverbs13:7 Kuli u o liluvikiya ohuasi puãi ka kuete, kuli u o liluvikiya osuke puãi ohuasi muẽle."
Proverbs13:8 Ukuasi womunu eyovo liomuenyo waye, puãi osuke ka yi kuete eci cu yovola."
Proverbs13:9 Ocinyi colondingesunga ci tua, ovela yolondingaivi puãi yima."
Proverbs13:10 Epela li koka uyaki lika, Puãi ava va yeva alungulo avo vakualondunge."
Proverbs13:11 Ukuasi wa sangiwa lonjanga u tepuluka, puãi u o selaika naito naito u luisa."
Proverbs13:12 Elavoko liosimbu li tepuluisa utima, onjongole ya sangiwa oyo uti womuenyo."
Proverbs13:13 U o lavisa ondaka eye o linyõla, puãi u o sumbila ocihandeleko eye o mõla onima."
Proverbs13:14 Alungulo a vakualondunge o-o ono vomuenyo, ha tu puluka lao kolonjanjo viokufa."
Proverbs13:15 Olondunge viesunga vi koka oku soliwa, onjila yavakuakandu puãi oyo enyõlẽho liavo."
Proverbs13:16 Ukuotate o lekisa olondunge kovina viosi a linga. Eveke li litambaila lowova waye.
Proverbs13:17 Omunga yahuku yi talisa omanu ohali, puãi onumiwa yocili yi nena oku sakuiwa."
Proverbs13:18 Usuke losõi viya ku wa nyemãla oku longiwa, u o tava oku u lemẽla o sumbiwa."
Proverbs13:19 Onjongole ya tẽlisua yi sanjuisa utima, puãi aveke va nyale oku tinduka kũvi."
Proverbs13:20 U endaenda la vakualondunge o lingavo ukualondunge, u puãi endaenda laveke o yambuiwa."
Proverbs13:21 Ohali yi landula vakuakandu; esumũlũho li linga onima yolondingesunga.
Proverbs13:22 Omunu wocili o sia ocipiñalo kocitumbulukila caye, puãi ukuasi wondingakandu u piñaliwa lukuesunga."

Proverbs13:24 U o yuvuisa ombueti komõlaye u nyale; u u sole o kuete ombili yoku u pindisa.
Proverbs13:25 Ukuesunga o kuete okulia ku u tẽla, puãi imo liondingaĩvi li lamboka."
Proverbs14:1 Ndunge o litungila onjo, Eveke puãi o yi tungulula lovaka aye."
Proverbs14:2 U endaenda ca suñama o sumbila Yehova; ukuanjila ya penga u pembula.
Proverbs14:3 Ombangulo yeveke yi linga ombueti vonyima yaye; ovimẽla via vakualondunge vi va popela.
Proverbs14:4 Oku ka kuli olongombe ka kuli olomema; ovaima a lova a tunda kongusu yongombe.
Proverbs14:5 Ombangi yocili ka yi kembi; ombangi yesanda yi vangola uhembi.
Proverbs14:6 Ukuetombo o sanda sanda olondunge kuenje ka vi sangi; ukualondunge oku kuata uloño co leluka.
Proverbs14:7 Liamuha leveke, momo kokuaye ku sangiko olondaka violondunge."
Proverbs14:8 Olondunge viukuotate oku kũlĩhisa olonjila viaye; uveke waveke u va liana.
Proverbs14:9 Suku o pembula ondingekandu, o sanjukila ondingesunga."
Proverbs14:10 Utima u kũlĩha okuvala kuawo muẽle; wiñi ka litengi vesanju liawo.
Proverbs14:11 Onjo yondingaĩvi yi papuluka, osinge yukuesunga puãi yi tumãla."
Proverbs14:12 Kuli onjila yimue yi mõleha kumunu okuti ya suñama, efulilo liayo puãi, olio onjila yi panda kokufa."
Proverbs14:13 Ndaño poku yola utima u vala vala, efulilo lionjolela esumuo."
Proverbs14:14 Ukuemande o kutisua lepako liolonjila viaye. Ukuesunga o kutisua lepako liovilinga viaye.
Proverbs14:15 U wa kamba olondunge o tava ño viosi, u wa lunguka o kulĩhisa oku a enda."
Proverbs14:16 Ukualondunge o lunguka, o tinduka kũvi, eveke li liwekako oku lipokuisa, hailio ka li litati."
Proverbs14:17 U o tematema lonjanga o linga viuveke, ukualondunge puãi o likolisila."
Proverbs14:18 Ava va kamba olondunge va piñala uveke, puãi ava va lunguka va futisua lukũlĩhiso."
Proverbs14:19 Olondingaivi vi petama kovaso olondingesunga. Vakuakandu va talama kolombundi via vakuesunga.
Proverbs14:20 Osuke yi suvukiwa ndaño lu va lisungue, ohuasi puãi yi kuete akamba va lua."
Proverbs14:21 U o lavisa ukuavo o linga ekandu, u puãi o lingainga ohenda kolosuke o sumũlũha."
Proverbs14:22 Vakuakupanga evĩho hẽ ka va lueya? Vakuakupanga esunga puãi va sanga ohenda locili.
Proverbs14:23 Upange wosi u kuete onima. Upopi waño u tuala kusuke.
Proverbs14:24 Ocifuto cavakualondunge ukuasi wavo, ocifuto caveke uveke."
Proverbs14:25 Ombangi yocili yi popela ovimuenyo, puãi u imba uvangi wuhembi omakuli."
Proverbs14:26 Ukuakusumbila Yehova wa pamisua, omãla vaye va kuete ocikolo cavo."
Proverbs14:27 Ohu sumbila Yehova oko ono yomuenyo, okuti olonjanjo viokufa vi yuvuiwa lakuo."
Proverbs14:28 Kowiñi womanu oko kuli ulamba wosoma, ka pali omanu osoma yi nyolẽha."
Proverbs14:29 U o livala konyeño wa lunguka muẽle, u o tema tema lonjanga o lekisa uveke."
Proverbs14:30 Utima nda wa tula etimba li kala ciwa, puãi alivelo ãvi a volisa akepa."
Proverbs14:31 U o linga lãvi osuke o pembula usovoli waye, u o lingila osuke ohenda u kemainya."
Proverbs14:32 Ondingaĩvi yi nyõleha lũvi wayo; ondingesunga yi kuete ocikolo omo yi kuete esunga.
Proverbs14:33 Olondunge vi sikaila vutima wonoño, vutima weveke puãi kavimo."
Proverbs14:34 Esunga li kemainya ofeka; akandu a pembuisa omanu vosi.
Proverbs14:35 Ukuenje ukualondunge o soliwa losoma, ukuakukutisasõi puãi o sanga onyeño yaye."
Proverbs15:1 Etambululo liombembua li tulumũla ocikumbiti, ondaka ya kãla puãi yi wengula onyeño."
Proverbs15:2 Elimi liukualondunge li sandeka uloño, puãi ovimẽla viaveke vi popia popia esanda."
Proverbs15:3 Ovaso a Yehova a lete kuosi, a lavulula olondingaivi lolondingesunga."
Proverbs15:4 Elimi liumbombe uti womuenyo, puãi olondaka via kãla vi teya utima."
Proverbs15:5 Eveke li tomba alungulo a isiaye puãi u o tava koku lemeliwa o lekisa utate.
Proverbs15:6 Vonjo yondingesunga muli ovikuata via lua, ukuasi wondingaĩvi puãi u sakalaisua."
Proverbs15:7 Omẽla wukualondunge u sandeka ukũlĩhiso, omẽla weveke puãi hacoko."
Proverbs15:8 Yehova o nyale ovilumba violondingakandu, puãi ohutililo yukuesunga oyo a sole."
Proverbs15:9 Yehova o nyale onjila yolondingaĩvi; o sole u o kuama esunga.
Proverbs15:10 U o pambuka vonjila o sanga eyambulo lia kãla, u o suvuka alungulo o fa."
Proverbs15:11 Onjembo lokalunga vi molẽha kovaso a Yehova, ka ca piãlele hẽ ovitima viomanu?"
Proverbs15:12 Ukuemande ka sole oku vetisua evelo, ka endi kukualondunge."
Proverbs15:13 Utima wa sanjuka u posuisa ocipala, puãi utima wa sumua u honguisa omuenyo."
Proverbs15:14 Utima wukualondunge u sandiliya uloño, puãi omẽla weveke weyuka uveke."
Proverbs15:15 Omumbe yi sumua sumua ño oloneke viosi; ukuotima wa sanjuka o lialia elau.
Proverbs15:16 Citito kumue lesumbilo lia Yehova, ca velapo; ukuasi wa lua kumue lohele, ci sule."
Proverbs15:17 Ombelela yamẽla kumue locisola, ya velapo; ositu yongombe ya neta kumue lesuvu, yi sule."
Proverbs15:18 Ukuanyeño o sanomola ovaima, u puãi o livala konyeño o tulumũla uyaki."
Proverbs15:19 Onjila yukuawesi ye yuka olosongo; onjila ykuuesunga ya linga elila lia tapika.

Proverbs22:8 U o waya evĩho ungula ohali, kuenje ombueti yonyeño yaye yi tokoka."
Proverbs22:9 Ukuacali o sumũlũha, momo ukuakuavela olombolo viaye kolosuke."
Proverbs22:10 Tundisa ukuemande kuenje uyaki u tundavo, okuliyenja lakovo ku liweka kuenda epembe."
Proverbs22:11 U o sole onjelo yutima haeye ukuakuvangula lutate, eye o linga ekamba liosoma."
Proverbs22:12 Ovaso a Yehova a lava lava ukũlĩhiso, puãi o lembuisa olondaka viukuelimbi."
Proverbs22:13 Ukuawesi hati, Posamua peli ohosi. Volokololo ndiwa."
Proverbs22:14 Omẽla welãsãla okueve kua longa, undeti Yehova a temela o famo."
Proverbs22:15 Vutima womõla muli esanda, ombueti yelungulo puãi yi li sandola."
Proverbs22:16 U o liyukinyila ukuasi waye kolosuke, pamue ecaeca kolohuasi, o mõla lika usuke."
Proverbs22:17 Vongola etui liove, yevelela olondaka violonoño; tiamisa utima wove kolondunge viange,"
Proverbs22:18 momo ciwa nda o kala lavio vutima wove, nda viosi vika vomẽla wove."
Proverbs22:19 Nda ku vi sapuila ove etali okuti ekolelo liove li kala ku Yehova.
Proverbs22:20 Sia ku sonẽhelele hẽ olondaka akui atatu vialungulo luloño?
Proverbs22:21 Siu ku longisa hẽ eci cesunga leci cocili, okuti o kumbulula ciwa ava va ku tuma?"
Proverbs22:22 Ku ka punde osuke, momo osuke ale; ku ka vokiye ohali kukuahali o kasi kombundi."
Proverbs22:23 Momo Yehova o va tundila olunda, ha nyõli ovimuenyo viava va va nyõla."
Proverbs22:24 Ku ka linale lukuanyeño; ku ka ende kumosi lukuakufungula,"
Proverbs22:25 sanga ovitua viaye viu ku ika, kuenje o likueka vonjanjo."
Proverbs22:26 Ka ka linge ndava va sole oku likumanyaila olondevali, haivo va kapa kapa olonjeke polofuka."
Proverbs22:27 Nda ku kuete eci o feta, nye va ku tambuila ula wove?"
Proverbs22:28 Ku ka sondolole ulilo wonahũlũlua, una olosekulu viove via kapele."
Proverbs22:29 O lete ulume o kuete ombili kupange waye? Eye o ka talama kovaso olosoma, ka ka talama kovaso omanu vaño."
Proverbs23:1 Eci o tumãla poku lia lombiali, limbuka lolondunge eci ci kasi kovaso ove."
Proverbs23:2 Likalula anguli nda wa sapa.
Proverbs23:3 Ku ka livele ovilia viaye vi sõsa, momo vielimbi."
Proverbs23:4 Ku ka likavise no oku mõla ukuasi. Liwekako. Kuata olondunge.
Proverbs23:5 Tuli ovaso ove a u mõla, wa tila, ocipikipiki wa lilulikila avava, wa palalela kilu ndongonga."
Proverbs23:6 Ku ka lie kombolo yofufi; ku ka livele ovilia viaye vi sõsa.
Proverbs23:7 Momo wa soka ndumue o sokolola vutima, haeye o ku pañinya hati, Lia, nyua,— haimo utima waye ka u kasi love."
Proverbs23:8 Okambu wa lile o ka sanja, kuenje o pesela olondaka viove vi sõsa."
Proverbs23:9 Ku ka vanguile kovaso eveke, momo o tomba olondunge violondaka viove."
Proverbs23:10 Ku ka sondolole ulilo wonahũlũlua, pamue oku tepulula kovapia olosiwe."
Proverbs23:11 Momo pakisi yavo wa kola, eye o funda love ondaka yavo."
Proverbs23:12 Kapa utima wove kalungulo, lovatui ove kolondaka violondunge."
Proverbs23:13 Ku ka liweke oku pindisa omõla, ndaño u veta lombueti ka fi."
Proverbs23:14 Nda u veta lombueti, o popela omuenyo waye konjembo."
Proverbs23:15 Amõlange, nda utima wove wa lunguka, lamevo utima wange u sanjuka."
Proverbs23:16 Ocili, utima wange u yolela, eci omẽla wove u vangola evi via sunguluka."
Proverbs23:17 Utima wove ka u ka livele olonjila violondingakandu. Kuamelela vusumba wa Yehova otembo yosi.
Proverbs23:18 Momo nda oco, ku kala onima, lelavoko liove ka li nyõlẽha."
Proverbs23:19 Yevelela amõlange, kuata olondunge; suñamisa utima wove vonjila yesunga."
Proverbs23:20 Ku ka kale pokati kolohõlua, ndaño pokati kovisapanu violositu,"
Proverbs23:21 oholua locilianu vi mõla uputu. Ayele a walisa omunu ovindambu.
Proverbs23:22 Pokola ku so wa ku cita; ku ka lavise nyoho eci a kuka.
Proverbs23:23 Landa esunga, ku ka li landise vali; landa olondunge lalungulo luloño."
Proverbs23:24 So yondingesunga o yolela muẽle; u wa cita ukualondunge u sanjukila.
Proverbs23:25 Sanjuisa so la nyoho; u wa ku cita a yolele.
Proverbs23:26 Amõlange, nyihe utima wove; ovaso ove a lavulule olonjila viange."
Proverbs23:27 Momo elãsãla okueve kua longa, ukuovaisi ocisimo ca sukatela,"
Proverbs23:28 o lavakaila ndocimunu, o luisa vakuevĩho pokati komanu."
Proverbs23:29 Elie o litetela? Elie o lisiõsiõla? Ukuavama helie? Elie o likekemba? Elie wa asiwa olongase olivova? Elie ukuavaso a kusuka?
Proverbs23:30 Ovo vana va tumãla osimbu lovinyu, vana va nyuanyua ovinyu via tengiwa."
Proverbs23:31 Ku ka vanje ovinyu eci vi kusuka, eci vi tutuma vokopo, leci vi feloka ocili."
Proverbs23:32 Kefulilo vi lumana ndonyoha, vi lumana muẽle ndenyenya."
Proverbs23:33 Vovaso muiya ovingoingoi; utima wove u tana tana evi viesanda.
Proverbs23:34 O linga ndomunu wa pekela pokati kokalunga, pamue ndu wa tumãla kongunji yonaviyu"
Proverbs23:35 O popia huti, Va mbeta puãi ka ca mbalele; va nota olombole puãi sia ci yevele."
Proverbs23:36 Otembo yipi masuka si vi sandi vali?
Proverbs24:1 Ku ka livele alume vãvi; ku ka livele oku kala pokati kavo;
Proverbs24:2 momo itima viavo vi sima sima undiandia, lovimela viavo vi popia popia emande."
Proverbs24:3 Onjo yi tungiwa lolondunge, yi kolisiwa luloño."
Proverbs24:4 Nda kuli ukũlĩhiso olohondo viayo vi yukisua ovina viosi viwa haivio via posoka.
Proverbs24:5 Ukualondunge wa velapo, wa pama ketimba o sule. Ulume wa loñoloha wa velapo, ukualõhõlo o sule."
Proverbs24:6 Momo Kapusu kolondunge endisa ciwa ovita; kolondunguli via lua kuli oku yula.
Proverbs24:7 Eveke ka li pitila kolondunge omo via lepa, volusenje ka li popi."
Proverbs24:8 U o sima sima oku sovola ũvi o tukuiwa usanumuli.
Proverbs24:9 Evi via sokiyiwa luveke ekandu. Omembuli yi suvukiwa lomanu.
Proverbs24:10 Nda wa konyoha keteke liohali, ca lomboloka okuti ongusu yove yitito."
Proverbs24:11 Popela ava va kasi loku tualiwa kokufa. Tiula ava va kasi loku enda loku luluma kepondelo.
Proverbs24:12 Ndaño wa linga huti, Ota, sia ci kũlĩhile,— u o kũlĩhisa ovitima hẽ, ka ci lete? U o lava lava utima wove hẽ, ka civo? Ka muisa hẽ omunu ndupange waye, omunu ndupange waye?"
Proverbs24:13 Amõlange, lialia owiki momo u pepa, latosi a loka loka kocingo a sõsa vomẽla yove."
Proverbs24:14 Kũlĩha okuti haico ci kasi lolondunge vutima; nda wa vi sanga kuli muẽle onima, lelavoko liove ka li nyõlẽha."
Proverbs24:15 Andingaĩvi, ku ka lavekele onjo yukuesunga, ku ka nyõle ocipuyukilo caye."
Proverbs24:16 Momo ukuesunga o kupuka olonjanja epanduvali kuenje o votoka vali. Olondingaĩvi puãi vi lunduka lũvi.
Proverbs24:17 Ku ka sanjuke omo unyãli wove a kupuka; utima wove ka u ka yolele omo a likonjoka,"
Proverbs24:18 sanga Yehova o ci lete kuenje cu sumuisa, lonyeño yaye u yupa."
Proverbs24:19 Ku ka lisakalaise mekonda liolondingaĩvi; ku ka livele vakuakandu.
Proverbs24:20 Momo komunu ũvi ka kuli onima; ovela yondingaĩvi yima.
Proverbs24:21 Amõlange, sumba Yehova losoma, kavali kavo ku ka va sinile;"
Proverbs24:22 momo kokuavo ku tunda oku nyõlẽha ocipikipiki; lokunyõlẽha kuaco ku tunda kokuavo helie o kui?
Proverbs24:23 Olondaka vimue vikuavo violonoño, vievi: Oku amẽla omunu kekanga hakuwako."
Proverbs24:24 U o popia londingaĩvi hati, Umamale, eye o siñaliwa haeye o pembuiwa lolofeka."
Proverbs24:25 Puãi ava va lungula ondingaĩvi ovo va kala ciwa, lesumũluho liocili li va wila."
Proverbs24:26 U o ku kumbulula locili, eye ekamba liocili."
Proverbs24:27 Pongiya ovina vi sukiliwa. Angiliya epia liove, oco o tunga noke onjo."
Proverbs24:28 Ku ka linge ombangi yoku pisa ukuẽle olivova; ku ka kembe lomẽla wove.
Proverbs24:29 Ku ka linge huti, Ndu linga ndomo a ndinga ame, pamue huti, Fetuluinya omunu caye omunu caye."
Proverbs24:30 Nda vinjuka kepia liukuawesi; nda nyula kocumbo cu wa kamba olondunge;
Proverbs24:31 kuenje tala, cosi ca yunda lolosongo, ca sitikiwa loluyua. Ocimbaka caco ca papuluka."
Proverbs24:32 Nda lengelela kuenje nda sokolola ciwa; nda vanja kuenje nda liupila olondunge.
Proverbs24:33 Okatulo katito, okakusuñila kaño; okuliketika naito ovaka poku pekela,"
Proverbs24:34 kuenje uputu u ku sanga ndocingumba, kuenda usuke ndukuavita."
Proverbs25:1 Olosapo vimue vikuavo via Salomone, via sondolola akuenje va Hesekiya, osoma ya Yuda, vievi:"
Proverbs25:2 Ulamba wa Suku oku sitika alomboluilo alumbu aye; ulamba wolosoma oku moñolola olondaka.
Proverbs25:3 Ndeci kilu kua lepa, loposi pa longa, haico itima violosoma ka vi moñoluiwa."
Proverbs25:4 Tepisa eña kolomanya viopalata, kuenje ku tunda eci ocivinda ci tunga laco elonga."
Proverbs25:5 Tundisa ondingaĩvi kovaso osoma, kuenje omangu yaye yi kolisua lesunga."
Proverbs25:6 Ku ka likemainye kovaso osoma; ku ka talame pakope,"
Proverbs25:7 momo ca velapo oku ku pañinya hati, Enju kulo. Kaciwako oku ku amisila apa pa sule kovaso ombiali. Eci ca mõla ovaso ove"
Proverbs25:8 ku ka ci nene lonjanga kekanga, omo kefulilo hẽ o linga nye nda ukuẽle o ku kutisa osõi?"
Proverbs25:9 Vangula lukuẽle ove muẽle; ku ka sapule ondaka yukuẽle;
Proverbs25:10 sanga u o yi yeva o ku kutisa osõi, lepembe liove ka li pui."
Proverbs25:11 Ondaka ya popiwa yu ya soka lotembo yaco ya linga ndapako ulu velonga liopalata.
Proverbs25:12 Ondunguli ya sunguluka ketui li yeva, ya soka ndocingẽlengẽle culu pamue etoloso liulu."
Proverbs25:13 Ndeci ombambi yocikokoto yi kavuluisa omunu kotembo yoku ungula, haico omunga yocili kokuava vo tuma, yi kavuluisa ovitima via vacime caye."
Proverbs25:14 Ndeci alende lofela, ombela mbu, haico omunu o lipandela ombanjaile ka ecele."
Proverbs25:15 Ombiali yi lemelehua lolupandi lua lova. Elimi li onjuka li teya ekepa.
Proverbs25:16 Nda wa sanga owiki, liako eci wa soka laco lika, sanga o lia calua kuenje o sanja."
Proverbs25:17 Omai yove ka yi ka endaende enene vonjo yukuẽle, sanga wu kuma kuenje o ku suvuka."
Proverbs25:18 U wa lingila ombangi yuhembi kukuavo, wa soka ndonjundo, pamue osipata, pamue usongo wa tua."
Proverbs25:19 Okukolela ukuelimbi keteke liohali, kua soka ndeyo lia vola pamue okulu kua tunguka."
Proverbs25:20 U imbaila ovisungo ku-u utima waye u vala wa soka ndu o lula ocikutu keteke liombambi, pamue o kapa indangele kepute."
Proverbs25:21 Nda unyali wove wa lambuka u lisa ombolo, nda o kuete enyona u nyuisa ovava."
Proverbs25:22 Momo nda oco o linga wa kapa akala ondalu konumbutue yaye, kuenje Yehova o ku muisa onima."
Proverbs25:23 Ofela yokonano yi nena ombela, lelimi liusokui li felisa ocipala."
Proverbs25:24 Ca velapo oku yotaila pevindi liolusoka luonjo, vonjo yinene lukãi o yenja yenja hamoko."
Proverbs25:25 Ndeci ovava a talala komunu o kasi lenyona, haico londaka yiwa yi tunda kofeka kupãla."
Proverbs25:26 Ndeci ocisimo ci kuete ovava a venga, pamue ono ya vĩhisua, haico ukuesunga wa konyohela ondingaĩvi."
Proverbs25:27 Kaciwako oku lia ca lua owiki, oco lunguka lolondaka vioku pandula enene."
Proverbs25:28 Omunu ka tẽla oku likandangaya wa soka ndimbo lia papuluka, ka li kuete ocimbaka."
Proverbs26:1 Ndeci ocikakula ka ci tava kondombo pamue ombela kokuenye, haico esumbilo ka li sesamẽla keveke."
Proverbs26:2 Ndeci okangungu ka sonda sonda, pamue omiapia yi palala, haico endamba liaño ka liya."
Proverbs26:3 Okavalu osikote, ocimbulu elienge, eveke ombueti konyima."
Proverbs26:4 Ku ka tambulule eveke nduveke waye, sanga lovevo o lisoka laye."
Proverbs26:5 Tambulula eveke nduveke waye, sanga o litambela olondunge viaye."
Proverbs26:6 U o tuma ondaka leveke o litopola olomai viaye muẽle, kuenje o likokela ohali."
Proverbs26:7 Ndeci ovolu ocilema a seluka haico olusapo vomẽla weveke.
Proverbs26:8 Ndeci omunu a pandekela ewe vepipili haico omunu eca esumbilo keveke.
Proverbs26:9 Ndeci ocanja colosongo peka lioholua, haico olusapo vomẽla weveke."
Proverbs26:10 Omunu ukualondunge o talavaya upange waye muẽle; eveke li kapa kupange waye wosi ño omitambamba.
Proverbs26:11 Ndeci ombua yi tiukila vali kosanjo yayo, haico eveke li tongeka luveke walio."
Proverbs26:12 O lete omunu wa lipanda hati, Ndukualondunge? Eveke hise muẽle lomunu waco."
Proverbs26:13 Ukuawesi hati, Vonjila muli ondumba, volokololo muli ohosi."
Proverbs26:14 Ndeci epito li lisenga kolondevaliso, haico ukuawesi pula waye."
Proverbs26:15 Ukuawesi o yava eka liaye velonga, oku li tuala vali komela cu kavisa."
Proverbs26:16 Ukuawesi kokulisimila kuaye wa velapo kolondunge, olonganji epanduvali vi sule."
Proverbs26:17 U o limba vema haliayeko, wa soka ndu wa kuata kovatui ombua yi pita ombamba."
Proverbs26:18 Ndeci eyui li sandola ovitonga lovisongo lokufa,"
Proverbs26:19 haico omunu wa kemba ukuavo, hati, Hakupapalako hẽ?"
Proverbs26:20 Pa kamba olohui ondalu yima; ka pali ukualombonde uyaki u pua.
Proverbs26:21 Ndeci akala volutukuta, pamue olohui vondalu, haico lonjaki yi sanomõla ovama."
Proverbs26:22 Olondaka viocisokui via soka ndovilia vi pepa. Viñila muẽle toke vokati kimo.
Proverbs26:23 Ndeci ociyo caño ca lañiwa lopalata, haico omela wombambe lutima ũvi."
Proverbs26:24 Ukuesuvu o livondela lomela waye, puãi vutima o seleka elimbi."
Proverbs26:25 Ndaño wa popia ombambe ku ko tave, vutima waye mu li ovinyuañi epanduvali."
Proverbs26:26 Ndaño esuvu liaye li tuvikua lulimbiki, haimo ũvi waye u limbulukilua kowiñi."
Proverbs26:27 U o fela okueve o famo, lu o tiñulula ewe, ewe liaco liu lundika."
Proverbs26:28 Elimi liuhembi li suvuka olongase vialio; omẽla wombambe u koka oku nyõlẽha.
Proverbs27:1 Ku ka litambele eteke lia hela, momo ku ci eci eteke liaco li nena."
Proverbs27:2 Ukuẽle a ku sivaye, omela wove hawoko; ukombe a ku sivaye, elimi liove halioko."
Proverbs27:3 Ewe li lema, eseke ocitele, puãi onyeño yeveke ya velapo viosi kokulema."
Proverbs27:4 Ocikumbiti ci futuisa utima, onyeño yi samoha, puãi o tela oku tamalala lesepa helie?"
Proverbs27:5 Elalulo kutanya lia velapo, ocisola ca vundisua ci sule."
Proverbs27:6 Olombole via totiwa lukuacisola via sunguluka; okusipula kunyali uhembi.
Proverbs27:7 U we kutale o likala owiki, puãi ku wa lambuka cosi ci lula ci pepa."
Proverbs27:8 Ndeci onjila yi sia sia ocanju cayo haico ci kasi ulume o sia sia onjo yaye.
Proverbs27:9 Ulela lelemba liwa vi sanjuisa utima; lelungulo liekamba li sanjuisa omunu.
Proverbs27:10 Ku ka nyuhe ekamba liove pamue ekamba lia so; ku ka ende konjo ya manjove eteke liohali yove. Ukuẽle o kasi ocipepi wa velapo, manjove o kasi kupãla o sule."
Proverbs27:11 Kuata olondunge amõlange, sanjuisa utima wange, oco nambulule u o njimbula."
Proverbs27:12 Omunu wa lunguka o mõla ũvi kuenje u yepa, puãi ava va kamba olondunge va enda ño kuenje va yambuka."
Proverbs27:13 Kuata onanga yu wa liyekela onjeke yukombe; muẽle a linge onjeke nda wa liyekela onjeke yukualofeka.
Proverbs27:14 U o lama ukuavo londaka ya lua eci a pasuka ociteketeke, cu tendiwila ndendamba."
Proverbs27:15 Okupuapuala kueteke liombela, lukãi ukuakuyokoya ca soka."
Proverbs27:16 Oku u lemela kua soka loku lemela ofela, pamue loku kuata ulela peka liondio."
Proverbs27:17 Ndeci utale u lepika utale, haico omunu a lepika omunu."
Proverbs27:18 U o lava ukuyu o lia kepako liawo, lu o tata cime caye o sanga esumbilo."
Proverbs27:19 Ndeci ocipala ci molehela vovava ndomo ci kasi ocili, haico utima womunu u molehela vovilinga viaye."
Proverbs27:20 Ndeci konjembo lokokalunga lalimue eteke ku tẽla haico ovaso omunu lalimue eteke a tẽla.
Proverbs27:21 Opalata oku yeveya, ulu oku totola, omunu o setekiwa lesivayo a tambula."
Proverbs27:22 Ndaño o sulila eveke lowisi vocine haimo uveke waye ka u u tundi.
Proverbs27:23 Pindamua lolomeme viove; lava ciwa olongombe viove;
Proverbs27:24 momo tikuasi ko tumãla hũ, ndaño usoma hẽ, u tumãla toke kovitumbulukila viosi?"
Proverbs27:25 Eci owangu u keluiwa, losungu yi tunda, leci owangu wa kukuta u selekiwa,"
Proverbs27:26 oco otumeme tu eca uwalo, kuenje kolohombo ku tunda ondando yepia."
Proverbs27:27 Asenjele olohombo a tẽla eteku liove, kuenda eteku lionjo yove leli liafeko vove."
Proverbs28:1 Olondingaĩvi vi tila ndaño ka kuli u vi landula, puãi olondingesunga olonõi ndolohosi."
Proverbs28:2 Ofeka nda ya huka olombiali vi lova, puãi nda omanu vaco va sunguluka haivo vakualondunge uviali u tumãla ño-o."
Proverbs28:3 Ohuasi yi lingaisa olosuke, eye ombela yi sosola ka yi si olomema."
Proverbs28:4 Ava va yanduluka ovihandeleko ovo va sivaya olondingaĩvi, puãi ava va lava lava ovihandeleko ovo va yaka lavio."
Proverbs28:5 Olondingaĩvi ka vi y evi esunga, puãi ava va sanda sanda Yehova va li yeva."
Proverbs28:6 Osuke yendela vesunga liaye eye wa velapo; ohuasi yendela volonjila viaye via penga eye o sule.
Proverbs28:7 U o lava ovihandeleko eye omõla ukualondunge, lu o livandeka lovilianu o kutisa isiaye osõi."
Proverbs28:8 U o luisa ukuasi waye losindike pamue lonjulule u siliyila ukuahenda yolosuke.
Proverbs28:9 U o tindula etui liaye kovihandeleko, elombelo liaye li linga ocinyuañi."
Proverbs28:10 U o songuila vakuesunga vonjila yĩvi o fa vokueve kuaye muẽle; puãi ava va pua eko va piñala esumũlũho.
Proverbs28:11 Ohuasi yi lipanda hati, Nda lunguka,— puãi osuke yi kuete olondunge yi limbulula."
Proverbs28:12 Eci vakuesunga va yula kuli ulamba wa lua. Eci olondingaĩvi vi kula omanu va salama.
Proverbs28:13 U o limbika akandu aye ka tela oku sumũluha, puãi u o litavela kuenje o tindukako eye o sanga ohenda."
Proverbs28:14 U o sumbila Yehova wa sumũlũha, puãi u o sivaisa utima waye o sanga ohali."
Proverbs28:15 Ndeci ohosi yi kumba kumba pamue ongue yi sakiya, haico ombiali yĩvi kolosuke."
Proverbs28:16 Ombiali ya kamba olondunge ondiandia, puãi u o suvuka ocipululu amisako oloneke viaye."
Proverbs28:17 Ulume wa pia losonde yomunu a linge onjomboloki toke kokufa. Lomue ka ko kuatise.
Proverbs28:18 U endaela vesunga o popeliwa, Puãi u endaela volonjila via vĩha o kupukila vocitunu."
Proverbs28:19 U o lima lima ovapia aye o kuta olombolo, puãi u o kuama ovina viaño o mõla usuke wa lua."
Proverbs28:20 Ngendevando o sanga asumũlũho a lua. Ngendalupesi ka puluka oku yambuiwa.
Proverbs28:21 Oku amela omunu hakuwako puãi ũvi waco vamue vo lingila oku tambula okacimalañanya kombolo.
Proverbs28:22 Oholotelo yi kuata onjanga yoku limuisa, ka yi ci cokuti usuke u u sanga."
Proverbs28:23 U o lungula omunu noke o soliwa ca velapo, ukuambambe ci sule."
Proverbs28:24 U o punda so yaye pamue inaye kuenje o linga hati, Hekanduko,— eye locinyõi vamuamue."
Proverbs28:25 Ukuotima wusesiame o wengula ovama, puãi u wa kolela Yehova o muisua ukuasi."
Proverbs28:26 U o likolela eye muẽle vutima waye eveke, puãi u enda enda lolondunge o puluka."
Proverbs28:27 Ukuakuavela olosuke ka suki, puãi u o sitika ovaso aye o sanga asiñalo a lua."
Proverbs28:28 Eci olondingaĩvi vi katuka omanu va salama, puãi eci vi nyõlẽha olondingesunga vi siata."
Proverbs29:1 U o lunguaiwa ca lua puãi haimo o pembula ño-o eye o nyõlẽha ocipikipiki kuenje ka sakuiwa vali.
Proverbs29:2 Eci olondingesunga vi viala, omanu va sanjuka, puãi eci olondingaĩvi vi viala, omanu va liyeya."
Proverbs29:3 U o sole olondunge o sanjuisa isiaye, puãi u endaenda lovipuepue o sandola ukuasi waye muẽle."
Proverbs29:4 Osoma yi viala lesunga yi tumãlisa ofeka, puãi osoma yi kisika ulambu wa lua yi yi nyõla."
Proverbs29:5 U o sivaya ukuavo lombambe o petuila olomai viaye onjanjo.
Proverbs29:6 Ukuevĩho o kuatiwa lonjanjo yevĩho liaye muẽle; puãi ukuesunga imbaimba ovisungo haeye o yolela.
Proverbs29:7 Ondingesunga yi kũlĩha eci ca sesamela osuke; ondingaĩvi ka yi kuete ukũlĩhĩso waco.
Proverbs29:8 Vakuemande va yuelisa imbo; vakualondunge va tulumula onyeño.
Proverbs29:9 Nda ukualondunge o lisombisa leveke, eveke li keloha ño kuenda li yola, loku tula lakamue."
Proverbs29:10 Olomondi vi nyale u wa pua eko; vakuevĩho va sanda omuenyo waye.
Proverbs29:11 Eveke li lekisa onyeño yaye yosi, ukualondunge puãi o yi likandangiya."
Proverbs29:12 Nda osoma yi yevelela kuhembi, akuenje vaye vosi va vĩha."
Proverbs29:13 Ohukui londiandia va ñualẽhela; Yehova o va tuisila ocinyi caye, kavali kavo."
Proverbs29:14 Nda osoma yi tetuluila olohũkui lesunga, omangu yaye yi kolisua hũ."
Proverbs29:15 Ombueti lalungulo vi eca olondunge, puãi omõla wa pañuiwa o kutisa inaye osõi."
Proverbs29:16 Eci olondingaivi vi viala, akandu a lova, puãi vakuesunga va mõla okunyõleha kuavio."
Proverbs29:17 Pindisa omõlove kuenje o ku kavuluisa, haeye o sanjuisa utima wove."
Proverbs29:18 Apa ka peli oku sokoluila kovasoangenda omanu va nyõlẽha, puãi u o lava lava ovihandeleko wa sumũlũha."
Proverbs29:19 Ukuenje ka pindisua lolondaka lika, momo ndaño o yeva ka pokola."
Proverbs29:20 O lete omimu ukuakupopia lonjanga? Kokuaye elavoko li sule, keveke elavoko lia velapo."
Proverbs29:21 U o pindisa ukuenje waye lutate tunde kutila waye, kefulilo o sanga okuti wa linga ndomolaye woku licitila."
Proverbs29:22 Ukuakanyama o wengola ovaima; ukuanyeño o lueyisa ca lua.
Proverbs29:23 Epela liomunu liu sepula, puãi u wonjuka o sumbiwa."
Proverbs29:24 U o lia locimunu wa suvuka omuenyo waye; o yeva esingo liaco puãi ku situlula.
Proverbs29:25 Usumba omunu a kuetele ukuavo onjanjo, puãi u wa kolela Yehova wa koka."
Proverbs29:26 Valua va livondela kombiali, puãi esunga liocili omunu o li sanga ku Yehova."
Proverbs29:27 Ukuesunga o nyale ondingohõle; ondingohõle yi nyale omunu endela vonjila ya suñama.
Proverbs30:1 Olondaka via Aguri omõla a Yake u Masa. Owanji a popia ku Iteli, ku Iteli muẽle, kuenda ku Ukale, wowu:"
Proverbs30:2 Ocili ame simunuko; olondunge viomunu si kuete.
Proverbs30:3 Sia lilongisile olondunge, ndaño ukũlĩhiso w'U o kola si kuete."
Proverbs30:4 Wa la londa kilu yu wa lokako helie? Wa la kutika ofela peka liaye helie? Helie wa la kutila ovava puwalo waye? Wa kolisa ovivanja viosi violuali helie? Helie onduko yaye? Onduko yomõlaye helie? Ku pumbi oku yi kũliha.
Proverbs30:5 Olondaka viosi via Suku via setekiwa okuti viocili; eye ombetateli yava vo kolela.
Proverbs30:6 Ku ka vokiye kolondaka viaye sanga o ku vetela evelo kuenje o linga ohembi.
Proverbs30:7 Ovina vivali nda ku lomba, ku ka vi lihale osimbu sia file."
Proverbs30:8 Uhembi lesanda vi ñaile ocipãla. Ku ka ngavele usuke ndaño ukuasi.
Proverbs30:9 Ndise okulia kua soka ño lame, sanga nda ñuta enene hu likala siti, Yehova helie?— pamue nda ndinga osuke, njiva, kuenje membuisa onduko ya Suku yange."
Proverbs30:10 Ku ka lundile ukuenje ku cime caye, sanga o ku siñala kuenje ove o pia."
Proverbs30:11 Kuli vamue va siñala vaisiavo, kuenda ka va pandula vainavo."
Proverbs30:12 Kuli vamue va lisimila, vati, Tua yela.— Puãi kumbondo wavo ka va yelisuile."
Proverbs30:13 Kuli vamue va imba ovaso avo vilu, lovisokopia viavo va vi petuila."
Proverbs30:14 Kuli vamue ovayo avo olosipata, awundi avo olomoko, ha va nyõli olohũkui kilu lieve, lolosuke pokati komanu."
Proverbs30:15 Etuli li kuete omãla vavali vati, Nyihe! Nyihe! Kuli ovina vitatu ka vi la tela. Kuli vikuala ka vi la linga viti, Ndoto— vievi:"
Proverbs30:16 Onjembo, imo liosiule, ongongo yi sukaila ovava, londalu ka yi la linga yiti, Ndoto."
Proverbs30:17 Iso liu o fuanguila isiaye, pamue o lavisa inaye li tofuiwa lovikuamanga viovocimbota kuenje li liwa lolohokohoko."
Proverbs30:18 Ovina vitatu vi ñomohisa enene, vikuãla muẽle ka via ndombolokele, vievi:"
Proverbs30:19 Onjila yongonga yulombo kilu, onjila yonyoha kesenje, onjila yonaviyu vokalunga, lonjila yulume lukãi."
Proverbs30:20 Onjila yocipuepue yeyi: O lia, o lipuenya komẽla, kuenje o popia hati, Sia lingile cimue cĩvi."
Proverbs30:21 Ovina vitatu vi lulumisa osi; vikuãla ka yi vi tẽla, vievi:"
Proverbs30:22 Upika nda o linga osoma, eveke nda li kuta,"
Proverbs30:23 ukãi wa suvukiwa nda o kuela, ufeko nda o linga kapiñala ka Dona yaye."
Proverbs30:24 Ovina vikuãla vitito kilu lieve, puãi vi kuete olondunge via lua, vievi:"
Proverbs30:25 Olonjinji, epata ka lia kolele, haimo vi vanjiliya okulia kuavio kondombo."
Proverbs30:26 Olohuita, epata ka lia kolele, haimo vi tunga olonjo viavio kasenje."
Proverbs30:27 Olohuma ka vi kuete osoma, haimo vi enda, vi tula viosi avanda."
Proverbs30:28 Ekokolo o li kuata peka liove, haimo li kala vayemba olosoma."
Proverbs30:29 Ovina vitatu vi enda ca posoka; vikuãla olongendo viavio viwa, vievi:"
Proverbs30:30 Ohosi onõi pokati kovinyama, ka yi pambukila cimue."
Proverbs30:31 Ekondombolo li enda epela, ocitupi cohombo, kuenda osoma yi lenga kovaso omanu vaye."
Proverbs30:32 Nda wa linga uveke hu lituni, nda wa simale cĩvi, likuata komẽla."
Proverbs30:33 Momo oku saka asenjele ku lingisa ongundi, oku sĩla kenyulu ku tundisa osonde, oku sinda konyeño ku tunda ema."
Proverbs31:1 Olondaka via Lemuele, osoma ya Masa, violongisa inaye vievi, hati,"
Proverbs31:2 Amõlange, nye? Amõla imo liange, nye? Amõla olohuminyo, nye?"
Proverbs31:3 Ku ka ece ongusu yove kakãi, ndaño olonjila viove kuava va nyõla olosoma."
Proverbs31:4 A Lemuele, hacolosomako, hacolosomako oku nyuanyua ovinyu. Hacolombialiko oku pula pula ovingundu,"
Proverbs31:5 sanga vi nyua, kuenje vivalako ovihandeleko ha vi pengisa esunga ku vakuahali vosi."
Proverbs31:6 Eca ovingundu ku o kasi loku nyõlẽha, kuenda ovinyu kuava va kasi lotokua."
Proverbs31:7 Va nyue, va ivaleko uputu wavo, kuenje ka va ivaluka vali ohali yavo."
Proverbs31:8 Asama omẽla wove hu popela ovitende, hu tundila olunda vosi va yandulukiwa."
Proverbs31:9 Asama omẽla wove, tetulula lesunga. Linga esunga kolohũkui lokolosuke."
Proverbs31:10 O sanga ukãi wa sunguluka helie? Ocili wa velapo, olomota via tĩla vi sule."
Proverbs31:11 Utima wa veyaye wo kolela, eye ka kambi ukuasi."
Proverbs31:12 O linga veyaye ciwa, cĩvi hacoko, oloneke viosi viomuenyo waye."
Proverbs31:13 O vanjiliya ovonya olomeme lalinya, ha sakalala lupange wovaka aye."
Proverbs31:14 Wa soka lolonaviyu vioku fũla, upopa ovilia viaye kupãla."
Proverbs31:15 O pasuka tupu ka kua cile, ha eci okulia konjo yaye, kuenda ongaso kafeko vaye."
Proverbs31:16 O sokolola epia kuenje o li landa; o kũla ocumbo cayuva lupange wovaka aye.
Proverbs31:17 O litika uvia wolohõlo vombunda; o pamisa ovoko aye.
Proverbs31:18 O limbuka okuti ondando yaye yi silivila; uteke ovela yaye ka yimi.
Proverbs31:19 Imba ovaka aye koku pota, ovaka aye a kuata ombundo."
Proverbs31:20 Oluila eka liaye kolosuke; amisa ovaka aye komanu va suka.
Proverbs31:21 Ka kuete usumba wocikokoto eci o sokolola onjo yaye, vonjo yaye vosi va wala ovikutu viohusu."
Proverbs31:22 O litungila olonyime via posoka, o wala ovalatanya lolohusu."
Proverbs31:23 Veyaye wa kemãla kolonjango, eci a tumãla pokati kakũlu vofeka."
Proverbs31:24 O tunga olonanga vielinyu ha vi landisa, kuenje eca ovivia ku vakuakufũla."
Proverbs31:25 Uwalo waye olohõlo lesumbilo, o yola eteke liya."
Proverbs31:26 Asama omẽla waye lolondunge; alungulo ohenda a kasi kelimi liaye.
Proverbs31:27 O tata ciwa onjo yaye, ka li ombolo yowesi."
Proverbs31:28 Omãla vaye vo pandula; veyaye layevo u sivaya, hati,"
Proverbs31:29 Akãi va lua va lingainga ca posoka, ove puãi wa va velapo vosi."
Proverbs31:30 Ulambi ohembi, eposo ocina caño, puãi ukãi o sumbila Yehova o kemanyaiwa."
Proverbs31:31 Ene amanu, u muisi onima yovaka aye. Ovopange aye o sivayale pokati komanu."
Ecclesiastes1:1 Evi olondaka viukundi, omõla a Daviti, osoma yovo Yerusalãi."
Ecclesiastes1:2 Ukundi hati, Esanda kasanda, esanda kasanda, ovina viosi esanda."
Ecclesiastes1:3 Omunu o limuisa nye lupange wosi a lingainga vemi liekumbi?
